अर्थव्ययसंमस्थौ ऋगै जीवोऽहिना च संयुक्तः ।
सप्ताष्टमकश्च तदा जातस्यायुः परं त्रिंशत् ॥
चन्द्रे क्षीणे स्वले निधनेशे केन्द्रगेऽष्टमे पापे ।
लग्नेशे बलहीने जातस्यायुः परं त्रिंशत् ।:
होरेशे षष्ठगते सक्रूरौ चन्द्रमार्गत्रौ सुतगौ ।
निधनेशे केन्द्रगते जातस्यायुः परं त्रिंशत् ॥ .
अष्टमाधिपतौ केन्द्रे लग्नेशे बलवर्जित ।
त्रिंशद्वर्षमितायुष्मान् द्वात्रिंशद्वत्सरे मृतिः ॥ ६६ ॥
क्षीणे शशाङ्के यदि पापयुक्त रन्ध्राधिपे केन्द्रगतेऽष्टमे वा ।
पापान्विते हीनबले विलग्ने द्वात्रिंशदब्दे निधनं प्रयाति ॥ ६७ ॥

Sloka 66. When the lord of the 8th house occu
pies a Kendra, and the lord of the rising sign is without

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
SL. 68-70
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
218
strength, the person born will live no fewer than 30
years; perhaps his death may happen in the 32nd year.
Sloka 67. When the Moon is on the wane and
the lord of the 8th house from the Lagna occupies a Ken-
dra or the 8th house itself in conjunction with a malefic
planet, and the Lagna is without strength and occupied
also by a malefic planet, the person born will die in his
32nd year.
NOTES.
Vids also the following from यवनजातक (Yavanajathaka)
:
आपोक्किमस्थिते चन्द्रे लग्नेशे च तथैव हि ।
पापेक्षिते बदै ईनि जीवत्यष्टचतुर्गुणम् ॥
चन्द्रकझाटमपती केन्द्रगतावष्टमे ग्रहः कश्चित् ।
भाद्वात्रिंशाम्मरणं माग्यच्छुभसंयुते केन्द्रे ||
Also जावकोदेश
चन्द्रः झीनः स्वों निधनेशे केन्द्रगेऽहमे पापे ।
छम्मेरो बकहीने आतस्यायुः परं त्रिंशत् ॥
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये पाये लभेशे दुर्बले सति ।
अल्पायुरनपत्यो वा शुभदृग्योगवर्जिते ॥ ६८ ॥
Sloka 68. When a malefic planet occupies the 6th,
the 8th or the 12th from the Lagna and when the lord of
the rising sign is weak and is not in conjunction with
or aspected by benefic planets, the person born is either
short-lived or childless.
क्ररषष्ठंधशके वाऽपि रन्प्रेशे मानुजेऽपि वा ।
पापान्विते पापस्खेटे घाल्पमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ३९ ॥
व्ययार्थों पापसंयुक्तौ शुमदृष्टिविवर्जितौ ।
क्रूरषष्ठयंशसंयुक्तौ चाल्पमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ७० ॥
द्वात्रिंशइस्सरान्तर्भूतमालारिष्टयागारिष्टस्वल्पायुर्वेदः समाप्तः ॥
verses:
Sloka 67. When the Moon is on the wane and
the lord of the 8th house from the Lagna occupies a Ken-
dra or the 8th house itself in conjunction with a malefic
planet, and the Lagna is without strength and occupied
also by a malefic planet, the person born will die in his
32nd year.

आपोक्किमस्थिते चन्द्रे लग्नेशे च तथैव हि ।
पापेक्षिते बदै ईनि जीवत्यष्टचतुर्गुणम् ॥
चन्द्रकझाटमपती केन्द्रगतावष्टमे ग्रहः कश्चित् ।
भाद्वात्रिंशाम्मरणं माग्यच्छुभसंयुते केन्द्रे ||

चन्द्रः झीनः स्वों निधनेशे केन्द्रगेऽहमे पापे ।
छम्मेरो बकहीने आतस्यायुः परं त्रिंशत् ॥
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये पाये लभेशे दुर्बले सति ।
अल्पायुरनपत्यो वा शुभदृग्योगवर्जिते ॥ ६८ ॥

Sloka 68. When a malefic planet occupies the 6th,
the 8th or the 12th from the Lagna and when the lord of
the rising sign is weak and is not in conjunction with
or aspected by benefic planets, the person born is either
short-lived or childless.

क्ररषष्ठंधशके वाऽपि रन्प्रेशे मानुजेऽपि वा ।
पापान्विते पापस्खेटे घाल्पमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ३९ ॥

व्ययार्थों पापसंयुक्तौ शुमदृष्टिविवर्जितौ ।
क्रूरषष्ठयंशसंयुक्तौ चाल्पमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ७० ॥

title: Adh. IV
content:
214
बातकपारिजाते
Adh, IV
Sloka 69. When the lord of the 8th house from
the Lagna is either Saturn or a malefic planet in conjunc
tion with another malefic planet, and this lord of the 8th
house occupies an unpropitious षष्ठवंश (Shashtyamsa) of a
sign. the person born should be pronounced to be short-
lived.
Sloka 70. When the 12th and the 2nd places from
the Lagna are occupied by malefic planets in unpropi
'tious Shashtyamsas, and are void of benefic aspects, the
person born must be declared short-lived.
Now ends the treatment of the different kinds of
short-life due to बालारिष्ट (Balarishta) and योगारिष्ठ (Yogarishta)
comprised within the maximum age limit of 32 years.
NOTES.
The following is another अल्पायुयोग (Alpayur yoga) mentioned
in यवनजातक (Yavanajathaka)
गुरुणा युक्तः शुक्रो लग्नगतः पञ्चमे कुजार्कसुतौ ।
बलरहितअचम्म्रो जातोऽष्पजीवितो नियतम् ॥
॥ अथारिष्टभङ्गः ॥
NULLIFICATION OF EVIL OR COUNTERACTION OF
MISFORTUNE
अत्यन्तसत्वे यदि लग्ननाथे सौम्यान्विते तादृशदृष्टियोगे ।
केन्द्रास्थते पापदृशा विहीने सद्भाग्यथुम् जविति दीर्घमायुः ॥७१॥
Sloka 71. If the lord of the rising sign possess
exceeding strength and be in conjunction with a benefic
planet or aspected thereby, and occupy a Kendra position
and be free from any malefic aspect, the person born
will be very fortunate and be blessed with long life,
verses:
When the lord of the 8th house from
the Lagna is either Saturn or a malefic planet in conjunc
tion with another malefic planet, and this lord of the 8th
house occupies an unpropitious षष्ठवंश (Shashtyamsa) of a
sign. the person born should be pronounced to be short-
lived.

When the 12th and the 2nd places from
the Lagna are occupied by malefic planets in unpropi
'tious Shashtyamsas, and are void of benefic aspects, the
person born must be declared short-lived.

गुरुणा युक्तः शुक्रो लग्नगतः पञ्चमे कुजार्कसुतौ ।
बलरहितअचम्म्रो जातोऽष्पजीवितो नियतम् ॥

अत्यन्तसत्वे यदि लग्ननाथे सौम्यान्विते तादृशदृष्टियोगे ।
केन्द्रास्थते पापदृशा विहीने सद्भाग्यथुम् जविति दीर्घमायुः ॥७१॥

If the lord of the rising sign possess
exceeding strength and be in conjunction with a benefic
planet or aspected thereby, and occupy a Kendra position
and be free from any malefic aspect, the person born
will be very fortunate and be blessed with long life,

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
St. 72-78
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
cf. दक्ष
बहपुष्टिचिंलग्नस्य पत्युः पापैरदर्शनम् ।
शुभकेन्द्रस्थितिस्तनां दृष्टिश्चेति चतुष्टयम् ||
प्रोक्तानेतानतोऽन्यांश्च सकलानपि नारद ।
बाधते सम्यगालोच्य तस्मान्मरणमादिश ||
चन्द्रः संपूर्णगात्रस्तु सौम्यक्षेत्रांशगोऽपि वा ।
सर्वारिष्टनिहन्ता स्यात् विशेषाच्छुभवीक्षितः ।॥ ७२ ॥
$16
Sloka 72. The Moon with his digits full or in the
house or the Navamsa of a benefic planet becomes a
destroyer of all evil; and this all the more when aspect
ed by a benefic p'anet.
NOTES.
The last' पाद (l'ada) of this sloka should real as विशेषाच्छुक
सितः (Viseshatchchukra Veekhithaha). In support of this, we have
the following from बृहत्प्राजापत्य (Brihatprajapathya)
परिपूर्णतनुश्चन्द्रः शुभक्षै शुभमध्यगः ।
अरिष्टं बाधते सर्व शुक्रदृष्टो विशेषतः ॥
cf. माण्डव्य जातक
चन्द्रः संपूर्णतनुः सौम्यर्धगतः स्थितः शुभस्यांशे ।
प्रकरोति रिष्टमङ्ग विशेषतः शुक्रसदृष्टः ॥
Also सारावली
चन्द्रः संपूर्णतमुः शुक्रेण निरीक्षितः सुहजागे ।
रिष्टहराणां श्रेष्ठो बातहरार्णा यथा वस्तिः ॥
जीव भागवसौम्यानामेकः केन्द्रगतो बली ।
पापयुग्रहाष्टहीनश्चेत् सद्यो रिष्टस्य भङ्गकृत् ॥ ७३ ॥
Sloka 73. If Jupiter, Venus or Mercury occupy a
(क्षेत्र) Kendra in strength and be free from the aspect of,
or conjunction with a malefic planet, the भरिए Arishta is
pullified then and there.
verses:
बहपुष्टिचिंलग्नस्य पत्युः पापैरदर्शनम् ।
शुभकेन्द्रस्थितिस्तनां दृष्टिश्चेति चतुष्टयम् ||
प्रोक्तानेतानतोऽन्यांश्च सकलानपि नारद ।
बाधते सम्यगालोच्य तस्मान्मरणमादिश ||

चन्द्रः संपूर्णगात्रस्तु सौम्यक्षेत्रांशगोऽपि वा ।
सर्वारिष्टनिहन्ता स्यात् विशेषाच्छुभवीक्षितः ।॥ ७२ ॥

The Moon with his digits full or in the
house or the Navamsa of a benefic planet becomes a
destroyer of all evil; and this all the more when aspected by a benefic p'anet.
परिपूर्णतनुश्चन्द्रः शुभक्षै शुभमध्यगः ।
अरिष्टं बाधते सर्व शुक्रदृष्टो विशेषतः ॥

चन्द्रः संपूर्णतनुः सौम्यर्धगतः स्थितः शुभस्यांशे ।
प्रकरोति रिष्टमङ्ग विशेषतः शुक्रसदृष्टः ॥

चन्द्रः संपूर्णतमुः शुक्रेण निरीक्षितः सुहजागे ।
रिष्टहराणां श्रेष्ठो बातहरार्णा यथा वस्तिः ॥

जीव भागवसौम्यानामेकः केन्द्रगतो बली ।
पापयुग्रहाष्टहीनश्चेत् सद्यो रिष्टस्य भङ्गकृत् ॥ ७३ ॥

If Jupiter, Venus or Mercury occupy a
(क्षेत्र) Kendra in strength and be free from the aspect of,
or conjunction with a malefic planet, the भरिए Arishta is
pullified then and there.

title: बालकपारिआते
content:
216
बातकपारिआते
Adh. IV
०१. माण्डव्यजातक
बुधभार्गवजीवानामेकतमः केन्द्रमागतो बलवान् ।
यद्यपि क्ररसहायः सचो रिष्टस्य भङ्गाय ||
Also कश्यप
एकोऽपि शार्यशुक्राणां लग्नास्केन्द्रगतो यदि ।
मोरेष्ठ निखिलं हन्ति तिरिरं मास्करो यथा ॥
Also यवन
एकोऽपि यदि केन्द्रस्थः शुक्रो ज्ञो वाऽङ्गिरापतिः ।
नत्रमे वा सुतस्थाने सर्वारिष्टं निवारयेत् ॥
खोचस्यः स्वगृहेऽथवापि सुहदां वर्गे च सौम्यस्य वा
संपूर्णः शुभर्वाक्षितः शशधरो वर्गे स्वकीयेऽपि वा ।
शत्रणामवलोकनादिरहितः पापैरयुक्तेक्षितः
रिष्ट हन्ति सुदुस्तरं दिनमाणः प्रालेयराशिं यथा ॥ ७४
Sloka. 74. The full Moon in its own exaltation,
in its own house, in a varga of friendly planets or of an
auspicious one, or in its own varga, if aspected by a
benefic planet but free from the aspect of inimical ones
and free from all malefic aspects and conjunctions-the
Moon in such a position destroys distress, however
difficult it may be to tide over, just as the Sun destroys
hoar-frost.
NOTES.
This sloka is taken from सारावली (Saravali)
Also cf. जातकादेश
चम्द्रः पूर्णतनुः शुभेष्ठगणगः बोचे स्थमे वा स्थित
मित्रैः स्वाश्रितवर्गपैर्वछ्युतैः सौम्यैश्वः वा वीक्षितः ।
सौम्यैः स्वान्त्यगतैः स्मरारिमृतिगैः केन्वत्रिणेऽथवा
सम्प्राप्तै बिंनिह म्प्यरिष्टमखिलं ध्यान्त यथा भास्करः प्र
पक्षले सिते भवति जन्म यदि क्षपार्या
कृष्णेऽथवाहनि शुभाशुभदृष्टमूर्तिः ।
verses:
बुधभार्गवजीवानामेकतमः केन्द्रमागतो बलवान् ।
यद्यपि क्ररसहायः सचो रिष्टस्य भङ्गाय ||

एकोऽपि शार्यशुक्राणां लग्नास्केन्द्रगतो यदि ।
मोरेष्ठ निखिलं हन्ति तिरिरं मास्करो यथा ॥

एकोऽपि यदि केन्द्रस्थः शुक्रो ज्ञो वाऽङ्गिरापतिः ।
नत्रमे वा सुतस्थाने सर्वारिष्टं निवारयेत् ॥

खोचस्यः स्वगृहेऽथवापि सुहदां वर्गे च सौम्यस्य वा
संपूर्णः शुभर्वाक्षितः शशधरो वर्गे स्वकीयेऽपि वा ।
शत्रणामवलोकनादिरहितः पापैरयुक्तेक्षितः
रिष्ट हन्ति सुदुस्तरं दिनमाणः प्रालेयराशिं यथा ॥ ७४

The full Moon in its own exaltation,
in its own house, in a varga of friendly planets or of an
auspicious one, or in its own varga, if aspected by a
benefic planet but free from the aspect of inimical ones
and free from all malefic aspects and conjunctions-the
Moon in such a position destroys distress, however
difficult it may be to tide over, just as the Sun destroys
hoar-frost.
चम्द्रः पूर्णतनुः शुभेष्ठगणगः बोचे स्थमे वा स्थित
मित्रैः स्वाश्रितवर्गपैर्वछ्युतैः सौम्यैश्वः वा वीक्षितः ।
सौम्यैः स्वान्त्यगतैः स्मरारिमृतिगैः केन्वत्रिणेऽथवा
सम्प्राप्तै बिंनिह म्प्यरिष्टमखिलं ध्यान्त यथा भास्करः प्र
पक्षले सिते भवति जन्म यदि क्षपार्या
कृष्णेऽथवाहनि शुभाशुभदृष्टमूर्तिः ।

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 75-76
बतुर्थोऽध्धायः
217
तं चन्द्रमा रिपुविनाशगतोपि नून-
मापत्सु रक्षाति पितेव शिशुं प्रजातम् ॥ ७५ ॥
Sloka 75. If a birth takes place during the night
in the light half of the month (शुद्धपक्ष-Suklapaksha) or
during the day in the dark half of the month (कृष्णपक्ष-
Krishnapaksha), the Moon at the time though occupying
the 6th or the 8th place from the Lagna, if aspected by
benefic as well as malefic planets protects, the new-born
infant very like a father under all afflictions.
NOTES.
This is from माण्डव्यजातक (Mandavyajathaka). The reading
there is as follows:
पक्षे सिते भवत्ति जन्म यदि क्षपायर्या कृष्णेऽथवाऽइनि शुभाशुभदृश्यमानः ।
तं चन्द्रमा रिपुविनाधागतोऽपि यज्ञादापत्सु रक्षति पितेव शिष्णु न हन्ति ॥
Vide also notes to sloka 35, Supra.
८१. सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
शुक्ले व पश्न यदि रात्रिजम्म चन्द्रोपि षष्ठाष्टमराशियुक्तः ।
शुभेक्षिते सन्निद्ध कृष्णपक्षे दृश्यः सपापैरवति प्रसूतम् ॥
Also जातका भरण
बलहायचे यदि जम्म रात्री कृष्णे दिवाष्ट्रारिगोपि चश्वः ।
क्रमेण दृष्टः शुभपापस्सेंटः पितेम बालं परिपालयेत्सः ॥
Also कश्यपः
19
शुक्लपक्षो क्षपां अम्म लैंग्वे सोग्यनिरीक्षिते ।
• विपरीतं कृष्णपक्षे तथा रिष्टविनाशन. ॥
केन्द्रोपगोऽतिबलवान् स्फुरदंशुमाली
स्वर्लोकराजिसचिवः शमयेदवश्यम् ।
• एको बहूनि दुरितानि सुदुस्तराणि
भक्त्या प्रयुक्त इव शूलधरे प्रणामः ॥ ७६ ॥
Sloka 76. Jupiter in a Kendra position and pos-
sessed of exceeding strength, with clear bright rays, can
28

तं चन्द्रमा रिपुविनाशगतोपि नून-
मापत्सु रक्षाति पितेव शिशुं प्रजातम् ॥

भक्त्या प्रयुक्त इव शूलधरे प्रणामः ॥

Jupiter in a Kendra position and pos-
sessed of exceeding strength, with clear bright rays, can

content:
218
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. IV
singly and to a certainty destroy a multitude of evils
however difficult they may be to tide over like a saluta-
tion humbly and devoutly offered to the trident bearing
Siva.
: NOTES.
This is from सारावली (Saravali). The reading of the first half
there is different, viz.,
सर्वातिशाम्यतिबलः स्फुरदंशुमाली लग्ने स्थितः प्रतमयेत् सुरराजमन्त्री
Jupiter is considered to be the strongest among the benefics in
the matter of warding off all evils and increasing the happiness of
the native. cf. यवन (Yavana)
निःशेषदोषहरणे शुभवर्धने च वीर्य गुरेरधिकमस्त्यखिलअहेम्यः ।
वीर्यपाद‌दछशक्तिभूतौ शशुको चान्द्रं बलं तु निखिलग्रइवीर्यबीअम् ||
Also जातकादेश
लक्षान् दोषाम् हन्ति देवेन्द्रपूज्यः केन्द्र प्राप्तो दैत्यमन्त्री तदर्द्धम् ।
घोर्योपेतः सोमपुत्रस्तदर्थ चान्त्रं वीर्य वीर्यवीर्ज ग्रहाणाम् ॥
लमेशो बलयुक्तश्चेत् त्रिकोणे वा चतुष्टये ।
अरिष्ठयोगजातोऽपि नालो जविति निश्चयः ॥ ७७ ॥
Sluka 77. If the lord of the rising sign be strong
in a Kendra or Trikona position, the child though born
under an evil producing planetary conjunction survives
it of course.
Cf. कश्यप
एक एव हि सझेशः केन्द्रसंस्थो बलान्वितः ।
अरिष्टं निखिलं इन्ति पिनाकी त्रिपुरं यथा ॥
यस्य जन्मनि तुङ्गस्याः खक्षेत्रस्थानमाथिताः ।
चिरायुषं शिशुं जातं कुर्वन्त्यत्र न संशयः ॥ ७८ ॥
Sluka 78. If, at the time of the birth of a child,
there are planets occupying some of their exaltation
signs, others their own Rasis, they will undoubtedly
contribute to the long life of the new-born child.
verses:
सर्वातिशाम्यतिबलः स्फुरदंशुमाली लग्ने स्थितः प्रतमयेत् सुरराजमन्त्री

Jupiter is considered to be the strongest among the benefics in
the matter of warding off all evils and increasing the happiness of
the native. cf. यवन (Yavana)
निःशेषदोषहरणे शुभवर्धने च वीर्य गुरेरधिकमस्त्यखिलअहेम्यः ।
वीर्यपाद‌दछशक्तिभूतौ शशुको चान्द्रं बलं तु निखिलग्रइवीर्यबीअम् ||

लक्षान् दोषाम् हन्ति देवेन्द्रपूज्यः केन्द्र प्राप्तो दैत्यमन्त्री तदर्द्धम् ।
घोर्योपेतः सोमपुत्रस्तदर्थ चान्त्रं वीर्य वीर्यवीर्ज ग्रहाणाम् ॥

लमेशो बलयुक्तश्चेत् त्रिकोणे वा चतुष्टये ।
अरिष्ठयोगजातोऽपि नालो जविति निश्चयः ॥ ७७ ॥

If the lord of the rising sign be strong
in a Kendra or Trikona position, the child though born
under an evil producing planetary conjunction survives
it of course.
एक एव हि सझेशः केन्द्रसंस्थो बलान्वितः ।
अरिष्टं निखिलं इन्ति पिनाकी त्रिपुरं यथा ॥

यस्य जन्मनि तुङ्गस्याः खक्षेत्रस्थानमाथिताः ।
चिरायुषं शिशुं जातं कुर्वन्त्यत्र न संशयः ॥ ७८ ॥

If, at the time of the birth of a child,
there are planets occupying some of their exaltation
signs, others their own Rasis, they will undoubtedly
contribute to the long life of the new-born child.

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 79-80
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
NOTES.
219
This sloka is taken from कश्यप (Kasyapa)
राहुस्त्रिषष्ठलाभ लग्मात्सौम्यैर्निरीक्षितः सद्यः ।
नाशयति सर्वदुरितं मारुत इत्र तुलसङ्घातम् ॥ ७९ ॥
अजवृवकर्किविलने रक्षति राहुर्निरन्तरं बालम् ।
पृथित्रीपतिः प्रसन्नः कृतापराध यथा पुरुषम् ॥ ८० ॥
Sloka 79. Rahu occupying the 3rd, the 6th or the
11th place from the rising sign and aspected by benefic
planets dispels all evil then and there as the wind
sweeps away cotton.
Sloka 80 Rahu, if occupying the Lagna in मेष
(Mesha), वृषभ (Vrishabha) or कटक (Kataka) protects the
child always as a clement sovereign saves an offender
from (the) death (he may have merited).
NOTES.
These are from सारावली (Saravali).
of. सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
छग्नात् तृतीयारिभवे सराहौ पापैर्विमुक्तः शुभदृश्यमानः ।
विनाशयस्याशु समस्तरिष्ट तूले यथा वायुबलस्य वेगात् ||
Also जातकाभरण
मूत्र्तेस्तु राहुस्त्रिषडायवती रिष्टं हरस्येव शुभैः प्रदृष्टः ॥
दृषा जककर्काखबविलग्नसंस्थो राहु मेवेद्रिष्टविनाशकत्र्ता ॥
Also जातकादेश
सस्थानगाः सर्वनभश्ररेन्द्रा निम्त्यरिष्ट स्वकृतं क्षणेन ।
सौम्येक्षितः षट्‌त्रिभवेषु राहुः कुक्षीरमेषोक्षविलग्नगो वा ॥
Also शानक.
राहुस्तृतीयषष्ठे वा काम था शुभसंयुतः ।
तद्रष्टो वा तथा रिष्टं सर्व शमयति ध्रुवम् ।।
Also गुणाकर
राहुविलग्नात् त्रिपडायवर्ती दृष्टः शुभै रिष्टहरः प्रविष्टः ॥

नाशयति सर्वदुरितं मारुत इत्र तुलसङ्घातम् ॥ ७९ ॥

अजवृवकर्किविलने रक्षति राहुर्निरन्तरं बालम् ।
पृथित्रीपतिः प्रसन्नः कृतापराध यथा पुरुषम् ॥ ८० ॥

11th place from the rising sign and aspected by benefic
planets dispels all evil then and there as the wind
sweeps away cotton.

(Mesha), वृषभ (Vrishabha) or कटक (Kataka) protects the
child always as a clement sovereign saves an offender
from (the) death (he may have merited).

विनाशयस्याशु समस्तरिष्ट तूले यथा वायुबलस्य वेगात् ||

मूत्र्तेस्तु राहुस्त्रिषडायवती रिष्टं हरस्येव शुभैः प्रदृष्टः ॥

सस्थानगाः सर्वनभश्ररेन्द्रा निम्त्यरिष्ट स्वकृतं क्षणेन ।

तद्रष्टो वा तथा रिष्टं सर्व शमयति ध्रुवम् ।।

राहुविलग्नात् त्रिपडायवर्ती दृष्टः शुभै रिष्टहरः प्रविष्टः ॥

title: कालप्रकाशिका
content:
220
Also कालप्रकाशिका
बातकपारिश्यते
सुतजम्भोद्भवान्दोषान्हन्ति ध्वान्तं यथा रविः ।
राहुत्रिषष्ठलामस्थः शुभग्रहनिरीक्षितः ॥
कृषककोडिगो वापि सर्वारिष्टविनाशकृत् ॥
Adh. IV
निशाकरः शोभनवर्गयुक्तः शुभेक्षितः पूरितदीप्तिजालः ।
जातस्य निःशेषमरिष्टमाशु निहन्ति यद्वदू गरले गरुत्मान् ॥ ८१ ॥
Sloka 81. The Moon occupying the varga of a
benefic planet and aspected by benefic planets and shin-
ning with full radiance, averts completely all ills that
threaten the new-born child as the Garuda removes
poison (threatening to cause death).
The reading of this sloka is slightly different in सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
(Sarwartha Chintamani) viz.,
निशाकरे शोमनखेचरांशे शुभेक्षिते पूरितदीप्तिजालः ।
आतस्य निःशेषमारष्टमानु यथा विर्ष निम्नति वैनतेयः ॥
चन्द्राधिष्ठितराशीशे लग्नस्ये शुभवीक्षिते ।
भृगुणा वीक्षितश्चन्द्रे खोप्चे रिष्टं हरेत्तदा ॥ ८२ ॥
Sloka 82. When the lord of the sign in which the
Moon is, occupies the Lagna and is aspected by benefic
planets, the evil threatening the child is averted. This
is the case also when the Moon is in its exaltation and
aspected by Venus.
लग्नाधिपोऽतिबलवानशुभैरदृष्टः
केन्द्रस्थितः शुभस्वंगरवलोक्यमानः ।
मृत्युं विहाय विदधाति स दीर्घमायुः
सार्धं गुणैबहुभिरूार्जतराजलक्ष्म्या ॥ ८३ ॥
॥ इत्यरिष्टभङ्गः ॥
Sloka 83. The lord of the rising sign: when pos-
sessed of great strength and unaspected by malefic
verses:
सुतजम्भोद्भवान्दोषान्हन्ति ध्वान्तं यथा रविः ।
राहुत्रिषष्ठलामस्थः शुभग्रहनिरीक्षितः ॥
कृषककोडिगो वापि सर्वारिष्टविनाशकृत् ॥

निशाकरः शोभनवर्गयुक्तः शुभेक्षितः पूरितदीप्तिजालः ।
जातस्य निःशेषमरिष्टमाशु निहन्ति यद्वदू गरले गरुत्मान् ॥

The Moon occupying the varga of a
benefic planet and aspected by benefic planets and shin-
ning with full radiance, averts completely all ills that
threaten the new-born child as the Garuda removes
poison (threatening to cause death).
निशाकरे शोमनखेचरांशे शुभेक्षिते पूरितदीप्तिजालः ।
आतस्य निःशेषमारष्टमानु यथा विर्ष निम्नति वैनतेयः ॥

चन्द्राधिष्ठितराशीशे लग्नस्ये शुभवीक्षिते ।
भृगुणा वीक्षितश्चन्द्रे खोप्चे रिष्टं हरेत्तदा ॥

When the lord of the sign in which the
Moon is, occupies the Lagna and is aspected by benefic
planets, the evil threatening the child is averted. This
is the case also when the Moon is in its exaltation and
aspected by Venus.
लग्नाधिपोऽतिबलवानशुभैरदृष्टः
केन्द्रस्थितः शुभस्वंगरवलोक्यमानः ।
मृत्युं विहाय विदधाति स दीर्घमायुः
सार्धं गुणैबहुभिरूार्जतराजलक्ष्म्या ॥

The lord of the rising sign: when pos-
sessed of great strength and unaspected by malefic

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 84
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
221
planets but aspected by benefic ones and occupying a
Kendra position wards off death and secures to the child
long life graced with the strong virtues of a vigorous
sovereignty.
NOTES
This sloka is from माण्डव्यजातक (Mandavyajathaka)
बलहीने विलमेश जीवे केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे ।
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये पापे मध्यमायुरुदाहृतम् ।। ८४ ।।
द्वात्रिंशद्वत्सरादुपारी सप्ततिपर्यन्तं मध्यमायुर्योगः ।।
Sioku 84. When the lord of the rising sign is
without strength and Jupiter occupies a Kendra or Tri
kona position, and the 6th, the 8th or the 12th place
from the Lagna is occupied by a malefic planet, the
person born is declared to possess the mean period of
life.
Mean period of life ranges from the 33rd year upto
the 70th year (both inclusive):
NOTES.
A few of the Madhyamayur (मध्यमायुम्) yogas culled from
other works are given below for the reader's information as the
same appears to have been either lost or omitted from this work.
सौम्यैः पापांशकर्कस्यैः पापैः केन्द्रगतैस्तथा ।
मध्यमायुरयं योगः सौम्यैः केन्द्रविवर्जितैः ॥
चतुरस्रगताः पापा लग्नात्कुर्वन्ति मध्यमायुष्यम् ।
चन्द्रात्तथैव दिवसैः सौम्यैरनवीक्षिता न शुभयुक्ताः ॥
सुतदशमे सोम्यैः स्यान्निधने व्यन्विते व्यये चन्द्रे ।
गुरुशुक्रा वेकगतौ जातस्तत्रैव मध्यायुः ॥
चन्द्रे कुजलें तनुगे प्रदृष्टे क्रूरग्रहैः शोभनखेचरेन्द्रैः ।
केन्द्राइहिष्ठैर्निधनं प्रयाति वर्षेस्त्रयस्त्रिशसमान कैस्तु ॥
verses:
बलहीने विलमेश जीवे केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे ।
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये पापे मध्यमायुरुदाहृतम् ।। ८४ ।।
द्वात्रिंशद्वत्सरादुपारी सप्ततिपर्यन्तं मध्यमायुर्योगः ।।

When the lord of the rising sign is
without strength and Jupiter occupies a Kendra or Tri
kona position, and the 6th, the 8th or the 12th place
from the Lagna is occupied by a malefic planet, the
person born is declared to possess the mean period of
life.
सौम्यैः पापांशकर्कस्यैः पापैः केन्द्रगतैस्तथा ।
मध्यमायुरयं योगः सौम्यैः केन्द्रविवर्जितैः ॥
चतुरस्रगताः पापा लग्नात्कुर्वन्ति मध्यमायुष्यम् ।
चन्द्रात्तथैव दिवसैः सौम्यैरनवीक्षिता न शुभयुक्ताः ॥
सुतदशमे सोम्यैः स्यान्निधने व्यन्विते व्यये चन्द्रे ।
गुरुशुक्रा वेकगतौ जातस्तत्रैव मध्यायुः ॥
चन्द्रे कुजलें तनुगे प्रदृष्टे क्रूरग्रहैः शोभनखेचरेन्द्रैः ।
केन्द्राइहिष्ठैर्निधनं प्रयाति वर्षेस्त्रयस्त्रिशसमान कैस्तु ॥

content:
999
बातकपारिजात
Adh. IV
पापग्रहे रन्ध्रपतौ सचन्द्रे केन्द्रस्थिते वा यदि वा त्रिकोणे ।
निरीक्षिते पापखगैनमस्थैर्जातस्त्रयत्रिशदुपैति वर्षम् ॥
लग्ने शनौ रात्रिकरेण युक्तै भौमे घटस्ये सुरसंख्यवर्षेः ॥
गुरुशुक्रौ च केन्द्रस्थौ लग्नेशे पापसंयुते ।
आपोक्लिमस्ये सन्ध्यायां जातस्यायू रवित्रयम् ॥
पापमध्यगते सूर्ये लग्मस्थे शत्रुवेश्मनि ।
जातश्च रोगपीडार्त्तः परनायू रवित्रयम् ॥
॥ भौमेन्दू लग्नगौ यस्य केन्द्राष्टमविवर्जितः ।
मौम्यैगुलिकवेलायां जातस्यायू रवित्रयम् ।।
क्रूरान्तरे लग्नगते तदीशे युग्मस्थिते देवगुरौ रिपुल्ये ::
जानस्तु मृत्यु मृनित्रन्हित्रषैः प्रयाति शास्त्रज्ञपरैः प्रदिष्टम् ।
अष्टमपतौ विलग्ने स्थिरराशौ जायते नरो यत्तु ।
चत्वारिंश खैर्भरणं रन्धे न शुभयुक्ते ॥
लग्नेश्वरे रन्ध्रगते सपापे केन्द्राद्धहिष्ठे यदि सौम्यखेटे ।
चत्वारिंशद्वत्सरे मृत्युमेति जातः पुत्रो नान्यथा शास्त्रमेतत् ॥
सभूमिजे रन्ध्रपतौ विलग्ने राशौ स्थिरे वा यदि वा घराजे ।
रिःफेऽष्टमे मृत्युमुपैति जातस्त्वन्दैर्द्धिचत्वारिसमानकैर्वा ॥
केन्द्रे गुरौ कर्मणि सूर्यपुत्रे लग्ने चरे वेदयुगैः समानैः ॥
अष्टमाधिपतौ केन्द्रे भौमे छमं समाश्रिते ।
अर्कार्कजौ त्रिषष्ठस्यौ जीवेद्रुद्र चतुष्टयम् ॥
श्वोच्चे विलग्ने क्षितिनन्दने च ओवेऽस्तगे क्रमणि सूर्यपुत्रे ।
जातो धनाढ्यो बहुशाखवेत्ता बेदाब्धिश्चैर्निधनं प्रयाति ।।
जन्माधिपे रन्ध्रगते सपापे पापान्विते लग्नपतौ रिपुस्थे ।
बलान्विते वा शुभद्धग्विमुक्ते पश्चाब्धिवर्षेर्निधनं प्रयाति ।।
मेषे शशाङ्के तनुगे सुपूणें सौम्येक्षिते भूपतिरत्र जातः ।
पापग्रहाणां च इशा विहीने नागान्धिषैर्निधनं प्रयाति ॥
4
verses:
पापग्रहे रन्ध्रपतौ सचन्द्रे केन्द्रस्थिते वा यदि वा त्रिकोणे ।
निरीक्षिते पापखगैनमस्थैर्जातस्त्रयत्रिशदुपैति वर्षम् ॥

If the lord of the 8th is with the Moon in a Kendra or Trikona, or if aspected by malefics, the native lives thirty-three years. If Saturn is in the Lagna with the Moon, or Mars is in the 7th, the longevity is counted in hundreds of years.
लग्ने शनौ रात्रिकरेण युक्तै भौमे घटस्ये सुरसंख्यवर्षेः ॥

गुरुशुक्रौ च केन्द्रस्थौ लग्नेशे पापसंयुते ।
आपोक्लिमस्ये सन्ध्यायां जातस्यायू रवित्रयम् ॥

If Jupiter and Venus are in Kendras, and the Lagna lord is associated with malefics, or if the native is born in Apoklima during twilight, the longevity is three years.
पापमध्यगते सूर्ये लग्मस्थे शत्रुवेश्मनि ।
जातश्च रोगपीडार्त्तः परनायू रवित्रयम् ॥

If the Sun is in the middle of malefics, or in the 7th house (enemy's house), the native will be afflicted by diseases and live for three years.
भौमेन्दू लग्नगौ यस्य केन्द्राष्टमविवर्जितः ।
मौम्यैगुलिकवेलायां जातस्यायू रवित्रयम् ।।

If Mars and the Moon are in the Lagna, unafflicted by Kendras and Ashtamas, or if born during the periods of Mars and Mercury, the longevity is three years.
क्रूरान्तरे लग्नगते तदीशे युग्मस्थिते देवगुरौ रिपुल्ये ::
जानस्तु मृत्यु मृनित्रन्हित्रषैः प्रयाति शास्त्रज्ञपरैः प्रदिष्टम् ।

If the Lagna lord is with malefics, or in Gemini or Virgo, or if Jupiter is in the 6th house, the native dies in thirty-three years, as stated by learned scholars.
अष्टमपतौ विलग्ने स्थिरराशौ जायते नरो यत्तु ।
चत्वारिंश खैर्भरणं रन्धे न शुभयुक्ते ॥

If the lord of the 8th is in the Lagna in a fixed sign, and the 8th house is not associated with benefics, the native lives forty years.
लग्नेश्वरे रन्ध्रगते सपापे केन्द्राद्धहिष्ठे यदि सौम्यखेटे ।
चत्वारिंशद्वत्सरे मृत्युमेति जातः पुत्रो नान्यथा शास्त्रमेतत् ॥

If the Lagna lord is in the 8th house with malefics, and aspected by benefics, the native dies at forty years of age. This is from the scriptures.
सभूमिजे रन्ध्रपतौ विलग्ने राशौ स्थिरे वा यदि वा घराजे ।
रिःफेऽष्टमे मृत्युमुपैति जातस्त्वन्दैर्द्धिचत्वारिसमानकैर्वा ॥

If Mars is in the 8th house, or if the Lagna lord is in the Lagna in a fixed sign or a movable sign, the native dies at forty-four years of age.
केन्द्रे गुरौ कर्मणि सूर्यपुत्रे लग्ने चरे वेदयुगैः समानैः ॥

If Jupiter is in a Kendra, the Sun in the 10th house, and the Lagna lord in a movable sign, the longevity is equal to four Yugas.
अष्टमाधिपतौ केन्द्रे भौमे छमं समाश्रिते ।
अर्कार्कजौ त्रिषष्ठस्यौ जीवेद्रुद्र चतुष्टयम् ॥

If the lord of the 8th is in a Kendra, Mars is in the 8th house, and the Sun and Saturn are in the 3rd and 6th houses respectively, the native lives for four Rudras (which is a very long life).
श्वोच्चे विलग्ने क्षितिनन्दने च ओवेऽस्तगे क्रमणि सूर्यपुत्रे ।
जातो धनाढ्यो बहुशाखवेत्ता बेदाब्धिश्चैर्निधनं प्रयाति ।।

If the Lagna lord is exalted, Mars is in the 8th house, the Sun is in the 10th house, and the Sun is in the 7th house, the native becomes wealthy and knowledgeable, and dies at the age of eighty-eight.
जन्माधिपे रन्ध्रगते सपापे पापान्विते लग्नपतौ रिपुस्थे ।
बलान्विते वा शुभद्धग्विमुक्ते पश्चाब्धिवर्षेर्निधनं प्रयाति ।।

If the Lagna lord is in the 8th house with malefics, and the Lagna lord is in the 6th house, the native dies at the age of fifty, if strong or aspected by benefics.
मेषे शशाङ्के तनुगे सुपूणें सौम्येक्षिते भूपतिरत्र जातः ।
पापग्रहाणां च इशा विहीने नागान्धिषैर्निधनं प्रयाति ॥

If the Moon is in Aries in the Lagna, fully aspected by benefics, and without malefic aspects, the native becomes a king and lives for a very long time (implied by 'Nagandhishe').

content:
224
आातकपारिजाते
Adh. IV
सरन्ध्रगे देवगुरौ विलग्ने कुम्भे सपापे यदि केन्द्रराशौ ।
सर्वज्ञानां पुण्यवान् शास्त्रवेत्ता जातस्तु षष्ठया निधनं प्रयाति ॥
:
केन्द्रे सपापे तनुपे व्ययस्थे लग्नेश्वरे रन्ध्रगते हि वन्हौ ॥
लोकान्तरं प्रापयति स्म जातं कुशीलवृत्तं कुलपांसनं तम् ॥
होराजन्माधिपती केन्द्रगतौ मृत्युनाथसंयुक्तौ ।
लग्नचतुष्थ्यहीने देवगुरी पञ्चषष्ठिवर्षान्तम् ॥
चन्द्रे विलग्ने स्वगृहं प्रयाते नीचे शनौ भास्करे सझमे च ।
अस्मिन् जातो मानुषो ज्ञानिमुख्यो जीवेत् षष्ठिः पश्चभिः संप्रयुक्तः ॥
होराजन्माधिकायौ निधनमुपगतौ मृत्युनाथे च केन्द्रे
योगे जातो नरोऽस्मिन् जनयति न परं कीर्तिवित्तान्वितं च ।
षष्ठयां ष‌ड्भिर्युतायां निधनमभिहितं नन्दकोक्ते तदिवं
वर्षे त्रिंशेऽथवा स्यास्त्वखिलमिति खगैर्जायते पार्थिवेन्द्रः ॥
मीषे विलाने बुधसूर्ययुक्ते मीने शनौ द्वादशे शीतरश्मौ ।
जातो योगे चार्थवान् मृत्युभाक च जीवेत् षष्ठचा षट्सहायो मनुष्यः ।।
नक्षत्रनाथसहितः सविता नभस्थः सौरिर्विलानसहितो हिबुके सुरेज्यः ।
if
अस्मिन्योगे जायमानो मनुष्यः क्षोणीपतिर्नेधनमष्टषष्ठचा ।।
अर्ककुजमन्दयुक्ते बलवर्जिते देवराट्पूज्ये ।
बन्द्रो व्यये सुते वा सप्ततिवर्षाणि जीवति प्रायः ॥
नीचे मन्दे केन्द्रगे वा त्रिकोणे सौम्ये केन्द्रे भास्करे वा सतोम्ये ।
योगे जातः पण्डितो धर्मशीलो ज्ञानी प्राज्ञः सप्ततेर्वत्सराणाम् ॥
प्रबले केन्द्रगे सौम्ये निधने सौम्य र्जिते ।
लग्नाधिपेन दृष्टश्चेत्पापैर्जीवति सप्ततिम् ॥
पामध्ये धरासूनौ नीचे मन्देऽस्तगे रखौ ।
अस्मिन आतो मनुष्यस्तु सप्तत्यां निधनं व्रजेत् ।।
verses:
सरन्ध्रगे देवगुरौ विलग्ने कुम्भे सपापे यदि केन्द्रराशौ ।
सर्वज्ञानां पुण्यवान् शास्त्रवेत्ता जातस्तु षष्ठया निधनं प्रयाति ॥

केन्द्रे सपापे तनुपे व्ययस्थे लग्नेश्वरे रन्ध्रगते हि वन्हौ ॥
लोकान्तरं प्रापयति स्म जातं कुशीलवृत्तं कुलपांसनं तम् ॥

If the lord of the Ascendant is in the 8th house, and there is a malefic in a Kendra, and the lord of the Ascendant is in the 12th house, the native goes to another world, and is of bad conduct and a disgrace to his family.

होराजन्माधिपती केन्द्रगतौ मृत्युनाथसंयुक्तौ ।
लग्नचतुष्थ्यहीने देवगुरी पञ्चषष्ठिवर्षान्तम् ॥

If the lords of the Ascendant and the 8th house are in Kendra, and Jupiter is devoid of the 4th house (meaning the 4th house is afflicted or Jupiter is weak), the native lives for 50 or 60 years.

चन्द्रे विलग्ने स्वगृहं प्रयाते नीचे शनौ भास्करे सझमे च ।
अस्मिन् जातो मानुषो ज्ञानिमुख्यो जीवेत् षष्ठिः पश्चभिः संप्रयुक्तः ॥

If the Moon is in the Ascendant in its own house (Cancer), Saturn is debilitated, and the Sun is in the 7th house, the native born in this combination will be knowledgeable and live for 60 years.

होराजन्माधिकायौ निधनमुपगतौ मृत्युनाथे च केन्द्रे
योगे जातो नरोऽस्मिन् जनयति न परं कीर्तिवित्तान्वितं च ।

If the lords of the Ascendant and the 8th house are in the 8th house, and the lord of the 8th house is in Kendra, the native born in this yoga will not attain fame or wealth.

षष्ठयां ष‌ड्भिर्युतायां निधनमभिहितं नन्दकोक्ते तदिवं
वर्षे त्रिंशेऽथवा स्यास्त्वखिलमिति खगैर्जायते पार्थिवेन्द्रः ॥

If the 6th house is associated with the lord of the 6th house, it is said to be death, as stated by Nandaka. Or, if the native lives for 30 years, he becomes a king of kings.

मीषे विलाने बुधसूर्ययुक्ते मीने शनौ द्वादशे शीतरश्मौ ।
जातो योगे चार्थवान् मृत्युभाक च जीवेत् षष्ठचा षट्सहायो मनुष्यः ।।

If Mercury and the Sun are in Aries, Saturn is in Pisces, and the Moon is in the 12th house, the native born in this yoga is wealthy, but dies in the 6th year (or 6th house).

नक्षत्रनाथसहितः सविता नभस्थः सौरिर्विलानसहितो हिबुके सुरेज्यः ।
if
अस्मिन्योगे जायमानो मनुष्यः क्षोणीपतिर्नेधनमष्टषष्ठचा ।।

If the Sun is in the 10th house with the lord of the Nakshatra, Saturn is with the lord of the Ascendant, and Jupiter is in the 7th house, the native born in this yoga becomes a king and dies in the 8th or 6th house (meaning the 8th or 6th sign from the Ascendant).

अर्ककुजमन्दयुक्ते बलवर्जिते देवराट्पूज्ये ।
बन्द्रो व्यये सुते वा सप्ततिवर्षाणि जीवति प्रायः ॥

If the Sun, Mars, and Saturn are conjunct and weak, and Jupiter is worshipped by the king of gods (Indra), the Moon in the 12th house, or in the 5th house, the native lives for about 70 years.

नीचे मन्दे केन्द्रगे वा त्रिकोणे सौम्ये केन्द्रे भास्करे वा सतोम्ये ।
योगे जातः पण्डितो धर्मशीलो ज्ञानी प्राज्ञः सप्ततेर्वत्सराणाम् ॥

If debilitated Saturn is in Kendra or Trikona, or if a benefic is in Kendra, or if the Sun is in Kendra with a benefic, the native born in this yoga is learned, virtuous, wise, and intelligent, and lives for 70 years.

प्रबले केन्द्रगे सौम्ये निधने सौम्य र्जिते ।
लग्नाधिपेन दृष्टश्चेत्पापैर्जीवति सप्ततिम् ॥

If a strong benefic is in Kendra, and a benefic is in the 8th house, and if aspected by the lord of the Ascendant, the native lives for 70 years.

पामध्ये धरासूनौ नीचे मन्देऽस्तगे रखौ ।
अस्मिन आतो मनुष्यस्तु सप्तत्यां निधनं व्रजेत् ।।

If Mars is in the 5th house, debilitated Saturn is in conjunction with the Sun (or combust), the native born in this yoga dies at the age of 70.

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 85-89
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
चतुष्टये शुभैर्युक्ते लग्नेशे शुभसंयुते ।
गुरुणा दृष्टिसंयोगे पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ८५ ॥
225
Sloka 85. When the Kendra is occupied by benefic
planets and the lord of the Lagna is in conjunction with
them or is aspected by Jupiter, the astrologer must
pronounce the period of life of the native to be full.
केन्द्रान्विते विलग्नेशे गुरुशुक्रसमन्विते ।
ताभ्यां निरीक्षिते वाऽपि पूर्ण माधुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ८६ ॥
Sloka 86. When the lord of the rising sign occu-
pies a Kendra being in conjunction with or aspected by
Jupiter and Venus, the person born must be declared to
possess long life.
उच्चान्वितैस्त्रिभिः खेटैर्लग्ने रन्धेशसंयुते ।
रन्ध्र पापविहीने च दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ८७ ॥
Sloka 87. When 3 planets are in their exaltation
signs and the rising sign is occupied by the lord of the
8th house, and that again is without a malefic planet,
the person born will have long life.
रन्ध्रस्थितैस्त्रिभिः खेदैः स्वोच्चमित्रस्वत्रर्गगैः ।
लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ८८ ॥
Sloka 88. When 3 planets are in the 8th house
from the Lagna, occupying respectively an exaltation
sign, a friend's house and one's own Varga and when
the Lagna is possessed of strength, the astrologer is to
declare the person born to be long-lived.
खोच्चस्थितेन केनापि खेचरेण समन्वितः ।
शनिर्वा रन्ध्रनाथो वा दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ८९ ॥
29
verses:
चतुष्टये शुभैर्युक्ते लग्नेशे शुभसंयुते ।
गुरुणा दृष्टिसंयोगे पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

When the Kendra is occupied by benefic
planets and the lord of the Lagna is in conjunction with
them or is aspected by Jupiter, the astrologer must
pronounce the period of life of the native to be full.
केन्द्रान्विते विलग्नेशे गुरुशुक्रसमन्विते ।
ताभ्यां निरीक्षिते वाऽपि पूर्ण माधुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

When the lord of the rising sign occu-
pies a Kendra being in conjunction with or aspected by
Jupiter and Venus, the person born must be declared to
possess long life.
उच्चान्वितैस्त्रिभिः खेटैर्लग्ने रन्धेशसंयुते ।
रन्ध्र पापविहीने च दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

When 3 planets are in their exaltation
signs and the rising sign is occupied by the lord of the
8th house, and that again is without a malefic planet,
the person born will have long life.
रन्ध्रस्थितैस्त्रिभिः खेदैः स्वोच्चमित्रस्वत्रर्गगैः ।
लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

When 3 planets are in the 8th house
from the Lagna, occupying respectively an exaltation
sign, a friend's house and one's own Varga and when
the Lagna is possessed of strength, the astrologer is to
declare the person born to be long-lived.
खोच्चस्थितेन केनापि खेचरेण समन्वितः ।
शनिर्वा रन्ध्रनाथो वा दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥

content:
226
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. IV
Sloka 89. If Saturn or the lord of the 8th house
from the Lagna be in conjunction with any planet in
his exaltation sign, the life of the person bora must be
declared to be long.
त्रिषडायगताः पापाः शुभाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणगाः ।
लग्नेशो बलसंयुक्तः पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ९० ॥
Sloka 90. If malefic planets occupy the 3rd,
the 6th, and the 11th places from the Lagna and the benefic
planets be in Kendra or Trikona positions and if the
lord of the Lagna possesses strength, the person born
will have long life.
षट्सप्तरन्ध्रभावेषु शुभेषु सहितेषु च ।
त्रिषडायेषु पापेषु दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ९१ ॥
Sloka 91. When benefic planets are together in
the 6th, the 7th or the 8th Bhava from the Lagna and
when the malefic ones are in the 3rd, the 6th and the
11th places, the person born will live long.
रिःफशत्रुगताः पापा लयेशो यदि केन्द्रगः।
रन्ध्रस्थानगताः पापाः कर्मेशः स्वोचराशिगः ।
योगद्वयेऽपि दीर्घायुरुपैति बहुसंमतम् ॥ ९२ ॥
Sloka 92. Malefic planets are in the 12th and the
6th houses from the Lagna, and the lord of the rising
sign occupies a Kendra: this is yoga (1), Malefic
planets are in the 8th house from the Lagna; the lord of
the 10th house is in his exaltation sign: this is yoga (2).
The majority of astrologers agree that in both these
yogas, the person born attains long life.
verses:
If Saturn or the lord of the 8th house
from the Lagna be in conjunction with any planet in
his exaltation sign, the life of the person bora must be
declared to be long.

त्रिषडायगताः पापाः शुभाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणगाः ।
लग्नेशो बलसंयुक्तः पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ९० ॥

If malefic planets occupy the 3rd,
the 6th, and the 11th places from the Lagna and the benefic
planets be in Kendra or Trikona positions and if the
lord of the Lagna possesses strength, the person born
will have long life.

षट्सप्तरन्ध्रभावेषु शुभेषु सहितेषु च ।
त्रिषडायेषु पापेषु दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥ ९१ ॥

When benefic planets are together in
the 6th, the 7th or the 8th Bhava from the Lagna and
when the malefic ones are in the 3rd, the 6th and the
11th places, the person born will live long.

रिःफशत्रुगताः पापा लयेशो यदि केन्द्रगः।
रन्ध्रस्थानगताः पापाः कर्मेशः स्वोचराशिगः ।
योगद्वयेऽपि दीर्घायुरुपैति बहुसंमतम् ॥ ९२ ॥

Malefic planets are in the 12th and the
6th houses from the Lagna, and the lord of the rising
sign occupies a Kendra: this is yoga (1). Malefic
planets are in the 8th house from the Lagna; the lord of
the 10th house is in his exaltation sign: this is yoga (2).
The majority of astrologers agree that in both these
yogas, the person born attains long life.

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
81. 93-96
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
227
रन्ध्रेशस्थगृहाधीशो यस्मिन् राशौ व्यवस्थितः ।
तदीशो लग्ननाथश्च केन्द्रगो यदि तादृशम् ॥ ९३ ॥
Sloka 93. Find the Rasi in which is the lord o
the sign occupied by the lord of the 8th house from
the Lagna. If the lord of the Rasi so found and the
lord of the Lagna occupy a Kendra, the life of the
person born will be such as has been described.
द्विस्वभावं गते लने तदर्शि केन्द्रगेऽपि वा ।
स्वोच्चमूलत्रिकोणे वा चिरं जीवति भाग्यवान् ॥ ९४ ॥
Sloka 94. When the Lagna is a dual sign and
when its lord occupies a Kendra, its own, its exaltation
or Moola-trikona fsign, the person born will live long
and be fortunate.
द्विस्वभावं गते लग्ने लग्नेशात् केन्द्रगौ यदि ।
द्वौ पापौ यस्य जनने तस्यायुर्दीर्घमादिशेत् ॥ ९५ ॥
Sloka 95. When the Lagna is a dual sign, and two
malefic planets occupy Kendra positions in respect to
the lord of the Lagna, the person born may be pro-
nounced to have long life.
चरांशकस्था रविमन्दभौमाः स्थिरांशकस्थौ गुरुदानवेज्यौ ।
शेषाश्च युग्मांशगता यदि स्यात् तदा समुद्भूतनरः शतायुः ॥ ९६ ॥
Sloka 96. If the Sun, Saturn and Mars be in
Navamsas owned by moveable signs, Jupiter and Venus
be in those owned by immoveable signs, and the remain-
ing planets in Navamsas owned by dual signs, the person
born will live 100 years.
।। सप्तत्युपरिशतान्तं पूर्णमायुर्योगः ।।
From the 71st year to the 100th year (both inclu
sive) is called पूर्णायुस् Poornayus.
verses:
रन्ध्रेशस्थगृहाधीशो यस्मिन् राशौ व्यवस्थितः ।
तदीशो लग्ननाथश्च केन्द्रगो यदि तादृशम् ॥

Find the Rasi in which is the lord o
the sign occupied by the lord of the 8th house from
the Lagna. If the lord of the Rasi so found and the
lord of the Lagna occupy a Kendra, the life of the
person born will be such as has been described.

द्विस्वभावं गते लने तदर्शि केन्द्रगेऽपि वा ।
स्वोच्चमूलत्रिकोणे वा चिरं जीवति भाग्यवान् ॥

When the Lagna is a dual sign and
when its lord occupies a Kendra, its own, its exaltation
or Moola-trikona fsign, the person born will live long
and be fortunate.

द्विस्वभावं गते लग्ने लग्नेशात् केन्द्रगौ यदि ।
द्वौ पापौ यस्य जनने तस्यायुर्दीर्घमादिशेत् ॥

When the Lagna is a dual sign, and two
malefic planets occupy Kendra positions in respect to
the lord of the Lagna, the person born may be pro-
nounced to have long life.

चरांशकस्था रविमन्दभौमाः स्थिरांशकस्थौ गुरुदानवेज्यौ ।
शेषाश्च युग्मांशगता यदि स्यात् तदा समुद्भूतनरः शतायुः ॥

If the Sun, Saturn and Mars be in
Navamsas owned by moveable signs, Jupiter and Venus
be in those owned by immoveable signs, and the remain-
ing planets in Navamsas owned by dual signs, the person
born will live 100 years.

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 97-99
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
929
Sloka 97. If the Sun, Jupiter and Mars be in the
9th house from the Lagna, and if the Navamsa they
occupy be owned by the 9th house from the Lagna and
also by Saturn (i.e., if Makara or Kumbha be the 9th
place and the Navamsa occupied by the 3 planets be
the वर्गोत्तमांश (Vargoththamamsa) and if the Moon
occupy the Lagna in strength, the person born will
be blessed with a happy life ending with the end of
the world.
The reading of this sloka is slightly different in होराप्रकाश
(Horaprakasa) viz.,
मांशकस्था रविभौमजीवा धर्माश्रिताः कर्मयुता बलाच्याः ।
राश्यावसाने हिमगौ विलने युगान्तमायुः श्रियमादधाति ॥
एकांशभागौ गुरुसूर्यपुत्रौ धर्मस्थितौ वा यदि कर्मसंस्थौ ।
अकोंदये सौम्यनिरीक्ष्यमाणौ सुनिर्भवेदत्रभवश्चिरायुः ॥ ९८ ॥
Sloka 98. If Saturn and Jupiter being in the 9th
or the 10th house from the Lagna occupy one and the
same Navamsa and be aspected by benefic planets, and
if the Sun be in the Lagna, the person born in this Yoga
will be an inspired saint endowed with long life.
गुरुशाशसहिते कुलीरलने शशितनये भृगुजे च केन्द्रयाते ।
* मवरिपुसहजोपगैश्च शेषैरमितमिहायुरनुक्रमाद्विना स्यात् ।।९९।।
Sloka 99. When Cancer is the rising sign and
Jupiter and the Moon occupy it, and Venus and Mer-
cury are in Kendra positions and the remaining planets
happen to be in the 11th, the 6th and the 3rd bhavas
from the Lagna, the person born will have an immensely
long life without reference to the order of reckoning
| treated of in the आयुर्वाय (Ayurdhaya) chapters.
verses:
Sloka 97. If the Sun, Jupiter and Mars be in the
9th house from the Lagna, and if the Navamsa they
occupy be owned by the 9th house from the Lagna and
also by Saturn (i.e., if Makara or Kumbha be the 9th
place and the Navamsa occupied by the 3 planets be
the वर्गोत्तमांश (Vargoththamamsa) and if the Moon
occupy the Lagna in strength, the person born will
be blessed with a happy life ending with the end of
the world.

मांशकस्था रविभौमजीवा धर्माश्रिताः कर्मयुता बलाच्याः ।
राश्यावसाने हिमगौ विलने युगान्तमायुः श्रियमादधाति ॥

एकांशभागौ गुरुसूर्यपुत्रौ धर्मस्थितौ वा यदि कर्मसंस्थौ ।
अकोंदये सौम्यनिरीक्ष्यमाणौ सुनिर्भवेदत्रभवश्चिरायुः ॥ ९८ ॥

Sloka 98. If Saturn and Jupiter being in the 9th
or the 10th house from the Lagna occupy one and the
same Navamsa and be aspected by benefic planets, and
if the Sun be in the Lagna, the person born in this Yoga
will be an inspired saint endowed with long life.

गुरुशाशसहिते कुलीरलने शशितनये भृगुजे च केन्द्रयाते ।
* मवरिपुसहजोपगैश्च शेषैरमितमिहायुरनुक्रमाद्विना स्यात् ।।९९।।

Sloka 99. When Cancer is the rising sign and
Jupiter and the Moon occupy it, and Venus and Mer-
cury are in Kendra positions and the remaining planets
happen to be in the 11th, the 6th and the 3rd bhavas
from the Lagna, the person born will have an immensely
long life without reference to the order of reckoning
| treated of in the आयुर्वाय (Ayurdhaya) chapters.

content:
230
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. IV
This sloka gives an exception where the ordinary rules of Ayurdaya are not to be applied at all. cf. सारावली.
Venus
Mercury
Sun
Lagna
Jupiter
Moon
Mars
Saturn
धन्वास्पदोदयविलग्नगतौ कुलीरे गीर्वाणनाथसचिवः सकलम चन्द्रः ।
जूके रवीन्दुतनयावपरे च लाभे दुश्चिक्यशत्रभवनेष्वमितं तदायुः ॥
Also
कर्कलग्ने गुरुः सेन्दुः केन्द्रगो बुधभार्गवौ ।
शेषैस्त्रिलाभषष्ठस्थरमितायुभवेक्षरः ॥
Also गुणाकर शीतकराङ्गिरसावलिरङ्गे केन्द्रगतायुशनः शशिस्न् ।
लाभरिपुत्रिगताः परिशेषाः प्रोक्तमिहामितमायुरितीदम् ॥
त्रिकोणे पापनिर्मुक्ते केन्द्र सौम्यविवर्जिते ।
रन्ध्र पापविहीने च जातस्त्वमरसंनिभः ॥ १०० ॥
Sloka 100. When there are no malefic planets in the Trikona places from the Lagna and when the Kendra places are void of benefic ones, and when the 8th is unoccupied by a malefic planet, the person born will be like a celestial being.
This sloka leads to the inference that malefics are worse in Konas than in Kendras—cf.
त्रिकोणस्थेषु पापेषु कुष्ठं शुले मतिभ्रमः ।
स्थानभ्रंशः कुलश्रेशो वैशच्छेदोऽथवा भवेत् ॥
The sloka in the text is also capable of being interpreted thus: "When Aries or Pisces happens to be the Lagna with Jupiter or Venus occupying it, and the Moon in the middlemost Navamsa of Taurus, or Mars has gained a सिंहासनांश, (Simhasanamsa), the person &c.,"

tables.title: Horoscope chart illustrating an exception to Ayurdaya rules
tables.markdown:
| Position | Planets / Points |
|---|---|
| Top-Left House | Venus, Mercury |
| Top-Middle House | Sun |
| Top-Right House | Lagna, Jupiter, Moon |
| Bottom-Left House | Mars |
| Bottom-Right House | Saturn |

title: चतुर्थोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 101-105
चतुर्थोऽध्यायः :
291
सन्यादिभौमपर्यन्तं लग्नादेः खेचराः स्थिताः ।
• वैशेषिकांशसंयुक्ता जातस्त्वमरसन्निभः ॥ १०१ ॥
Sloka 101. If the planets reckoned from the Lagna
are placed in such a way that Saturn is the first and
Mars the last of them and they occupy the (वैशेषि कांश)
Vaiseshikamsas (vide. Adhyaya, 1. Sl. 44-47 Supra.),
the person born will resemble an immortal.
मेषान्त्यलग्ने सगुरौ भृगौ वा निशाकरे गोगृहमध्यमांशे ।
सिंहासनांशे यदि वा धराजे जातस्त्वसंख्यातमुपैति मन्त्रैः ॥१०२॥
Sloka 102. When Pisces is occupied by Jupiter
and Venus, or the Moon is in the middlemost Navamsa
of Taurus i.e., वृषभनवांश (Vrishabhanavamsa) or Mars has
gained a सिंहासनांश (Simhasanamsa) the person born will
attain to years untold by the recitation of sacred hymns.
देवलोकांशके मन्दे मौम पारावतांशके ।
सिंहासने गुरौ लग्ने जातो मुनिसमो भवेत् ॥ १०३ ॥
Sloka 103. When Saturn is in Devalokamsa, Mars
in Paravathamsa and Jupiter occupies the Lagna and is
in Simhasanamsa, the person born will be a saintly
personage.
गोपुरांश गुरौ केन्द्रे शुक्रे पारावतांशके ।
त्रिकोणे कर्कटे लग्ने युगान्तं स तु जीवति ॥ १०४ ॥
Sloka 104. When Jupiter has attained a Gopu-
ramsa in a Kendra position and Venus a Paravathamsa
in a triangular place and Cancer is the rising sign, the
person born will live to the end of the world.
चापांशे कर्कटे लग्ने तस्मिन्देवेन्द्रपूजिते ।
त्रिचतुर्भिग्रहैः केन्द्रे जातो नक्षपदं वजेत् ॥ १०५ ॥
verses:
सन्यादिभौमपर्यन्तं लग्नादेः खेचराः स्थिताः ।
• वैशेषिकांशसंयुक्ता जातस्त्वमरसन्निभः ॥

If the planets reckoned from the Lagna
are placed in such a way that Saturn is the first and
Mars the last of them and they occupy the (वैशेषि कांश)
Vaiseshikamsas (vide. Adhyaya, 1. Sl. 44-47 Supra.),
the person born will resemble an immortal.
मेषान्त्यलग्ने सगुरौ भृगौ वा निशाकरे गोगृहमध्यमांशे ।
सिंहासनांशे यदि वा धराजे जातस्त्वसंख्यातमुपैति मन्त्रैः ॥

When Pisces is occupied by Jupiter
and Venus, or the Moon is in the middlemost Navamsa
of Taurus i.e., वृषभनवांश (Vrishabhanavamsa) or Mars has
gained a सिंहासनांश (Simhasanamsa) the person born will
attain to years untold by the recitation of sacred hymns.
देवलोकांशके मन्दे मौम पारावतांशके ।
सिंहासने गुरौ लग्ने जातो मुनिसमो भवेत् ॥

When Saturn is in Devalokamsa, Mars
in Paravathamsa and Jupiter occupies the Lagna and is
in Simhasanamsa, the person born will be a saintly
personage.
गोपुरांश गुरौ केन्द्रे शुक्रे पारावतांशके ।
त्रिकोणे कर्कटे लग्ने युगान्तं स तु जीवति ॥

When Jupiter has attained a Gopu-
ramsa in a Kendra position and Venus a Paravathamsa
in a triangular place and Cancer is the rising sign, the
person born will live to the end of the world.
चापांशे कर्कटे लग्ने तस्मिन्देवेन्द्रपूजिते ।
त्रिचतुर्भिग्रहैः केन्द्रे जातो नक्षपदं वजेत् ॥

title: Balarishta
content:
232
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. IV
Sloka 105. When the rising Navamsa in Kataka
is owned by Dhanus and Jupiter occupies it and when 3
or 4 planets are in Kendra pcsitions, the person born
attains to Brahma's seat:
The same yoga is again referred to in Adhyaya. V-122 infra.
लग्ने सेज्ये भृगौ कामे कन्यायामुडुनायके ।
चापे मेषांशके लग्ने जातो याति परं पदम् ॥१०६ ॥
Sloka 106. When the rising sign is Dhanus
and is occupied by Jupiter and when the rising Navam
sa is owned by Mesha, when Venus is in the 7th house
and the Moon is in Kanya, the person born will attain
final beatitude.
For the same yoga, see Adhyaya V sloka-123 infra,
बालारिष्टं योगसंजातभल्पं तेषां भङ्गा मध्यम दीर्घमायुः ।
दिव्यं योगाभ्यासमन्त्रक्रियाद्यैरायुः सप्तैतानि संकीर्तितानि ॥१०७॥
इति श्रीनवग्रहकृपया वैद्यनाथविराचते जातकपारिजाते
वालारिष्टाद्यध्यायश्चतुर्थः ॥
Sloka 107. बालसारिष्ट (Balarishta-afflictions in child-
hood), early death due to planetary combinations, their
nullification, mean age, long life, divine life due to (1)
abstract meditation (2) recitation of sacred hymns, etc.,
these seven have been treated of in this Adhyaya.
Thus ends the Fourth Adhyaya styled Balarishta
बालारिष्ट and other yogas in the work जातकपारिजात (Jathakaa
parijatha) composed by Vaidyanatha under the auspices
of the nine planets.
verses: When the rising Navamsa in Kataka is owned by Dhanus and Jupiter occupies it and when 3 or 4 planets are in Kendra positions, the person born attains to Brahma's seat:

लग्ने सेज्ये भृगौ कामे कन्यायामुडुनायके ।
चापे मेषांशके लग्ने जातो याति परं पदम् ॥१०६ ॥

When the rising sign is Dhanus and is occupied by Jupiter and when the rising Navamsa is owned by Mesha, when Venus is in the 7th house and the Moon is in Kanya, the person born will attain final beatitude.

बालारिष्टं योगसंजातभल्पं तेषां भङ्गा मध्यम दीर्घमायुः ।
दिव्यं योगाभ्यासमन्त्रक्रियाद्यैरायुः सप्तैतानि संकीर्तितानि ॥१०७॥

बालसारिष्ट (Balarishta-afflictions in childhood), early death due to planetary combinations, their nullification, mean age, long life, divine life due to (1) abstract meditation (2) recitation of sacred hymns, etc., these seven have been treated of in this Adhyaya.

title: आयुर्दायाध्यायः (Ayurdayadhyaya) / LENGTH OF LIFE.
content:
जातकपारिजाते पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
॥ आयुर्दायाध्यायः ॥
Adhyaya V.
LENGTH OF LIFE.
In this chapter, slokas 7, 9, 11, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, have been
taken from Brihat Jataka.
निसर्गपैण्यांशकरश्मिचक्रनक्षत्रदायाष्टकवर्गजानि ।
पराशराद्यैः कथितानि यानि संगृह्य तानि क्रमशः प्रवच्मि ॥ १ ॥
Sloka. 1. I abridge and give in their order the
several methods for finding the lengths of human life
under various planetary positions as treated of by पराशर
Parasara and other eminent authorities on Astrology
under the heads of (1) निसर्गज-Nisargaja (2) विष्टज-Pindaja,
(3) अवराज-Amsaja, (4) रश्मिज-Rasmija, (5) चक्रत्र-Chakraja.
(6) नक्षत्रज-Nakshatraja, (7) दायज-Dayaja and (8) अष्टकवर्गज्ञ-
Ashtaka Vargaja (आयुस) Ayus.
नस्वाः शशी द्वौ नवर्क वृतिय कृतिः खबाणा रविपूर्वकाणाम् ।
इमा निरुक्ताः क्रमशो ग्रहाणां नैसर्गिके ह्यायुषि वर्षसंख्याः ॥ २ ॥
Sloka 2. 20, 1, 2, 9, 18, 20 and 50 are the figures
indicating the number of years prescribed respectively
for the Sun and other planets in the Naisargikayurdaya
(नैसर्गिकायुर्वांय),
233
verses:
निसर्गपिण्ड्यांशकरश्मिचक्रनक्षत्रदायाष्टकवर्गजानि ।
पराशराद्यैः कथितानि यानि संगृह्य तानि क्रमशः प्रवच्मि ॥ १ ॥

Sloka. 1. I abridge and give in their order the several methods for finding the lengths of human life under various planetary positions as treated of by पराशर Parasara and other eminent authorities on Astrology under the heads of (1) निसर्गज-Nisargaja (2) पिण्डज-Pindaja, (3) अंशज-Amsaja, (4) रश्मिज-Rasmija, (5) चक्रज-Chakraja, (6) नक्षत्रज-Nakshatraja, (7) दायज-Dayaja and (8) अष्टकवर्गज-Ashtaka Vargaja (आयुष) Ayus.

नखाः शशी द्वौ नवर्क धृतिः कृतिः खबाणा रविपूर्वकाणाम् ।
इमा निरुक्ताः क्रमशो ग्रहाणां नैसर्गिके ह्यायुषि वर्षसंख्याः ॥ २ ॥
Sloka 2. 20, 1, 2, 9, 18, 20 and 50 are the figures indicating the number of years prescribed respectively for the Sun and other planets in the Naisargikayurdaya (नैसर्गिकायुर्दाय).

285
But if the exaltation point minus the planet should
exceed 6 signs, keep it as it is; reducing the same to
minutes, multiply this by the planet's years. Divide
the product by 21,610. The quotient represented by
years, months, days etc., is called the विश्वास Pindayus
of the planet.
Vide श्रीपतिपद्धति V.-20, 21.
लोपोनस्फुटखेचरं यदि रसादल्पं भचक्रोद्धतं
दिप्तीकृत्य निजायुरब्दगुणितं तचक्रलिप्ताहृतम् ।
सुन्ध वासरनायकादिखचरेर्दत्तायुरब्दादिकं
नीचार्द्धक्रमशो वदन्ति मुनयः पैण्ट्ये व नैसर्गिके ॥ ६ ॥
Sloka 6. Sages say that in the पिण्डायुर्शय-Pindayur-
daya as well as in: the नैसर्गिकायुदाय - Naisargikayurdaya the
working process is as follows: The interval between
a planet's actual position and its highest exaltation point,
if less than 6 signs, should be subtracted from 12 signs.
The result reduced to minutes must be multiplied by
the number of years assigned to the planet and divi
ded by 21,600, .e. the number of minutes in the 12 signs
of the zodiac. The years and months thus arrived at
correspond to the भायुरीय-Ayurdaya of the Sun and other
planets obtained upon the application of मीचाई Neecha.
rdha and similar proportionate reduction.

This is simply a paraphrase of the 2 foregoing slokas.

content:
236
बातफपारिजाने
Adh. V
Sluka 7. When a planet is in its depression point,
the period assigned to it is reduced by half; but when
it occupies an intermediate position, the reduction is to
be proportionate. The number of years given by the
Lagna correspond to the number of its Navansas that
have risen above the horizon. According to some, the
लग्नायुष (Lagnayus) is as many years as there are Rasis
reckoned from Mesha up to Lagna. The planets except
when their motion is retrograde lose a third of their
Ayurdayas when in inimical houses. When they are
eclipsed, their आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya) is to be diminished by
half. This last reduction does not apply to Venus and
Saturn.
NOTES
First quarter, ततश्वान्तरस्थे is the reading adopted in the
commentaries of मट्टेोत्पल and विवरण but in मिताक्षरी it is तयोरन्तरस्थे
which clearly means नीचोच्चयोरन्तरस्थे.
Second quarter: By the word अपरे (Apare) in this sloka is
meant (मणित्थ) Manittha (some call him Manintha) and men of his
school. For, according to them, the number of years contributed
by the Lagna is thus found:
छम्नराशिसमाश्वान्दा मासाद्याननुपाततः ।
कृत्वा यत्तद्भवेत्कालं वर्षादिलंग्नजीवितम् ।।
Also vide slokas 14 and 15 infra.
Thus if 15° 47' 24" of Vrischika have risen at the birth time
of a person, the number of years given by the Lagna according to
Varahamihira's view will be 947'4/200 or 4737 years.
But if Maniththa's view be adopted, the Lagnayus will be 7
years (number of rasis that have elapsed counted from मेष) plus
15° '79/30° years or 7'5263 years.
Both the methods of calculating लमायु (Lagnayus) existed
from the very beginning. राश्यायुस (Rasyayus) was not a new method
found by मणिस्थ or men of his school. For, we see in स्कन्धोरा
धबैके कग्नभांपोव राशिनेस्यपरे विदुः ॥
verses:
When a planet is in its depression point, the period assigned to it is reduced by half; but when it occupies an intermediate position, the reduction is to be proportionate. The number of years given by the Lagna correspond to the number of its Navansas that have risen above the horizon. According to some, the लग्नायुष (Lagnayus) is as many years as there are Rasis reckoned from Mesha up to Lagna. The planets except when their motion is retrograde lose a third of their Ayurdayas when in inimical houses. When they are eclipsed, their आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya) is to be diminished by half. This last reduction does not apply to Venus and Saturn.
छम्नराशिसमाश्वान्दा मासाद्याननुपाततः ।
कृत्वा यत्तद्भवेत्कालं वर्षादिलंग्नजीवितम् ।।

धबैके कग्नभांपोव राशिनेस्यपरे विदुः ॥

But मणेित्थ and men of his school followed the latter while
others preferred the former. Under the two methods, the past
Navan is and Rasis and their fractions represent the years months,
&c. B. attotpala adds that Manittha's method should be followed
if the lord of the rising sign he powerful, and the first method
should be adopted if the lord of the rising Navamsa be strong,
and quotes in support thereof the following sloka from सारावली
लग्नदायाँशतुख्यः स्यादन्तरे चानुपाततः ।
तस्पती बळसंपचे राशितुल्य स्वभाधिपे ॥
This view is not however accepted by Varahamihira.
For the latter half of the sloka in the text, cf. श्रपितिपद्धति

content:
$240
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
Ayurdaya is lost. When benefic planets occupy such
positions, the loss is half of that incurred in the case of
malefic ones. When several planets are in a bhava, only
the strongest of them causes a reduction in the आयुर्दाय
(Ayurdaya). Satyacharya says so.
NOTES.
The commentator adds that Varahamihira concurs with
Satyacharya in this view viz., that when several planets occupy
a single sign, the reduction shall be made for the most powerful
one.
cf. सारावली

In the present horoscope, according to the above rule, there

The Moon is in the 10th house. He is benefic and therefore

: It should however be clearly understood that the above com-
putations are only rough and not quite accurate inasmuch as no
distinction is made between a planet occupying the beginning of a
bhava and another occupying the end of it. Both are inade to
suffer the same amount of reduction which is not correct. Again,
*suppose there is a planet occupying the beginning of the 12th
house aud another the end of the 11th, the relative distance between
them being say only 2 or 3 degrees. If the rules enunciated above
are to be strictly applied, one planet (that is in the 12th house)
loses his whole period while that in the 11th loses only one half
which is mathematically not correct. To calculate the Ayurdaya
periods of the several planets correctly and accurately, readers
are requested to refer to the 5th Adhyaya of श्रीतिपद्धतिः (Sripati-
paddhati) and the sample horoscope worked out by me therein.
एकक्षोपगतानां यो भवति बलाधिको विशेषेण ।
क्षपयति तथोक्तमंशं स एव नान्योऽपि तत्रस्थः ॥ १० ॥
Sloka 10. When several planets are in one house.
only one planet that is pre-eminently strong and no other
causes the loss of आयुरीय (Ayurdaya) portion' in the way
described.
करोदयहरणम.

नागोष्टयुक्तशतसंख्यम्मुपैति नाशम् ।

content:
242
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
करे बिलग्नसहिते विधिना त्वनेन
सौम्येक्षिते दलमतः प्रलयं प्रयाति ॥ ११ ॥
Sloka 11. Multiply the Ayurdaya found by the
number representing the Navamsa portions, whole and
fractional, of the Lagna that have emerged from the
horizon. Divide the product by 108. The quotient in
years, months, etc, is the period to be diminished from
the Ayurdaya found in cousequence of a malefic planet
occupying the Lagna. If the malefic planet in the Lagna
be aspected by a benefic planet, the reduction will be
only by half of the period above found.
NOTES.
The greatest amount of reduction under this count will be
1/12th of the whole Ayus when the Lagna happens to be the very
end of a sign. According to some, the number of years of reduction
is obtained by multiplying the total number of years already
obtained by the number of Navamsas between the first point of
Mesha and the Lagna-whole and fractional-and dividing the
product by 108. Thus, should the Lagna be at the very end of
Meena, and if a malefic should occupy the same, the whole Ayus
is lost. The former view appears more rational. The latter
view is not favoured either by Bhattotpala or by Kalyanavarnan.
cf. सारावली
लग्नांशलिप्तिका हत्या प्रत्येकं विहगायुषा ।
भक्त्वा मण्डललिताभिर्लब्धं वर्षाद्विशोधयेत् ॥
स्वायुषो लग्नगे करे लब्घस्याई शुभेक्षिते ।
एवमेव प्रकर्तव्यं जीवशमर्मोक्तचन्द्रजे ॥
The Commentator also adds "अस्मिन् साद्धौदितेति कर्मणि लग्ने यदा पाप.
सौम्यौ भवतस्तदा यो लग्नोदितांशकसमीपवर्ती स एवं ग्राह्यो नेतए इति
When there are two planets one malefic and the other benefic
occupying the Lagna, the planet that is nearer to the rising
Navamsa is alone to be considered and not the others. If the
malefic planet be nearer, then the reduction enjoined has to be
verses: सौम्येक्षिते दलमतः प्रलयं प्रयाति ॥

Multiply the Ayurdaya found by the
number representing the Navamsa portions, whole and
fractional, of the Lagna that have emerged from the
horizon. Divide the product by 108. The quotient in
years, months, etc, is the period to be diminished from
the Ayurdaya found in cousequence of a malefic planet
occupying the Lagna. If the malefic planet in the Lagna
be aspected by a benefic planet, the reduction will be
only by half of the period above found.

एवमेव प्रकर्तव्यं जीवशमर्मोक्तचन्द्रजे ॥

The Commentator also adds "अस्मिन् साद्धौदितेति कर्मणि लग्ने यदा पाप.
सौम्यौ भवतस्तदा यो लग्नोदितांशकसमीपवर्ती स एवं ग्राह्यो नेतए इति

When there are two planets one malefic and the other benefic
occupying the Lagna, the planet that is nearer to the rising

malefic planet be nearer, then the reduction enjoined has to be

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 12-13
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
243
made; but if the benefic be nearer, then no reduction need be
made.
The word कर Krura in the sloka does not include the waning
Moon, for, says the commentator
सूर्याङ्गारकमन्देष्वेकस्मिन् लग्नगे भवति हानिः ।
विधिना स्वनेन सौम्येक्षिते दलं पातयेल्लब्धम् ॥ इति
In the example, the Lagna is 0-14°-32′ or 4d Navamsas.
This is to be divided by 108 and multiplied by the Ayurdayas
already found. As there are two malefic planets, viz., Saturn and
the Sun in the Lagna and aspected by Jupiter, a benefic, the reduc
436
108
tion to be made in the Ayus will be fox
लिप्तीभूतैर्लग्न भागैर्विहन्यादायुर्दार्थ खेचराणां पृथक्स्थम् ।
व्योमाकाशत्विन्दुपक्षैर्भजेत्तत् स्वायुर्दायाच्छोध्यमब्दादिलब्धम् ॥१२
एतत् क्रूरे लग्नगे सौम्यदृष्टे तस्मिन् पाये तत्फलार्द्ध विशोध्यम् ।
एतद्दाये नांशसंज्ञे विधेयं पिण्डायुर्वत् कर्म नैसर्गिके च ॥ १३ ॥
Slokas 12 & 13. Convert the degrees and portions
there of in the Lagna to minutes (the number represent-
ing integral signs being left out); and multiply here-
with the आयुर्याय (Ayurdaya) of the planets separately.
Divide the product by 21,600. The quotient represent-
ing years, etc. found for each planet must be subtracted
from its आयुदाय (Ayurdaya). This reduction is enjoined
when a malefic planet occupies the Lagna. But if the
malefic planet be aspected by a benefic one, only half
the result obtained by the above process for each planet
is to be subtracted from its आयुदाय (Ayurdaya). This
reduction does not apply to the अंशायुर्दाय (Amsayurdaya)
The process in the नैसर्गिकायुर्दाय (Naisargikayurdaya) is
also the same as_in the पिण्डायुर्दाय (Pindayurdaya).
Same as श्रीपतिपद्धति । (Sripathipaddhati) - V-26, 27.
verses:
सूर्याङ्गारकमन्देष्वेकस्मिन् लग्नगे भवति हानिः । विधिना स्वनेन सौम्येक्षिते दलं पातयेल्लब्धम् ॥ इति

लिप्तीभूतैर्लग्न भागैर्विहन्यादायुर्दार्थ खेचराणां पृथक्स्थम् । व्योमाकाशत्विन्दुपक्षैर्भजेत्तत् स्वायुर्दायाच्छोध्यमब्दादिलब्धम् ॥१२

एतत् क्रूरे लग्नगे सौम्यदृष्टे तस्मिन् पाये तत्फलार्द्ध विशोध्यम् । एतद्दाये नांशसंज्ञे विधेयं पिण्डायुर्वत् कर्म नैसर्गिके च ॥ १३ ॥

Slokas 12 & 13. Convert the degrees and portions there-of in the Lagna to minutes (the number represent- ing integral signs being left out); and multiply here- with the आयुर्याय (Ayurdaya) of the planets separately. Divide the product by 21,600. The quotient represent- ing years, etc. found for each planet must be subtracted from its आयुदाय (Ayurdaya). This reduction is enjoined when a malefic planet occupies the Lagna. But if the malefic planet be aspected by a benefic one, only half the result obtained by the above process for each planet is to be subtracted from its आयुदाय (Ayurdaya). This reduction does not apply to the अंशायुर्दाय (Amsayurdaya) The process in the नैसर्गिकायुर्दाय (Naisargikayurdaya) is also the same as in the पिण्डायुर्दाय (Pindayurdaya).

content:
244
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
लमायुःसाधनम्.
आयुस्तथैतेषु बलाढ्यलग्ने विहाय राशीन् कृतलिप्तिकेऽत्र ।
भक्ते द्विशत्या फलमब्दपूर्व यत्स्यात्रिलग्नायुषि तच्च योज्यम् ॥१४॥
Sloka 14. When the Lagna is strong (i. e., when
the strength exceeds 6 Rupas), convert only the degrees,
etc., contained therein into minutes, the integral signs
being left out. Divide this by 200; the quotient in the
form of years, etc., should be added to the कप्रायुस्
(Lagnayus).
NOTES.
This sloka is taken from श्रीपतिपद्धतिः (Sripatipaddhati) ch. V.
(1) The Ayus for the Lägna in the अशायुरीय (Amsayur-
daya) system is found in the following manner: Reduce the signs,
degrees, etc., into minutes and divide it by 2400. The remainder
is the आयुष्कलाः (Ayushkalaha) of the Lagna. Divide the
आयुष्कलाः (Ayushkalaha) by 200. The result will be the number
of years given by the Lagna.
Thus, if in a nativity the position of the Lagna be 0-14°
-31'-46", the आयुष्कलाः (Ayushkalaha) =87176. The number
of years given by the Lagna=43588. This is the view of Varaha-
mihira. (Vide sloka 7 supra).
(3) But according to some, since the Lagna in the above
instance is ascertained to be strong (its strength being 9'137 Rupas),
the Ayus has to be increased by
14° 31′ 46″
30°
of a year
=4843 of a year:
Thus, the aggregate number of years derived from the Lagna
iз 4'3588 plus '4843 or 4'843.
(c) In the 3 Ayurdayas, viz., पिण्डायुदाय (Pindayurdaya), निसर्गा
युदोष (Nisargayurdaya) and जीवशर्मायुदीय (Jeevasarmayurdaya) the
Ayus for the Lagna has to be worked out iust as in the अंशायुर्दाय
(Amsayurdaya) [Vide (a) above].
verses:
आयुस्तथैतेषु बलाढ्यलग्ने विहाय राशीन् कृतलिप्तिकेऽत्र ।
भक्ते द्विशत्या फलमब्दपूर्व यत्स्यात्रिलग्नायुषि तच्च योज्यम् ॥१४॥

When the Lagna is strong (i. e., when the strength exceeds 6 Rupas), convert only the degrees, etc., contained therein into minutes, the integral signs being left out. Divide this by 200; the quotient in the form of years, etc., should be added to the कप्रायुस् (Lagnayus).

title: Fifth Chapter
content:
SI. 10
पञ्चमेोऽध्यायः
245
Since the Lagna is strong (in the present example), we have
to add to 4'3588 years (already obtained), 43588 years more.
The total number of years derived from the Lagna will therefore
be 87175. But दिवाकरदैवश (Diwakara Daivagna) in his com-
mentary on the 24th sloka of the केशवपद्धति (Kesavapaddhati)
quotes approvingly the following reading of the sloka in the text :-
आयुष्वथैतेष्वबलाख्यलग्ने विहाय राशीन् कृतलिप्तिकेऽत्र ।
भक्ते द्विशत्या फलमब्दपूर्व यत्स्याद्विलग्नायुषि तच योज्यम् ॥
and explains जबलाढ्य लमे (Abaladhya lagne) अबले बलाढ्ये वा लग्ने (Abale
baladhye va Lagne), i,c., in a Lagna whether weak or strong. And
लमाया (Lagnayushi) he explains as importing लम्नायुर्निमित्तम् (Lagna-
yurnimittham), 1.., for the Ayus of the Lagna. The sloka with
the above reading as interpreted by दिवाकरदेवश (Diwakaradaivagna)
would therefore mean
4
"In these three Ayurdayas, viz., Pindayurdaya, Nisargayur-
daya and Jeevasarma-yurdaya, omit the signs and take only the
degrees, etc., in the Lagna; then reduce these to minutes and
divide the same by 200. The resulting quotient will represent
the number of years due to the Lagnayus."
According to this interpretation, Lagnayus works out only
to 4*3588 years. And दिवाकर दैवश (Diwakaradaivagna) adds that the
interpretation is largely accepted.
लग्नराशिसमाश्चान्दास्तन्मासाद्यनुपाततः ।
लग्नायुर्दायमिच्छन्ति होराशास्त्रविशारदाः ॥ १५ ॥
Sloka 15. People versed in Astrological Science
would have the लम्मायुस (Lagnayus) consist of as many
whole years as there are whole Rasis indicated by the
figures denoting the Lagna and some months, etc.
obtained by proportion (i.e. some months which form
the same fraction of a year as the risen portion of the
Lagna is of a whole Rasi). vide श्रोपतिपद्धति V. 18.
NOTES
See notes to 2nd quarter of sloka 7.
verses:
आयुष्वथैतेष्वबलाख्यलग्ने विहाय राशीन् कृतलिप्तिकेऽत्र ।
भक्ते द्विशत्या फलमब्दपूर्व यत्स्याद्विलग्नायुषि तच योज्यम् ॥

"In these three Ayurdayas, viz., Pindayurdaya, Nisargayur-
daya and Jeevasarma-yurdaya, omit the signs and take only the
degrees, etc., in the Lagna; then reduce these to minutes and
divide the same by 200. The resulting quotient will represent
the number of years due to the Lagnayus."

लग्नराशिसमाश्चान्दास्तन्मासाद्यनुपाततः ।
लग्नायुर्दायमिच्छन्ति होराशास्त्रविशारदाः ॥

People versed in Astrological Science
would have the लम्मायुस (Lagnayus) consist of as many
whole years as there are whole Rasis indicated by the
figures denoting the Lagna and some months, etc.
obtained by proportion (i.e. some months which form
the same fraction of a year as the risen portion of the
Lagna is of a whole Rasi). vide श्रोपतिपद्धति V. 18.

content:
246
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. V
षडिधहरणं.
करोदयास्तरि पुनीचख गोपगानां
रिःफायमाननवरन्ध्रकलत्रगानाम् ।
कृत्वाऽऽस्थया हरणषट्कमिनादिकानां
लग्नायुषा सह युते यदि तुल्यमायुः ॥ १६ ॥
Slaka 16. Effect with care which ever may becom
necessary of the six reductions in the Ayurdayas of th
Sun and other planets in respect to their being affecte
by (1) the presence of a malefic planet in the Lagna (2)
the loss of lustre owing to too great a proximity to the
Sun (3) occupation of an inimical sign (4) arrival at the
depression point (5) conjunction with other planets and
(c) position in the lath, 11th, 10th, 9th, 8th or 7th
house from the Lagna. The reduced Ayurdayas of the
planets if joined to the लग्नायुस (Lagnayus) will give the
proper आयुस्-Ayus (in the aggregate).
NOTES
The author here talks of the 6 kinds of reductions alluded t)
already, viz., (1) करोदयहरण (Krurodaya barana) [Sloka 11], (2
अस्तंगतहरण (Asthangata harana) - [Sloka 8], (3) शत्रुक्षेत्रहरण (Sathru
kshetra/harana) [Sloka 8], (4) नीचार्द्धहरण (Neechardha barana)
[Sloka 7], (5) ग्रहयोगताहरण (Grahayogato harana) - [Sloka10], and
(6) व्ययादिहरण (Vyayadi harana)- [Sloka 9].
अंशकायुः.
स्वमतेन किलाह जीवशर्मा ग्रहदायं परमायुषः स्वरांशम् ।
ग्रहञ्चक्तनवांशराशितुल्यं बहुसाम्यं समुपैति सत्त्यवाक्यम् ॥१७॥
Sloka 17. Jeevasarman lays down in accordance
with his own doctrine that the (maximum) period of
verses: Effect with care which ever may become necessary of the six reductions in the Ayurdayas of the Sun and other planets in respect to their being affected by (1) the presence of a malefic planet in the Lagna (2) the loss of lustre owing to too great a proximity to the Sun (3) occupation of an inimical sign (4) arrival at the depression point (5) conjunction with other planets and (c) position in the 12th, 11th, 10th, 9th, 8th or 7th house from the Lagna. The reduced Ayurdayas of the planets if joined to the लग्नायुस (Lagnayus) will give the proper आयुस्-Ayus (in the aggregate).
Jeevasarman lays down in accordance with his own doctrine that the (maximum) period of

title: पचमध्यायः
content:
Sl. 17
पचमध्यायः
247
life given by each planet is th of the maximum aggre-
gate period (i. c. 120 years and 5 days). The declaration
of Satya (सत्य) that the आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya) of a planet
corresponds in years to the number of the Rasi whose
Navamsa is occupied by the planet, is in agreement with
the viewsof the majority of astrological authorities
(vide the next sloka).
NOTES.
First hilf. According to जविशर्मन् (Jeevasarman) each planet
when in exaltation gives 1/7th of 120 years, 5 days or 17 years,
1 month, 22 days, 8 ghatikas and 34°3 Vighatikas. Cf. जीवशर्मन
सप्तदशैकोद्वियमौ वसवो वेदाग्नयो ग्रहेन्द्राणाम् ।
वर्षाण्युच्चस्थानां नीचस्थानामतोर्द्ध यात् ।।
मध्येऽनुपाततः स्यादानयन शेषमत्र यत्किञ्चित् ।
पिण्डायुष इव कार्य तत्सर्वं गणिततत्वज्ञैः ॥
Jeevasarman's Ayurdaya is to be resorted to when the Lagna,
the Sun and the Moon are all weak. Cf. श्रापति
लग्नसूर्यशशिनो बलशूग्याः स्युर्वेदाऽत्र परमायुरगांशम् ।
सर्व एवं स्वचरा दवतीदं जीवझर्मगदिते हि तदायुः ॥
It has also to be noted that just as in the पिण्हायुदाय (Pindayur-
aya), the several reductions, viz, कपातहरण (Chakrapata harana),
चाईहरण (Neechaardhaharana,), शत्रुभत्रहानि (Sathrukshetra hani),
- स्तगतहानि । (Asthangatahani), करोदयहरण (Krurodayaharana) will
ave to bet made and then the resulting length of life ascertained.
By the words स्वमतेन (Swamathena), Varahamihira means that
eevasarman (of the Bengal School) stands alone unsupported so
ar as his method of Ayurdaya is concerned.
The Amsayurdaya method has been accurately treated in
ripathipaddhathi, 5th Adhyaya and the reader will do well to
refer to the example worked out by me in the notes to that work.
It has to be remembered that there are no years fixed for each
planet as in the Pinda, Nisarga and Jeevasarma Ayurdayas There
is also no Krurodayahatana in this system
verses:
सप्तदशैकोद्वियमौ वसवो वेदाग्नयो ग्रहेन्द्राणाम् ।
वर्षाण्युच्चस्थानां नीचस्थानामतोर्द्ध यात् ।।
मध्येऽनुपाततः स्यादानयन शेषमत्र यत्किञ्चित् ।
पिण्डायुष इव कार्य तत्सर्वं गणिततत्वज्ञैः ॥

लग्नसूर्यशशिनो बलशूग्याः स्युर्वेदाऽत्र परमायुरगांशम् ।
सर्व एवं स्वचरा दवतीदं जीवझर्मगदिते हि तदायुः ॥

content:
248
नातकपारिबातें,
Adh. V.
सत्योक्ते ग्रहामष्टं लिप्तीकृत्वा शतद्वयेनाप्तम् ।
मण्डलभागविशुद्धेऽब्दाः स्युः शेषात्त मासाद्याः ॥ १८ ॥
Slokas. 18. According to Satya's rule the signs,
degrees, minutes, etc. traversed by a given planet ought
to be converted into minutes and divided by 200. If the
quotient be a number exceeding 12 subtract from it as
many multiples of 12 as you can; the remainder gives
the number of years, months, etc.
स्वतुङ्गवक्रोपगतैस्त्रिसङ्गणं द्विरुत्तमस्वांशकभत्रि भागगैः ।
इयान्विशेषस्तु भदन्तभाषितः समानमन्यत्प्रथमेप्युदीरितम् ॥ १९ ॥
Slokas 19. The आयुर्वाष (Ayurdaya) of a planet is to
be trebled when it is in its exaltation or in its retrograde
motion. The same is to be doubled when the planet
is in a Vargottamamsa, in its own Navamsa or in its own
house or in its own Drekkana. This is the peculiarity
in the method of working out the आयुर्वाय (Ayurdaya)
according to सत्यत्वार्य (Satyacharya). All else is similar
to what has been already stated.
किंत्वत्र भांशप्रतिमं ददाति वीर्यान्विता राशिसमं च होरा ।
करोदये योऽपच्चयः स नात्र कार्य च नाब्दैः प्रथमोपदिष्टैः ॥२०॥
A
Slokas 20. But the Lagna gives its आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya)
ccrresponding to the character of its rising Navamsa,
i. c., as many years, months, etc, as the number of the
Rasi owning the rising Navamsa indicates. If the
Lagna be strong, it gives in addition as many years as
there are Rasis in the figure denoting the Lagna. In
this सत्यायुर्शय (Satyayurdaya) the reduction due to the
presence of a malefic planet in the Lagna does not find
place. The years assigned to the planets in the pre-
vious Ayurdayas are not to be used for calculation.
verses:
सत्योक्ते ग्रहामष्टं लिप्तीकृत्वा शतद्वयेनाप्तम् ।
मण्डलभागविशुद्धेऽब्दाः स्युः शेषात्त मासाद्याः ॥ १८ ॥

According to Satya's rule the signs,
degrees, minutes, etc. traversed by a given planet ought
to be converted into minutes and divided by 200. If the
quotient be a number exceeding 12 subtract from it as
many multiples of 12 as you can; the remainder gives
the number of years, months, etc.

स्वतुङ्गवक्रोपगतैस्त्रिसङ्गणं द्विरुत्तमस्वांशकभत्रि भागगैः ।
इयान्विशेषस्तु भदन्तभाषितः समानमन्यत्प्रथमेप्युदीरितम् ॥ १९ ॥

The आयुर्वाष (Ayurdaya) of a planet is to
be trebled when it is in its exaltation or in its retrograde
motion. The same is to be doubled when the planet
is in a Vargottamamsa, in its own Navamsa or in its own
house or in its own Drekkana. This is the peculiarity
in the method of working out the आयुर्वाय (Ayurdaya)
according to सत्यत्वार्य (Satyacharya). All else is similar
to what has been already stated.

किंत्वत्र भांशप्रतिमं ददाति वीर्यान्विता राशिसमं च होरा ।
करोदये योऽपच्चयः स नात्र कार्य च नाब्दैः प्रथमोपदिष्टैः ॥२०॥

But the Lagna gives its आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya)
ccrresponding to the character of its rising Navamsa,
i. c., as many years, months, etc, as the number of the
Rasi owning the rising Navamsa indicates. If the
Lagna be strong, it gives in addition as many years as
there are Rasis in the figure denoting the Lagna. In
this सत्यायुर्शय (Satyayurdaya) the reduction due to the

vious Ayurdayas are not to be used for calculation.

title: Panchamodhyayah
content:
81. 21-22
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
249
सत्योपदेशो वरसत्र किन्तु कुर्वन्त्ययोग्यं बहुवर्गणामिः ।
आचार्यकन्त्वत्र बहुमतायामेकं तु यद्भरि तदेव कार्यम् ॥ २१ ॥
Sloka 21. The rule of सत्वाचार्य (Satyacharya) is
preferable (to that laid down by मय- Maya or जीवशर्मा)
(Jeevasarmma). But some make the process inconsistent
and unwarrantable by a series of multiplications. The
dictum of the Acharyas (सत्य-Satya and others) is the
following:
(1). where several multiplications crop up, only one
and that the highest is to be gone through. (For instance,
when a planet is in its own house, and in its exaltation,
and in retrograde motion, the Ayurdaya is not to be
doubled first and then the result trebled, and the second
result further trebled. According to the rule, the आयुर्वाय
(Ayurdaya), should be trebled once for all).
(2). Again, when there are several reductions appli-
cable, only one and that the greatest should be made.
(For instance, a planet may be in an inimical sign and
may be eclipsed by the Sun. It is enough if the reduction
by half i. e. the अस्तङ्गत (Asthangata) reduction is made).
रश्मिजायुस.
दशगोशरमाणाद्रिवसुसायकरश्मयः ।
दिननायकम्मुख्येषु निजतुङ्गगतेषु च ॥ २२ ॥
Sloka 22. When the Sun and other planets are in
their exaltation, they have respectively 10, 9, 5, 5, 7, 8
and 5 rays.
C. बलभद्र - हो।रल.
32
NOTES.
स्वोच्चस्थे दश सूर्य नत्र चन्द्रे पंच भूपुत्रे ।
पंचेन्युजे तथेश्ये सप्ताष्टो भार्गवे शनी पंच ॥
verses:
सत्योपदेशो वरसत्र किन्तु कुर्वन्त्ययोग्यं बहुवर्गणामिः । आचार्यकन्त्वत्र बहुमतायामेकं तु यद्भरि तदेव कार्यम् ॥ २१ ॥

Sloka 21. The rule of सत्वाचार्य (Satyacharya) is preferable (to that laid down by मय- Maya or जीवशर्मा) (Jeevasarmma). But some make the process inconsistent and unwarrantable by a series of multiplications. The dictum of the Acharyas (सत्य-Satya and others) is the following:
(1). where several multiplications crop up, only one and that the highest is to be gone through. (For instance, when a planet is in its own house, and in its exaltation, and in retrograde motion, the Ayurdaya is not to be doubled first and then the result trebled, and the second result further trebled. According to the rule, the आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya), should be trebled once for all).
(2). Again, when there are several reductions appli- cable, only one and that the greatest should be made. (For instance, a planet may be in an inimical sign and may be eclipsed by the Sun. It is enough if the reduction by half i. e. the अस्तङ्गत (Asthangata) reduction is made).
दशगोशरमाणाद्रिवसुसायकरश्मयः । दिननायकम्मुख्येषु निजतुङ्गगतेषु च ॥ २२ ॥

Sloka 22. When the Sun and other planets are in their exaltation, they have respectively 10, 9, 5, 5, 7, 8 and 5 rays.
स्वोच्चस्थे दश सूर्य नत्र चन्द्रे पंच भूपुत्रे । पंचेन्युजे तथेश्ये सप्ताष्टो भार्गवे शनी पंच ॥

content:
250
Also
बासकपारिआते
दिशा खरांशोर्हिमदीधितेगों बाणास्तथा सौम्थकुजाकैजानाम् ।
नगासुरेज्यस्य सिप्तस्य मागाः प्रमाणतो दीधितयः स्वतुङ्गे ॥
Adh. V
The रश्मिजायुदीय (Rasmijayurdaya) system founded by Mahendra
has been in vogue from a very long time and has been recognised
by eminent astrologers such as Manittha, Maya, Yavana and Bada-
rayana. A brief description of the method of obtaining the correct
number of रश्मि (Rasmi) or rays of planets is given below:
The seven planets from the Sun onwards have respectively
10, 9, 5, 5, 7, 8 and 5 rays when they are in their full exaltation
position, the corresponding number of rays when in their depression
being zero in each case. The number of rays which a planet in
any intermediate position is entitled to has therefore to be deter-
mined by mere rule-of-three.
1
When a planet has emerged from its नीच (Neecha) or depres
sion and is on its way towards its exaltation, its rays are said to
be अभिमुख (Abhimukha) or facing towards the front. These
rays are declared to be capable of producing benefic results to the
native in a very short time. The reverse is the case with the
पराङ्मुख (Parangmukba) or down looking rays of planets which
have fallen from their उच (Uchcha) or exaltation and are going
towards their depression.
The rays have to undergo some multiplications and reductions,
before their utilisation for purposes of prediction.
When a planet occupies a Dwadasamsa which is his own, his
exaltation, or that of a friendly planet, his rays are to be doubled.
The same remark applies when the planet is retrograde in his
motion or is in his स्वक्षेत्र (Swakshetra) Rasi. But if the Dwada
samsa be that of an enemy or the planet's नीचराशि (Neecha Rasi,
the rays suffer a reduction by 1/16th portion. All planets-
Venus and Saturn excepted-lose their rays when they become
अस्तङ्गत (Asthangatha) or eclipsed. When the retrograde motion of
a planet is about to cease, the rays suffer a reduction by th.
The quality of a horoscope varies directly with the total num-
ber of rays given by the planets at the time of birth. Persons
verses:
दिशा खरांशोर्हिमदीधितेगों बाणास्तथा सौम्थकुजाकैजानाम् ।
नगासुरेज्यस्य सिप्तस्य मागाः प्रमाणतो दीधितयः स्वतुङ्गे ॥

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 22
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
251
with 1 to 5 rays will be very insignificant, miserable, low-minded
unlucky, etc.; those born with 6 to 10 rays will be dependants
with no permanent home and poor; those with 10 to 15 rays will
be somewhat better, being virtuous, of good temper, good speci-
mens of their family &c; those with 15 to 20 rays will in addition
be rich, famous and respected by their relations, and so on.
It is also stated that the native should be declared long-lived
when the number of rays exceed 25, as one of medium life when it
is between 15 and 25, and short-lived when the number falls short
of 15.
०८. जातकादेश
सर्वेषां रश्मियोगस्य स्मराधिक्ये चिरायुषः ।
स्वस्पायुषो मयास्यत्वे मध्यत्वे मध्यमायुषः ॥
For detailed information the reader is referred to the several
hapters on the subject in Brihat Parasarahora, Saravali, &c.

येर्षा नूनं मानावानां प्रसूतावेकत्रिंशत् संख्यकाश्ओन्मयूखाः ।
