content:
Sl. 24-26
255
Sloka 23. A planet diminished by its exaltation,
if less than 6 signs, is to be subtracted from 12 signs,
and the result reduced to minutes should be multiplied
by its rays (mentioned in the preceding sloka) and
divided by the minutes contained in the 12 signs. The
quotient in years, etc., thus found for the Sun and other
planets, represents, they say, the रश्मिजयुस (Rasmijayus)
due to the rays.
हरणम्.
स्वराशितुङ्गातिसुहृङ्गहस्ये वक्रोपगे तु द्विगुणीकृतांशुः ।
वक्रावसानेऽष्टममार्गवर्ज्या सपत्नगे द्वादशभागहानिः ॥ २४ ॥
Sloka 44. When the planet is in its own Rasi, in
its own exaltation, in the house of a very friendly planet,
or in its retrogade motion, it has its rays doubled for
आयुर्याय (Ayurdaya) purposes. When the retrograde mo
tion comes to an end, the rays are diminished by an
eighth portion. When the planet is in the house of an
enemy, the rays become reduced by a twelfth.
अस्तं गतेषु द्युचरेषु चार्द्ध हित्वा शनिं दानवपूजितं च ।
तद्रश्मियोगग्रहद त्तमायुर्महेन्द्रशास्त्रोदितमाहुरार्याः ॥ २५ ॥
Sloka 25. The आयुर्वाय (Ayurdaya) is to be halved in
the case of all the अस्तंगत (Astangata) planets except
Venus and Saturn. Sages say that the आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya)
yielded by planets according to their rays is treated
of in the Astrological Science founded by Mahendra.
चक्रायुस.
रव्यादिसप्तग्रहता रकांश भुक्त। वशेषाब्दसमूहमायुः ।
सव्यापसव्योपगवाक्यजं वा वदन्ति चक्रायुरिनादिकानाम् ।।
verses:
Sloka 23. A planet diminished by its exaltation,
if less than 6 signs, is to be subtracted from 12 signs,
and the result reduced to minutes should be multiplied
by its rays (mentioned in the preceding sloka) and
divided by the minutes contained in the 12 signs. The
quotient in years, etc., thus found for the Sun and other
planets, represents, they say, the रश्मिजयुस (Rasmijayus)
due to the rays.

स्वराशितुङ्गातिसुहृङ्गहस्ये वक्रोपगे तु द्विगुणीकृतांशुः ।
वक्रावसानेऽष्टममार्गवर्ज्या सपत्नगे द्वादशभागहानिः ॥ २४ ॥

Sloka 44. When the planet is in its own Rasi, in
its own exaltation, in the house of a very friendly planet,
or in its retrogade motion, it has its rays doubled for
आयुर्याय (Ayurdaya) purposes. When the retrograde mo
tion comes to an end, the rays are diminished by an
eighth portion. When the planet is in the house of an
enemy, the rays become reduced by a twelfth.

अस्तं गतेषु द्युचरेषु चार्द्ध हित्वा शनिं दानवपूजितं च ।
तद्रश्मियोगग्रहद त्तमायुर्महेन्द्रशास्त्रोदितमाहुरार्याः ॥ २५ ॥

Sloka 25. The आयुर्वाय (Ayurdaya) is to be halved in
the case of all the अस्तंगत (Astangata) planets except
Venus and Saturn. Sages say that the आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya)
yielded by planets according to their rays is treated
of in the Astrological Science founded by Mahendra.

रव्यादिसप्तग्रहता रकांश भुक्त। वशेषाब्दसमूहमायुः ।
सव्यापसव्योपगवाक्यजं वा वदन्ति चक्रायुरिनादिकानाम् ।।

content:
256
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
Sloka 26. The आयुस (Ayus) consisting of the agg re-
gate of the several periods belonging to the untraversed
portions of the मक्षत्रपाद (Nakshatrapada) or Navamsas
toccupied by the Sun and other planets is said to be
the चक्रायुस (Chakrayus) of the seven planets reckoned
from the Sun (vide. Adhyaya XVII sloka 6, infra).
The name चक्रावुस (Chakrayus) applies also to what is got
by means of the formulas relating to the सभ्य (Savya)
and अपसव्य (Apasavya) chakras. (vide. Adhyaya XVII,
infra).
NOTES.
The चक्रायुर्दाय (Chakrayurdaya) is to be calculated in the case
of a horoscope in which Venus has the greatest (पड्वल) Shadbala.
The years assigned to the several planets are those mentioned in
Adhyaya XVII, sloka 6,
Assuming the Sun's position in any nativity to be I sign
2° 55' 30", he is 1975'5 removed from the First Point of Mesha.
As each star covers 13° 20' or 800 minutes, the Sun is in
the second quarter of the Star (कृत्तिका) Krittika having already
traversed there 375'5 minutes. The number of years of
Ayurdaya given by the Sun is therefore
424'5 x 5 84.9
800
32
=2653
years. Similarly in the case of the other planets. There is no
पुरण (Harana) in this Ayurdaya.
दशायुः.
आदित्यम्मुख्यनवखेचरयोगतारा
मुक्तावशिष्टघटिकाजनि वत्सराद्यम् ।
आयुर्दशाजनितमष्टकवर्गजात
यत्प्रोक्तमेव सकलं प्रवदन्ति तज्ज्ञाः ॥ २७ ॥
Sloka 27. The आयुर्दाय (Ayurdaya) whose initial
portion consists of the years due to the unexpired gha-
tikas of a पोगतार। (yogatara) at a birth, whereof the lord
verses:

gate of the several periods belonging to the untraversed
portions of the मक्षत्रपाद (Nakshatrapada) or Navamsas
toccupied by the Sun and other planets is said to be
the चक्रायुस (Chakrayus) of the seven planets reckoned
from the Sun (vide. Adhyaya XVII sloka 6, infra).

by means of the formulas relating to the सभ्य (Savya)
and अपसव्य (Apasavya) chakras. (vide. Adhyaya XVII,
infra).

मुक्तावशिष्टघटिकाजनि वत्सराद्यम् ।

यत्प्रोक्तमेव सकलं प्रवदन्ति तज्ज्ञाः ॥ २७ ॥

portion consists of the years due to the unexpired gha-
tikas of a पोगतार। (yogatara) at a birth, whereof the lord

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 28-29
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
257
is one of the nine planets from the Sun onwards-
this आयुर्वाय (Ayurdaya) is called दशायुस (Dasayus) or more
commonly नक्षत्रदशायुस (Nakshatradasayus). The last is
the आयुस (Ayus) derived from अष्ठकवर्ग (Ashtakavarga)
wherein, say those conversant with it, is treated every-
thing (to be known).
NOTES.
The nine planets referred to in this Sloka are the seven
planets from the Sun onwards and the two nodes Rahu and Ketu.
The years assigned to them are those mentioned in Adhyaya
XVIII, Sloka 3. infra.
विलग्नपे बलोपेते शुभदृष्टेऽशर्स भवम् ।
श्वौ पिण्डोद्भवं कुर्याञ्चन्द्रे नैसर्गिकं क्रमात् ॥ २८ ॥
Sloka 28. When the lord of the Lagna is strong
aud aspected by a benefic planet, the अंशायुस (Amsayus) is
to be calculated. If the Sun or the Moon be strong and
have benefic aspect, the पिण्ड (Pinda) or the निसगाँयुस (Nisar-
gayus) respectively should be reckoned.
NOTES,
This Sloka is from (मणित्य) Manittha's work.
cf. पराशर
रवीन्द्वाराष्हिजीवार्किबुधकेसुसिताः क्रमात् ।
आझेयाङ्गगणेशाः स्युः स्वामिनो वत्सराः क्रमात् ||
षडाशाः सप्तधृतयो नृपा एकोनविंशतिः ।
अस्यष्टिः सप्त च नखा उसे नीचेऽर्दमुच्यते ॥
अरिंगस्तु हरणं तस्मात्पूर्वसिंस्तु द्वयं हितम् ।
अनयोः पापदायादावन्ते स्युरपसृत्यवः ||
उथं गते रखौ चान्ये बलिष्ठाः केन्द्रकोणगाः ।
सर्वेषु स्वोच्चभावेषु बलिष्ठे शशईसके ॥ २९ ॥
एवं चिरायुषां योगेष्वन्येषु गणितेषु च ।
88
h
verses:
विलग्नपे बलोपेते शुभदृष्टेऽशर्स भवम् ।
श्वौ पिण्डोद्भवं कुर्याञ्चन्द्रे नैसर्गिकं क्रमात् ॥

Sloka 28. When the lord of the Lagna is strong
aud aspected by a benefic planet, the अंशायुस (Amsayus) is
to be calculated. If the Sun or the Moon be strong and
have benefic aspect, the पिण्ड (Pinda) or the निसगाँयुस (Nisar-
gayus) respectively should be reckoned.
रवीन्द्वाराष्हिजीवार्किबुधकेसुसिताः क्रमात् ।
आझेयाङ्गगणेशाः स्युः स्वामिनो वत्सराः क्रमात् ||
षडाशाः सप्तधृतयो नृपा एकोनविंशतिः ।
अस्यष्टिः सप्त च नखा उसे नीचेऽर्दमुच्यते ॥
अरिंगस्तु हरणं तस्मात्पूर्वसिंस्तु द्वयं हितम् ।
अनयोः पापदायादावन्ते स्युरपसृत्यवः ||

उथं गते रखौ चान्ये बलिष्ठाः केन्द्रकोणगाः ।
सर्वेषु स्वोच्चभावेषु बलिष्ठे शशईसके ॥

एवं चिरायुषां योगेष्वन्येषु गणितेषु च ।

content:
258
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
चान्द्रयोगेषु तुर्ये तु चन्द्रे च बलसंयुते ॥ ३० ॥
महापुरुषयोगेषु वीर्योत्कटयुतेषु च ।
राजयोगेषु सर्वेषु पैण्ड्यमाह पराशरः ।। ३१ ।।
Slokas 29-31. When the Sun is in his exaltation
and the other planets are strong occupying Kendra and,
Trikona places, when all the planets are in their exalta-
tion, in the strongest शश (Sasa), or हंसयोग (Hamsayoga), in
all other yogas reckoned as those of long-lived people,
in the Chandra yogas generally (vide infra Adhyaya VII
Slokas 71-73), in the 4th चान्द्रयोग Chandra yoga i.c. Kema-
druma yoga (केमद्रमयोग) when the Moon is strongest, in the
Mahapurusha yogas महापुरुषयोगाः -vide infra, Adhyaya
VII, 59), and in all Rajayogas where the planets are
strongest, Parasara says पिण्डायुस् (Pindayus) is to be
calculated.
NOTES
: 
The latter half of Sloka 30 reads thus in पराशर होरा (Parasara-
hora.)
चन्द्रयोगेषु त्रिषु च चन्द्रे तु बलवत्तरे ॥
and seems to be the correct one.
The translation ought to be: "When the Sun has reached his
exaltation and the other planets have attained their maximum
strength and occupy Kendra and Trikona positions, when all pla-
nets are in their exaltation, in the strongest शश (Sasa) or हंसयोग
(Hamsa yoga) (Adhyaya VII, Sloka 59), in all other yogas reckoned
as those of long-lived people, in the three चान्द्र (Chandra) yogas सुनफा
अनफा दुरुपुर Sunapha, Anapha, Durudhata, vide Adhyaya VII
Sloka 85) when the Moon is very strong, in the महापुरुष (Maha-
purusha) yogas, Adhyaya VII Sloka 59) when the yoga-producing
planets are possessed of exceeding strength, and in all Rajayogas
Adhyaya VII, Slokas 1-58, Parasara says पिण्डायुर्दाय (Pindayus) is to
be calculated."
verses:
चान्द्रयोगेषु तुर्ये तु चन्द्रे च बलसंयुते ॥

महापुरुषयोगेषु वीर्योत्कटयुतेषु च ।
राजयोगेषु सर्वेषु पैण्ड्यमाह पराशरः ॥

When the Sun is in his exaltation
and the other planets are strong occupying Kendra and,
Trikona places, when all the planets are in their exalta-
tion, in the strongest शश (Sasa), or हंसयोग (Hamsayoga), in
all other yogas reckoned as those of long-lived people,
in the Chandra yogas generally (vide infra Adhyaya VII
Slokas 71-73), in the 4th चान्द्रयोग Chandra yoga i.c. Kema-
druma yoga (केमद्रमयोग) when the Moon is strongest, in the
Mahapurusha yogas महापुरुषयोगाः -vide infra, Adhyaya
VII, 59), and in all Rajayogas where the planets are
strongest, Parasara says पिण्डायुस् (Pindayus) is to be
calculated.
चन्द्रयोगेषु त्रिषु च चन्द्रे तु बलवत्तरे ॥

The translation ought to be: "When the Sun has reached his
exaltation and the other planets have attained their maximum
strength and occupy Kendra and Trikona positions, when all pla-
nets are in their exaltation, in the strongest शश (Sasa) or हंसयोग
(Hamsa yoga) (Adhyaya VII, Sloka 59), in all other yogas reckoned
as those of long-lived people, in the three चान्द्र (Chandra) yogas सुनफा
अनफा दुरुपुर Sunapha, Anapha, Durudhata, vide Adhyaya VII
Sloka 85) when the Moon is very strong, in the महापुरुष (Maha-
purusha) yogas, Adhyaya VII Sloka 59) when the yoga-producing
planets are possessed of exceeding strength, and in all Rajayogas
Adhyaya VII, Slokas 1-58, Parasara says पिण्डायुर्दाय (Pindayus) is to
be calculated."

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 32-33
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
259
लने गुरौ कर्मगते च भानौ चन्द्रे सुखे वाऽस्तगते बलाढ्ये ।
केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपचये च सौम्ये पापेष्वथा पोक्किमणेषु वैण्ड्यम् ॥३२॥
Sloka 32. When Jupiter is in the Lagna, the Sun
in the 10th, and the Moon full of strength is in the 4th
or in the 7th and other benefic planets occupy a Kendra,
Trikona or an उपचय (Upachaya) place and when the
malefic ones occupy the आलोन (Apoklima) houses, the
विश्वायुस (Pindayus) is to be reckoned.
NOTES.
This Sloka appears in पराशरहोरा (Parasarahora.) But the latter
half there reads as follows:
पूर्णे त्रिकीणोपचये शुभेषु पापेष्त्रथात्रोक्तमसंस्थितेषु ॥
वैण्ड्यं भान्नौ निसर्गप्रभवमुडुपतौ रश्मिजं सोमपुत्रे
भौमे भिनाष्टवर्गोदितमसुरगुरौ कालचक्रोद्भवायुः ।
देवाचार्ये दशायुर्दिनकरतनये नकरतनये सामुदायं सामुदा बलिष्ठ
लमे यद्यशकायुर्भवति बलधुते चाहुराचार्यमुख्याः ॥ ३३ ॥
Sloka 33. The leaders among astrological professors
say that the विण्डज (Pindaja), निसर्गज (Nisargaja), राश्मश
(Rasmija), मिस्राष्टकवर्गज (Bhinnashtakavargaja), कालचक्रज
(Kalachakraja), नक्षत्रत (Nakshatrija), सामुदायज (Samudayaja),
or अंशज (Amsaja) Ayus is to be reckoned according as
the Sun, the Moon, Mercury, Mars, Venus, Jupiter, Saturn
or the Lagna possesses the greatest strength.
NOTES.
The following slokas from पराशरहोरा (Parasarahora) giving
some more detailed information as to the several cases where
पिण्डायुरीय (Pindayurdaya) &c. have to be reckoned will be found te
be useful:
शुभाश्च केन्द्रे त्रिषडायमेऽन्ये विपर्यये वैण्ड्यमतः प्रदिष्टम् ।
रिःफाष्टषष्ठेषु सहस्त्ररश्मौ भौमे क्रमाच्छीत करे तु वैण्ड्यः ॥
verses:
लने गुरौ कर्मगते च भानौ चन्द्रे सुखे वाऽस्तगते बलाढ्ये ।
केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपचये च सौम्ये पापेष्वथा पोक्किमणेषु वैण्ड्यम् ॥३२॥

When Jupiter is in the Lagna, the Sun
in the 10th, and the Moon full of strength is in the 4th
or in the 7th and other benefic planets occupy a Kendra,
Trikona or an उपचय (Upachaya) place and when the
malefic ones occupy the आलोन (Apoklima) houses, the
विश्वायुस (Pindayus) is to be reckoned.
पूर्णे त्रिकीणोपचये शुभेषु पापेष्त्रथात्रोक्तमसंस्थितेषु ॥
वैण्ड्यं भान्नौ निसर्गप्रभवमुडुपतौ रश्मिजं सोमपुत्रे
भौमे भिनाष्टवर्गोदितमसुरगुरौ कालचक्रोद्भवायुः ।
देवाचार्ये दशायुर्दिनकरतनये नकरतनये सामुदायं सामुदा बलिष्ठ
लमे यद्यशकायुर्भवति बलधुते चाहुराचार्यमुख्याः ॥ ३३ ॥

The leaders among astrological professors
say that the विण्डज (Pindaja), निसर्गज (Nisargaja), राश्मश
(Rasmija), मिस्राष्टकवर्गज (Bhinnashtakavargaja), कालचक्रज
(Kalachakraja), नक्षत्रत (Nakshatrija), सामुदायज (Samudayaja),
or अंशज (Amsaja) Ayus is to be reckoned according as
the Sun, the Moon, Mercury, Mars, Venus, Jupiter, Saturn
or the Lagna possesses the greatest strength.
शुभाश्च केन्द्रे त्रिषडायमेऽन्ये विपर्यये वैण्ड्यमतः प्रदिष्टम् ।
रिःफाष्टषष्ठेषु सहस्त्ररश्मौ भौमे क्रमाच्छीत करे तु वैण्ड्यः ॥

title: Adh. V
content:
260
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. V
पापालन्ने चाष्टमे सप्तमे वा सौम्याः षष्ठे कर्ममे रिःफमे वा ।
नीचाभावे वैण्ड्यदायः प्रदिष्टो मन्दे लग्ने खोच्चगे च ध्रुत्राख्यः ॥
वीणायां कार्मुके चक्रे गदायामई चन्द्रके ।
खौ वैख्योंशको लग्ने ध्रुत्रश्चन्द्रे च भूमिजे ॥
भिन्नाष्टवर्गः सौम्ये तु नक्षत्रांशसमुद्भवः ।
गुरौ नक्षत्रदायः स्यात्प्रक्रमानुगतः सिते ॥
समुदायाष्टवर्गस्तु मन्वे तु बलवत्तरे ।
वाप्यां पाशे शरे पद्म समुद्रार्कादिषु क्रमात् ॥
बलिष्ठेषु नवांशोत्थो ध्रुत्रः पैण्ड्यः स्वरांशकः ।
भिनाष्टवर्ग अशोत्यो नक्षत्रांशक ईरितः ॥
रज्जौ विहन्ने मालायां नले च मुसले क्रमात् ।
पैण्ख्यो ध्रुवः क्रमात्प्रोक्तो व्यादौ तु बलोत्तरे ॥
गण्डे शक्तौ च शकटे यूपे केदारशूलयोः ।
प्रक्रमानुगतश्चाथ रश्मिजौ ध्रुत्रसंज्ञितौ ॥
अष्टवर्गसमुद्भूतौ कमादेवं बलोत्तरे ।
नौछत्रवज्रदामाख्ये स्वरदायोऽतिनीचगे ।।
कूटे गण्डे शरे नागे गोले शृङ्गाटके पुनः ।
कालकूटे क्रमात्प्रोक्ताः पैण्ड्याद्याः सप्त वै द्विज ॥
पैड्यास्त्रयो ध्रुवाश्यांशदायाश्चाष्टकवर्गकौ ।
द्रेष्काणेषु नवांशेषु द्वादशांशेषु च क्रमात् ॥
कलांशेषु नव प्रौक्ता दायाश्चैव पुनः पुनः ।
त्रिंशत्सवेदाः स्वरपाचकाश्च सुराश्च दन्ताः क्षितिपावकाश्च ।
षट्त्रिंशदिष्वग्मय एव भानि छन्दासिमूर्च्छाश्च जिनाः कराश्चेत् ॥
वैण्ड्यस्तथा द्वादशधा प्रभिन्नः क्रमेण दायो नियतः प्रदिष्टः ।
तत्वाग्निनन्दाग्मय एव रत्नदखाश्विदखा भवदायभेदाः ॥
verses:
पापालन्ने चाष्टमे सप्तमे वा सौम्याः षष्ठे कर्ममे रिःफमे वा ।
नीचाभावे वैण्ड्यदायः प्रदिष्टो मन्दे लग्ने खोच्चगे च ध्रुत्राख्यः ॥

वीणायां कार्मुके चक्रे गदायामई चन्द्रके ।
खौ वैख्योंशको लग्ने ध्रुत्रश्चन्द्रे च भूमिजे ॥

भिन्नाष्टवर्गः सौम्ये तु नक्षत्रांशसमुद्भवः ।
गुरौ नक्षत्रदायः स्यात्प्रक्रमानुगतः सिते ॥

समुदायाष्टवर्गस्तु मन्वे तु बलवत्तरे ।
वाप्यां पाशे शरे पद्म समुद्रार्कादिषु क्रमात् ॥

बलिष्ठेषु नवांशोत्थो ध्रुत्रः पैण्ड्यः स्वरांशकः ।
भिनाष्टवर्ग अशोत्यो नक्षत्रांशक ईरितः ॥

रज्जौ विहन्ने मालायां नले च मुसले क्रमात् ।
पैण्ख्यो ध्रुवः क्रमात्प्रोक्तो व्यादौ तु बलोत्तरे ॥

गण्डे शक्तौ च शकटे यूपे केदारशूलयोः ।
प्रक्रमानुगतश्चाथ रश्मिजौ ध्रुत्रसंज्ञितौ ॥

अष्टवर्गसमुद्भूतौ कमादेवं बलोत्तरे ।
नौछत्रवज्रदामाख्ये स्वरदायोऽतिनीचगे ।।

कूटे गण्डे शरे नागे गोले शृङ्गाटके पुनः ।
कालकूटे क्रमात्प्रोक्ताः पैण्ड्याद्याः सप्त वै द्विज ॥

पैड्यास्त्रयो ध्रुवाश्यांशदायाश्चाष्टकवर्गकौ ।
द्रेष्काणेषु नवांशेषु द्वादशांशेषु च क्रमात् ॥

कलांशेषु नव प्रौक्ता दायाश्चैव पुनः पुनः ।

त्रिंशत्सवेदाः स्वरपाचकाश्च सुराश्च दन्ताः क्षितिपावकाश्च ।
षट्त्रिंशदिष्वग्मय एव भानि छन्दासिमूर्च्छाश्च जिनाः कराश्चेत् ॥

वैण्ड्यस्तथा द्वादशधा प्रभिन्नः क्रमेण दायो नियतः प्रदिष्टः ।
तत्वाग्निनन्दाग्मय एव रत्नदखाश्विदखा भवदायभेदाः ॥

title: Fifth Chapter
content:
51. 34-36
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
261
एकास्त्रयश्वत्समुदायसंज्ञतस्ततस्तु वेदा इतरोऽष्टवर्गः ।
पञ्चादिकेश्वंशकदाय उक्तो रुद्राश्च सूर्या यदि पैण्ड्य आद्यः ॥
विश्व मनुश्चेत्स्वरभागदायो नक्षत्रदायस्तिथिसंज्ञकश्चेत् ॥
नृपेत्यष्टित्रये प्रोक्ता आद्यपैण्ड्यमिदास्तथा ।
प्रक्रमानुगतो विंशत्यष्टत्रिंशेऽष्टवर्गजः ।।
चत्वारिंशत्त्रये पेड्यो नक्षत्रांशस्त्रये ततः ।
शेषेषु षट्सु पैंड्यः स्यादाद्यो गर्गीयमाह च ॥
इष्टरश्म्यधिकप्रोक्तक्रम एव कराधिके ।
केन्द्रादिषु ग्रहाणां च वलोत्तरवशात् कमः ॥
बलोत्तरवशादेव स्थानेतरवशात्तथा ।
इष्टात्फलक्रमादेव रश्म्युक्तविधिना क्रमात् ।।
आयुरब्दादिकं सर्व निश्चलेन गुणीकृतम् ।
मातंगेन हृतं लब्धं सौरमानायुरुच्यते ॥ ३४ ॥
Sloka 34. The आयुस (Ayus) in years, months, etc,
multiplied by 360 and divided by 365 is termed सौरायुस्
(Sourayus), e., the period of life in solar years.
ये धर्मकर्मनिरता द्विजदेवभक्ता
ये पथ्यभोजनरता विजितेन्द्रियाश्च ।
ये मानवा दधति सत्कुलशीलसीमा-
स्तषामिदं कथितमायुरुदारधीभिः ॥ ३५ ॥
ये पापलुब्धाश्चौरा ये देवब्राह्मणनिन्दकाः ।
बह्वाशिनश्च ये तेषामकालमरंण नृणाम् ॥ ३६ ॥
Sloka 35. This आयुस (Ayus) has been declared by
wise men in respect to those who are engaged in the
practice of virtuous actions, who are devoted to the
Brahmins and the Gods, who eat wholesome diet, who

Brahmins and the Gods, who eat wholesome diet, who
ये पापलुब्धाश्चौरा ये देवब्राह्मणनिन्दकाः ।

content:
262
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. V
keep their senses under control and who preserve the
land-marks of character and conduct peculiar to their
high families.
Sloka 36. Premature death overtakes those who
are sinful, covetous and thievish, who revile Gods and
Brahmins, and who are addicted to gluttony.
Vide श्रीपतिपद्धति V-37-38.
धर्मे विकल्पबुद्धीनां दुःशीलानां च विद्विषाम् ।
ब्राह्मणानां च देवानां परद्रव्यापहारिणाम् ॥ ३७ ॥
भंयकराणां सर्वेषां मूर्खाणां पिशुनस्य च ।
स्वधर्माचारहीनानां पापकर्मोपजीविनां ॥ ३८ ॥
शास्त्रष्वनियतानां च मूढानामपमृत्यवः ।
अन्येषामुत्तमायुः स्यादिति शास्त्रविदो विदुः ॥ ३९ ॥
Slokas 37-39. Sudden death seizes those that are
sceptical of the force of moral law, that are vicious and
are the enemies of Gods and Brahmins, that filch other
people's goods, that are a source of dread to all, that are
fools and turn informers, that have abandoned their
duties and traditional observances, that live by sinful
courses, and those that wouldnot out of folly abide by
the ordinances of the sacred scriptures. Those that
know the sacred sciences regard the आयुस् (Ayus) pre-
scribed as applicable to people other than those that
have been declared liable to untimely death.
नानाजातीनामायुः
गृध्रोलूकबक (१) घ्वांक्षसर्पाणां च सहस्रकम् ।
श्येनवानरभलुकमण्डूकानां शतत्रयम् ॥ ४० ॥
पश्चाशादुत्तरशैवं राक्षसानां प्रकीर्तितम् ।
verses:
Sloka 36. Premature death overtakes those who
are sinful, covetous and thievish, who revile Gods and
Brahmins, and who are addicted to gluttony.

धर्मे विकल्पबुद्धीनां दुःशीलानां च विद्विषाम् ।
ब्राह्मणानां च देवानां परद्रव्यापहारिणाम् ॥ ३७ ॥

भंयकराणां सर्वेषां मूर्खाणां पिशुनस्य च ।
स्वधर्माचारहीनानां पापकर्मोपजीविनां ॥ ३८ ॥

शास्त्रष्वनियतानां च मूढानामपमृत्यवः ।
अन्येषामुत्तमायुः स्यादिति शास्त्रविदो विदुः ॥ ३९ ॥

Sudden death seizes those that are
sceptical of the force of moral law, that are vicious and
are the enemies of Gods and Brahmins, that filch other
people's goods, that are a source of dread to all, that are
fools and turn informers, that have abandoned their
duties and traditional observances, that live by sinful
courses, and those that wouldnot out of folly abide by
the ordinances of the sacred scriptures. Those that
know the sacred sciences regard the आयुस् (Ayus) pre-
scribed as applicable to people other than those that
have been declared liable to untimely death.
गृध्रोलूकबक (१) घ्वांक्षसर्पाणां च सहस्रकम् ।
श्येनवानरभलुकमण्डूकानां शतत्रयम् ॥ ४० ॥

पश्चाशादुत्तरशैवं राक्षसानां प्रकीर्तितम् ।

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 41-44
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
263
नरार्णा कुञ्जराणां च विंशोत्तरशतं विदुः ॥ ४१ ॥
द्वात्रिंशदायुरश्वानां पंचविंशत् खरोष्टयोः ।
वृषमाहिषयोश्चैव चतुर्विंशति वत्सराः ॥ ४२ ॥
विंशत्यायुर्मयूराणां छागादीनां च षोडश ।
हंसस्य पञ्चनवकं द्वादशाब्दाः पिकाः शुकाः ॥ ४३ ॥
तद्वत्पारावतानां च कुकटस्याष्ट वत्सराः ।
बुल्बुलानामण्डजानां सप्तसंख्याः समाः स्मृताः ॥ ४४ ॥
Slokas 40-41. A thousand years is recognised as
the maximum length of life of vultures, owls, cranes,
crows and serpants. Hawks, monkeys, bears and frogs
live for 300 years. Rakshasas have length of life lasting
150 years. 120 years is known as the maximum life of
men and elephants.
Slokas 42-44. The maximum age of a horse is 32
years; of an ass or a camel, 25; of a bull or buffalo, 24;
of peacocks, 20; of a goat or sheep, 16; of a goose, 14;
of a cuckoo or parrot, 12; of doves, 12 likewise; of a
fowl 8; and of the bulbul or eastern nightingale, the
maximum age is 7 years.
cf. सारावली
द्विताः षष्ठिर्निशाः पञ्च परमं नरदन्तिनाम् ।
द्वात्रिंशद्वाजिनामायुः छागादीनां तु षोडश ॥
खरोष्टयोः पञ्चवर्ग एकोपष्टिं वृषादिषु ।
झुनां तु द्वादश प्रोक्तं गणितं परमायुषम् ॥
तत्तत्परं प्रमाणेन हत्वैषामायुरादिशेत् ।
अरिष्टदशा ॥
In the following ten slokas (i.a slokas 45.54) the author has
explained the various clues to find out the अरिष्ट (Arishta) period
of the native:
verses:
नरार्णा कुञ्जराणां च विंशोत्तरशतं विदुः ॥ ४१ ॥

द्वात्रिंशदायुरश्वानां पंचविंशत् खरोष्टयोः ।
वृषमाहिषयोश्चैव चतुर्विंशति वत्सराः ॥ ४२ ॥

विंशत्यायुर्मयूराणां छागादीनां च षोडश ।
हंसस्य पञ्चनवकं द्वादशाब्दाः पिकाः शुकाः ॥ ४३ ॥

तद्वत्पारावतानां च कुकटस्याष्ट वत्सराः ।
बुल्बुलानामण्डजानां सप्तसंख्याः समाः स्मृताः ॥ ४४ ॥

A thousand years is recognised as the maximum length of life of vultures, owls, cranes, crows and serpents. Hawks, monkeys, bears and frogs live for 300 years. Rakshasas have length of life lasting 150 years. 120 years is known as the maximum life of men and elephants.
The maximum age of a horse is 32 years; of an ass or a camel, 25; of a bull or buffalo, 24; of peacocks, 20; of a goat or sheep, 16; of a goose, 14; of a cuckoo or parrot, 12; of doves, 12 likewise; of a fowl 8; and of the bulbul or eastern nightingale, the maximum age is 7 years.
द्विताः षष्ठिर्निशाः पञ्च परमं नरदन्तिनाम् ।
द्वात्रिंशद्वाजिनामायुः छागादीनां तु षोडश ॥
खरोष्टयोः पञ्चवर्ग एकोपष्टिं वृषादिषु ।
झुनां तु द्वादश प्रोक्तं गणितं परमायुषम् ॥
तत्तत्परं प्रमाणेन हत्वैषामायुरादिशेत् ।

In the following ten slokas (i.e. slokas 45-54) the author has explained the various clues to find out the अरिष्ट (Arishta) period of the native:

content:
264
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
त्रिमण्डलेष्वथैकास्मन् पापस्तिष्ठति दुर्बलः ।
न सौम्यग्रहंसयुक्तस्तद्दशान्ते मृतिं वदेत् ॥ ४५ ॥
Sioka 45. When, in one of the three cyclic divi-
sions (into which the 12 houses may be arranged under
certain conditions for आयुर्दाय-Ayurdaya purposes). there
is a malefic planet devoid of strength and unassociated
with a benefic planet, the astrologer can announce the
death of the person affected by this yoga at the conclu-
Bion of the दशा (Dasa-Ayurdaya period) of the weak
malefic planet in question.
NOTES
The following sloka from जातकोदेश will explain the cyclic
divisions referred to: -
लग्नपञ्चमभाग्यादिभावेष्वेकत्र संस्थितैः ।
चतुराद्यैर्महैर्जाता दीर्घमध्याल्पजीविनः ||
People have long, medium or short lives according as at the
time of their birth four or more planets are grouped together in
the Ist, the 2nd or the 3rd of the three groups of 4 consecutive
bhavas beginning respectively with the Lagna, the 5th and the 9th.
राशिसन्धिस्यखेडानां दशा रोगप्रदा भवेत् ।
त्रिंशद्भागमनुक्रान्तदशार्या मरण नृणाम् ॥ ४६ ॥
Sloka 46. The dasa period of a planet occupying
the end of a sign brings on disease. Death may happen
in the dasa of the planet in question when the planet
has progressed no further than the thirtieth degree of
the राशि (Rasi).
०१. फलदीपिका
(दशा) कष्टा भवेग्राश्यवसानभागस्थितस्य दुःस्थानपतस्तथैव ||
षष्ठाष्टमस्थो रिपुदृष्टमूर्तिः पापग्रहः पापगृहोपगश्चेत् ।
स्वान्तर्दशार्या मरणं नराणां वदन्ति युद्धे विजितत्य दाये ॥४७॥
Y
i
verses:
त्रिमण्डलेष्वथैकास्मन् पापस्तिष्ठति दुर्बलः ।
न सौम्यग्रहंसयुक्तस्तद्दशान्ते मृतिं वदेत् ॥

sions (into which the 12 houses may be arranged under

with a benefic planet, the astrologer can announce the
death of the person affected by this yoga at the conclu-
Bion of the दशा (Dasa-Ayurdaya period) of the weak
malefic planet in question.

चतुराद्यैर्महैर्जाता दीर्घमध्याल्पजीविनः ||

People have long, medium or short lives according as at the
time of their birth four or more planets are grouped together in
the Ist, the 2nd or the 3rd of the three groups of 4 consecutive
bhavas beginning respectively with the Lagna, the 5th and the 9th.
राशिसन्धिस्यखेडानां दशा रोगप्रदा भवेत् ।
त्रिंशद्भागमनुक्रान्तदशार्या मरण नृणाम् ॥

The dasa period of a planet occupying
the end of a sign brings on disease. Death may happen
in the dasa of the planet in question when the planet
has progressed no further than the thirtieth degree of
the राशि (Rasi).
(दशा) कष्टा भवेग्राश्यवसानभागस्थितस्य दुःस्थानपतस्तथैव ||

षष्ठाष्टमस्थो रिपुदृष्टमूर्तिः पापग्रहः पापगृहोपगश्चेत् ।
स्वान्तर्दशार्या मरणं नराणां वदन्ति युद्धे विजितत्य दाये ॥

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
31. 47-49
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
265
Sloka 47. If a malefic planet occupying the 6th or
the 8th house from the Lagna be aspected by its enemy
and if that 6th or the 8th house be itself owned by a
malefic planet, the death of the person concerned will
take place in the subsidiary dasa period of the planet
occupying the 6th or the 8th house when the main dasa
belongs to a planet conquered in planetary war.
Cf. गुणाकर
9
दशायां यदि भूस्‌नोर्विशेदन्तर्दशा शनेः ।
भवेत्प्राणभृतां मृत्युस्तदा दीर्घायुषामपि ॥
पष्ठाष्टमगतः करः करसंस्थो विलोकितः ।
द्विषता क्ररभस्थेन स्वदशार्या मृतिप्रदः ॥
दशारिष्ट जयी युद्धे प्रस्फुरस्किरणोत्करः ।
निजोच्वादिस्थितो वाऽपि हीनस्त्वन्तर्दशाधिपः ॥
पञ्चम्यारदशा मृत्युं दद्यात् षष्ठी गुरोर्दशा ।
शनैश्चतुर्थी मृत्यै स्याद्दशा राहोश्च सप्तमी ॥ ४८ ॥
Sloka 48. If in the order of main dasas the 5th
happens to belong to Mars, the 6th to Jupiter, the 4th
to Saturn or the 7th to Rahu, every one of these will
prove fatal.
०१. फलदीपक ।
शनेश्वतुर्थी च गुरोस्तु षष्ठी दशा कुजाँझोर्यदि पञ्चमी सा ।
कष्टाभवेत्
...
...
...
नीचारातिविमूढस्य विपत्प्रत्यरिनैधनाः ।
दशा दद्युर्मूर्ति तस्य पापश्युक्ता विशेषतः ॥ ४९ ॥
Sloka 49. If the 3rd, the 5th or the 7th main dasa
happens to be that of a planet in depression, in an ini
mical house or eclipsed by the Sun, it will prove fatal ;
and this will be the case all the more when the fatal
dasas are associated with malefic planets also.
34
verses:
Sloka 47. If a malefic planet occupying the 6th or
the 8th house from the Lagna be aspected by its enemy
and if that 6th or the 8th house be itself owned by a
malefic planet, the death of the person concerned will
take place in the subsidiary dasa period of the planet
occupying the 6th or the 8th house when the main dasa
belongs to a planet conquered in planetary war.

दशायां यदि भूस्‌नोर्विशेदन्तर्दशा शनेः ।
भवेत्प्राणभृतां मृत्युस्तदा दीर्घायुषामपि ॥
पष्ठाष्टमगतः करः करसंस्थो विलोकितः ।
द्विषता क्ररभस्थेन स्वदशार्या मृतिप्रदः ॥
दशारिष्ट जयी युद्धे प्रस्फुरस्किरणोत्करः ।
निजोच्वादिस्थितो वाऽपि हीनस्त्वन्तर्दशाधिपः ॥

पञ्चम्यारदशा मृत्युं दद्यात् षष्ठी गुरोर्दशा ।
शनैश्चतुर्थी मृत्यै स्याद्दशा राहोश्च सप्तमी ॥ ४८ ॥

Sloka 48. If in the order of main dasas the 5th
happens to belong to Mars, the 6th to Jupiter, the 4th
to Saturn or the 7th to Rahu, every one of these will
prove fatal.
शनेश्वतुर्थी च गुरोस्तु षष्ठी दशा कुजाँझोर्यदि पञ्चमी सा ।
कष्टाभवेत्
...
...
...
नीचारातिविमूढस्य विपत्प्रत्यरिनैधनाः ।
दशा दद्युर्मूर्ति तस्य पापश्युक्ता विशेषतः ॥ ४९ ॥

Sloka 49. If the 3rd, the 5th or the 7th main dasa
happens to be that of a planet in depression, in an ini
mical house or eclipsed by the Sun, it will prove fatal ;
and this will be the case all the more when the fatal
dasas are associated with malefic planets also.

content:
266
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
तत्तद्भावार्थकांमेशदशास्वन्तर्दशासु च ।
तत्सद्भावविनाशः स्यात् तद्युक्तेक्षितकारकैः ॥ ५० ॥
Sloka 50. In the main dasa as well as in the sub-
sidiary dasa of the lord of the 2nd or the 7th place from
any bhava there will happen the destruction thereof by
(1) the planet occupying the bhava; (2) the one aspect-
ing it; or (3) the (bhava Karaka) भाव कारक representing it.
०८. फलदीपिका
NOTES.
द्वावर्थकामाविह मारकाख्यौ तश्विरस्तत्र गतो बलाक्यः ।
इम्ति स्वपाके निधनेश्वरो वा बलेश्वरो वाप्यतिदुर्बलश्चेत् ।।
Also पराशर
जायाकुटुम्बकाधीशौ मारकौ परिकीर्तितौ ।
अष्टमस्थत्रिभागांशपतिस्थितगृहं शनौ ।
तदीशनवभागक्षं गते वा मरणं भवेत् ॥ ५१ ॥
Sloka 51. When Saturn goes to a house occupied
by the lord of a जेष्काण (Drekkana) of the 8th house from
the Lagna, death may happen. The same event may be
expected when Saturn passes through the राशि (Rasi)
owning the Navamsa occupied by the lord of the house
-in which is the owner of the द्रेष्काण (Drekkana) referred
to above.
NOTES.
This sloka also appears in फलदीपिका (Phaladeepika), but the
reading therelis अष्टमस्य (Ashtamasya) for अष्टमस्य (Ashtamastha.)
छिद्रग्रहाः
रन्धेश्वरो रन्ध्रयुक्तो रन्ध्रद्रष्टा खरेश्वरः ।
रन्ध्राधिपयुतश्चैव चतुःषष्ठयंशनायकः ॥ ५२ ॥
verses:
तत्तद्भावार्थकांमेशदशास्वन्तर्दशासु च ।
तत्सद्भावविनाशः स्यात् तद्युक्तेक्षितकारकैः ॥ ५० ॥

In the main dasa as well as in the sub-
sidiary dasa of the lord of the 2nd or the 7th place from
any bhava there will happen the destruction thereof by
(1) the planet occupying the bhava; (2) the one aspect-
ing it; or (3) the (bhava Karaka) भाव कारक representing it.
जायाकुटुम्बकाधीशौ मारकौ परिकीर्तितौ ।
अष्टमस्थत्रिभागांशपतिस्थितगृहं शनौ ।
तदीशनवभागक्षं गते वा मरणं भवेत् ॥ ५१ ॥

When Saturn goes to a house occupied
by the lord of a जेष्काण (Drekkana) of the 8th house from
the Lagna, death may happen. The same event may be
expected when Saturn passes through the राशि (Rasi)
owning the Navamsa occupied by the lord of the house
-in which is the owner of the द्रेष्काण (Drekkana) referred
to above.
रन्धेश्वरो रन्ध्रयुक्तो रन्ध्रद्रष्टा खरेश्वरः ।
रन्ध्राधिपयुतश्चैव चतुःषष्ठयंशनायकः ॥ ५२ ॥

title: पचमोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 53
पचमोऽध्यायः
267
रन्द्रेश्वराविशत्रश्च सप्त छिद्रग्रहाः स्मृताः ।
तेषां मध्ये बली यस्तु तस्य दाये मृर्ति वदेत् ॥ ५३ ॥
Slokas 52-53. The following seven are termed
चित्र (Chhidra) Grahas or planets of vulnerability: (1) the
lord of the 8th bhava; (2) the planet occupying the
same; (3) the planet aspecting the 8th; (4) the lord of
खर (Khara) i.e., 22nd Drekkana from that of the Lagna,
(vide sloka 56, infra); (5) the planet in conjunction
with the lord of the 8th; (6) the lord of the 64th Na-
vamsa from that occupied by the Moon; and (7) the
अतिशत्रु (Athisathru) of the lord of the 8th house.
Whichever of them is strongest, in the dasa of that
planet should an astrologer predict death
११. मन्त्रेश्वर
NOTES.
भन्दमान्धगुखरेशरन्ध्रपाखन्नवांशपतयोऽपि ये महाः ।
तेषु दुर्बलदशामृतिप्रदाः कष्टमे चरति सूर्यनन्दने ॥
मृतीशनाथ स्थित भर्भाशकेशयोः खरत्रिभागेश्वरयोवेळीयलोः ।
दशागमे मृत्युपयुक्तर्भाशकत्रिकोणगे देवगुरौ तनुक्षयः ॥
Also प्रश्नमार्ग
छप्न द्वा यदि जन्मतो मृतिपतिमृत्युस्थतद्वीक्षकौ
मन्दः क्ररहगाणपो गुलिकपस्तैर्युक्कराश्यंशपाः ।
राहुब्बैषु सुदुर्बलो जनुषि यो भावेनभीष्टे स्थितः
पापालेकितसंयुतोऽस्य हि दशा वाऽन्तर्दशा मृत्युदा ॥
पापानां चेहशायामपहृतिरसतां चिन्तनीयोऽत्रमृत्यु-
र्गामासर्व्हेश्वराणामपि निजजनिभादोषदः पाककालः ।
द्विभ्यार्दानां दशानां युगपदवस तिर्यत्र कालः स कहः
सर्वासां वा दशानामवसतिरशुभा दोषदानां विशेषात् ||
verses:
रन्द्रेश्वराविशत्रश्च सप्त छिद्रग्रहाः स्मृताः ।
तेषां मध्ये बली यस्तु तस्य दाये मृर्ति वदेत् ॥ ५३ ॥

The following seven are termed Chhidra (Chhidra) Grahas or planets of vulnerability: (1) the lord of the 8th bhava; (2) the planet occupying the same; (3) the planet aspecting the 8th; (4) the lord of खर (Khara) i.e., 22nd Drekkana from that of the Lagna, (vide sloka 56, infra); (5) the planet in conjunction with the lord of the 8th; (6) the lord of the 64th Navamsa from that occupied by the Moon; and (7) the अतिशत्रु (Athisathru) of the lord of the 8th house.
Whichever of them is strongest, in the dasa of that planet should an astrologer predict death
भन्दमान्धगुखरेशरन्ध्रपाखन्नवांशपतयोऽपि ये महाः ।
तेषु दुर्बलदशामृतिप्रदाः कष्टमे चरति सूर्यनन्दने ॥
मृतीशनाथ स्थित भर्भाशकेशयोः खरत्रिभागेश्वरयोवेळीयलोः ।
दशागमे मृत्युपयुक्तर्भाशकत्रिकोणगे देवगुरौ तनुक्षयः ॥

छप्न द्वा यदि जन्मतो मृतिपतिमृत्युस्थतद्वीक्षकौ
मन्दः क्ररहगाणपो गुलिकपस्तैर्युक्कराश्यंशपाः ।
राहुब्बैषु सुदुर्बलो जनुषि यो भावेनभीष्टे स्थितः
पापालेकितसंयुतोऽस्य हि दशा वाऽन्तर्दशा मृत्युदा ॥
पापानां चेहशायामपहृतिरसतां चिन्तनीयोऽत्रमृत्यु-
र्गामासर्व्हेश्वराणामपि निजजनिभादोषदः पाककालः ।
द्विभ्यार्दानां दशानां युगपदवस तिर्यत्र कालः स कहः
सर्वासां वा दशानामवसतिरशुभा दोषदानां विशेषात् ||

title: देक्काणस्वरूपम्
content:
268
Also फलदीपिका
बातकपारिजाते
रन्ध्रस्थरन्प्रेक्षकरन्ध्रनाथ रन्ध्रहगाणाधिपमान्दिभेशाः ।
दुःखप्रदास्तेष्वपि दुर्बलो यः स नाशकारी स्वदशापष्हारे ॥
तत्तद्भावाम्ययस्थस्य तद्भावाधीश्वरस्य वा ।
वीर्योपेतस्य खेटस्य पाके मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥ ५४ ॥
Adh. V
.i
Sloka 54. The death of the relative signified by
any particular bhava will without doubt take place in
the main dasa (1) of the planet occupying the 12th place
from that bhava or (2) of the planet owning it which-
ever is stronger.
NOTES.
! 
The reading of this Sloka in फलदापिका (Phaladipika) is as
follows:
तत्तद्भावाम्ययस्थस्य तद्भावव्ययपस्य च ।
वीर्यहीनस्य खेटस्य पाके मृत्युमवाप्मयात् ||
देक्काणस्वरूपम् ॥
कुलीरमीनालिगता हगाणा मध्यावसानप्रथमा भुजङ्गाः ।
अलिद्वितीयो मृगलेयपूर्वः क्रमेण पाशो निगलो विहङ्गः ॥ ५५ ॥
Sloka 55. The middlemost, the last and the first
Drekkanas respectively of Kataka, Meena and Vrischika
are termed सर्प (Sarpa) Drekkanas. These are also called
पाश-Pasa (noose) Drekkanas. The 2nd Drekkana of
Vrischika is styled निगड (Nigada-fetters) Drekkana.
The first Drekkana of Makara as well as of Simha is
termed पाक्षि (Pakshi-bird) Drekkana.
NOTES.
According to बलभद्र (Balabhadra) the first and second Drek-
kanas of कटक (Kataka), the first and second of वृश्चिक (Vrischika)
and the last of मीन (Meena) are सर्प (Sarpa) Drekkanas: For, he says:
verses:
रन्ध्रस्थरन्प्रेक्षकरन्ध्रनाथ रन्ध्रहगाणाधिपमान्दिभेशाः ।
दुःखप्रदास्तेष्वपि दुर्बलो यः स नाशकारी स्वदशापष्हारे ॥
तत्तद्भावाम्ययस्थस्य तद्भावाधीश्वरस्य वा ।
वीर्योपेतस्य खेटस्य पाके मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥ ५४ ॥

The death of the relative signified by
any particular bhava will without doubt take place in
the main dasa (1) of the planet occupying the 12th place
from that bhava or (2) of the planet owning it which-
ever is stronger.
तत्तद्भावाम्ययस्थस्य तद्भावव्ययपस्य च ।
वीर्यहीनस्य खेटस्य पाके मृत्युमवाप्मयात् ||

कुलीरमीनालिगता हगाणा मध्यावसानप्रथमा भुजङ्गाः ।
अलिद्वितीयो मृगलेयपूर्वः क्रमेण पाशो निगलो विहङ्गः ॥ ५५ ॥

The middlemost, the last and the first
Drekkanas respectively of Kataka, Meena and Vrischika
are termed सर्प (Sarpa) Drekkanas. These are also called
पाश-Pasa (noose) Drekkanas. The 2nd Drekkana of
Vrischika is styled निगड (Nigada-fetters) Drekkana.
The first Drekkana of Makara as well as of Simha is
termed पाक्षि (Pakshi-bird) Drekkana.

title: Chapter Five
content:
31. 56-57
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
269
"कर्कस्य प्रथमद्वितीयौ वृश्चिक्रस्य प्रथमद्वितीयौ मीनस्यान्त्स्यश्चैते पश्च सर्वग्रेकाणाः"
विलग्नजन्मद्रेकाणाद्यस्तु द्वाविंशतिः (कः१) खरः ।
सुधाकरोपगांशर्थात् चतुःषष्टयंशको भवेत् ॥ ५६ ॥
Sleka 56. खर (Khara) is the 22nd Drekkana from
that of the Lagna. The 64th Navamsa is reckoned from
that occupied by the Moon.
NOTES
It is evident that the 22nd देकाण (Drekkana) reckoned from
the लग्नद्रेकाण (Lagnadrekkana) is the first देक्काण (Drekkana) in the
8th house from the Lagna. The 64th नवांश (Navamsa) from that
occupied by the Moon means the first नवांश (Navamsa) in the 8th
house from the Moon.
लग्न पञ्चहतं च मान्दिसीहंत प्राणस्फुटं प्राणिनां
चन्द्रस्य स्फुटमष्टकेन गुणित देहं समान्दिस्फुटम् ।
सप्तप्नं गुलिकस्फुटं सह दिवानाथेन मृत्युर्भवेत्
तस्माञ्जविकलेबरैक्यविपुले जातश्चिरं जीवति ॥ ५७ ॥
Sloka 57. The figures for the rising sign multiplied
by 5 and superadded to those for मान्दि (Mandi) will give
the exact figures of what is called प्राण (Prana) i. 1. life of
living beings. The figures for the Moon multiplied by
8 and added to the figures for मान्दि (Mandi) get the
designation देह (Deha) or Body. Seven times the
figures for मान्दि (Mandi) joined to those of the Sun go
by the name of मृत्यु (Mrityu) or Death. Long lives the
person born at a time when the sum total of जीव (Jeeva)
and देह (Deha) i. e., life and body is in excess of मृत्यु
Mrityu) or Death.
Notes.
In finding the position of भान्दि (Mandi) the following from
Parasara पराशर will be helpful.
verses:
“कर्कस्य प्रथमद्वितीयौ वृश्चिक्रस्य प्रथमद्वितीयौ मीनस्यान्त्स्यश्चैते पश्च सर्वग्रेकाणाः”
विलग्नजन्मद्रेकाणाद्यस्तु द्वाविंशतिः (कः१) खरः ।
सुधाकरोपगांशर्थात् चतुःषष्टयंशको भवेत् ॥ ५६ ॥

Sloka 56. खर (Khara) is the 22nd Drekkana from
that of the Lagna. The 64th Navamsa is reckoned from
that occupied by the Moon.

लग्न पञ्चहतं च मान्दिसीहंत प्राणस्फुटं प्राणिनां
चन्द्रस्य स्फुटमष्टकेन गुणित देहं समान्दिस्फुटम् ।
सप्तप्नं गुलिकस्फुटं सह दिवानाथेन मृत्युर्भवेत्
तस्माञ्जविकलेबरैक्यविपुले जातश्चिरं जीवति ॥ ५७ ॥

Sloka 57. The figures for the rising sign multiplied
by 5 and superadded to those for मान्दि (Mandi) will give
the exact figures of what is called प्राण (Prana) i. 1. life of
living beings. The figures for the Moon multiplied by
8 and added to the figures for मान्दि (Mandi) get the
designation देह (Deha) or Body. Seven times the
figures for मान्दि (Mandi) joined to those of the Sun go
by the name of मृत्यु (Mrityu) or Death. Long lives the
person born at a time when the sum total of जीव (Jeeva)
and देह (Deha) i. e., life and body is in excess of मृत्यु
Mrityu) or Death.

content:
270
K
बातकपारिआते
रविवारादिशन्यन्तं गुछिकादि निरूप्यते ।
दिवसानष्टधा कृत्वा वारेशाङ्गणयेत् क्रमात् ||
अष्टमांशो निरीशः स्यात् शन्यंशो गुलिकः स्मृतः ।
रात्रिरप्यष्टधा भक्ता वारेशात्पञ्चमादितः ॥
गणयेदष्टमः खण्डो निष्पतिः परिकीर्तितः ।
शन्यंशे गुलिकः प्रोक्तः गुर्वशे यमकण्टकः ॥
भौमांशे मृत्युरादिष्टः रव्यंशे कालसंशकः ।
सौभ्यांशेऽर्द्धप्रहरकः ॥
Adh. V
The following is the rule for finding the times of (Gulika) गुलिक
and others on the several week-days: Divide the day into 8 parts..
The lords of the first 7 parts are the 7 planets counted in order
from the lord of the day; the 8th portion is lordless. Saturn's
portion in each day is called गुलिक (Gulika).
Nights are similarly divided into 8 portions or muhurtas.
The lords of the first 7 muhurtas are the 7 planets counted from
the lord of the fifth week-day from the day chosen; the 8th portion
is without a lord Here again Saturn's muhurta is गुलिक (Gulika).
Jupiter's muhurta is styled यमकण्टक (Yamakantaka); that of Mars
is termed मृत्यु (Mrityu). The Sun's muhurta is called काल (Kala);
Mercury's, अर्द्धप्रहर (Ardhaprahara). The position of गुलिक (Gulika)
and others is assigned at the end of their respective muhurtas.、
For the horoscope taken for illustration in page 238, the posi-
tion of मान्दि (Mandi) is thus found out:
The time of birth was Friday night. The first Muhurta on
Friday night belongs to Mars, the lord of the 5th weekday from
Friday. Therefore गुलिक (Gulika) & e. Saturn's muhurta is the 5th.
The length of Friday night in question is given to be 29 घ. 5 वि.
Therefore each muhurta is 3 घ. 38125 वि. The 5th muhurta ends
at 18 घ. 16.635 वि. Gulika's position is 10 signs, 2° 47' 54
corresponding to this time. Similarly the positions of अर्धप्रदर (Ardha
prahara) etc. may be found. [Vide also notes on II-6 supra.]
In the same example, the Lagna is 0-14°-31′-46." Multi-
plying by 5, we get 2-12-38'-50." Adding मान्दि (Mandi)
10-2°-47-54," we get for प्राण (Prana) 12-15°-26-44." (A)
verses:
रविवारादिशन्यन्तं गुछिकादि निरूप्यते ।
दिवसानष्टधा कृत्वा वारेशाङ्गणयेत् क्रमात् ||
अष्टमांशो निरीशः स्यात् शन्यंशो गुलिकः स्मृतः ।
रात्रिरप्यष्टधा भक्ता वारेशात्पञ्चमादितः ॥
गणयेदष्टमः खण्डो निष्पतिः परिकीर्तितः ।
शन्यंशे गुलिकः प्रोक्तः गुर्वशे यमकण्टकः ॥
भौमांशे मृत्युरादिष्टः रव्यंशे कालसंशकः ।
सौभ्यांशेऽर्द्धप्रहरकः ॥

The following is the rule for finding the times of (Gulika) गुलिक and others on the several week-days: Divide the day into 8 parts. The lords of the first 7 parts are the 7 planets counted in order from the lord of the day; the 8th portion is lordless. Saturn's portion in each day is called गुलिक (Gulika).

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
31. 58-59
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
971
The Moon is 9-14°-29-39." Multiplying by 8, we get
75-25°-57′-12." Adding मान्दि (Mandi) 10-2°-47′-54",
we get for देह (Deha) 85-28°-45′-6." (B).
Again multiply (मान्दि) Mandi's position by 7
we get 70-19°-45-18". Adding the Sun 0-172-43-30"
we get for मृत्यु (Mrityu 71-7°-28′-48." (C)
प्राण (Prana) or जीव (Jeeva) plus देह (Deha)=98-14°-11′-50."
=(D) This is greater than मृत्यु (Mrityu) (C),
Adding प्राण (Prana), देह (Deha) and मृत्यु (Mrityu). i. 6. A+B
+C we have 169-21°-40′-38." So that when Saturn is in
1-21°-40′-38" or transits Vrishabha there is Death. This is
found to be correct as Saturn was then retrograde in Rohini,
०८. प्रश्नमार्ग
लग्नेन्यू मामदानायां हत्वा मान्दि क्षिपेद्वयोः ।
प्राणदेहौ क्रमात् स्यातां पुनर्मान्दिः सुतावितः ।
भानुयुक्तो भवेन्मृत्युर्विलिखेत् श्रीनिमानपि ॥
जीवमृत्युतनुयोगशारीगे गोचरेण रविजे धनक्षयः ।
तत्रिकोणगृहगेऽथवा नृणां तनवांशकयुते मृतिं वदेत् । ५८॥
Sloka 58. When Saturn in his progress through
his orbit arrives at the sign indicated by the total of
देह (Deha), जीव (Jeeva) and मृत्यु (Mrityu), there is waste
of money. When Saturn is in a triangular sign from
the Rasi referred to abovejor in a Navamsa owned by the
same, the astrologer must predict death.
भावत्रिकोणगे मन्दे भावनाशं वदेद्वधः ।
भावाधिपतिकोणे वा गुरौ प्राप्त मृतिर्भवेत् ॥ ५९ ॥
Sloka 59. When Saturn arrives at a triangular
sign from the आयुर्भाव (Ayurbhava), the astrologer should
predict the loss thereof. The
same event, i. e., death
will take place when Jupiter arrives at a triangular sign
from where the lord of the मायुमावे (Ayurbhava) is.

272
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
लग्नार्कमान्दिस्फुटयोगराशेरधीश्वरे यद्भवनोपगस्तु ।
तद्राशिसंस्थे पुरुहूतवन्धे तत्कोणगे वा मृतिमेति जातः ॥ ६० ॥
Sloka 60. Find the house occupied by the lord of.
the sign indicated by the aggregate of the figures for the
Lagna, the Sun and Mandi. When Jupiter arrives in
his progress through the orbit at the Rasi found as
above or in a triangular sign thereof, the native meets
with death.
NOTES.
This as well as the next six slokas are also quoted in फलदीपिका
(Phaladeepika).
स्फुटे विलग्मनाथस्य विशोध्य यमकण्टकम् ।
तद्राशिनवभागस्ये जीवे मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥ ६१ ॥
Sloka 61. Subtract the figures of the Yamakantaka
(यमकण्टक) from those of the rising sign and find out the
Rasi and its Navamsa indicated by the difference. When
Jupiter comes to occupy this Navamsa in the Rasi thus
found, death will take place without doubt.
मान्दिस्फुटे मानुसुतं विशोध्य राश्यंशकोणे रविजे मृतिः स्यात् ।
धूमादिपंचग्रहयोग राशिद्रेकाणयातेऽर्कसुते च मृत्युः ॥ ६२ ॥
Sloka 62. Subtract the figures for Saturn from
those of मान्दि (Mandi) and find out the Rasi and its
Navamsa indicated by the difference. When Saturn
arrives at a triangular position from this Navamsa of
the Rasi thus found, death will take place. The same
event will also happen when Saturn arrives at the parti
cular देखाण (Drekkana) of the particular Rasi indi-
cated by the aggregate of the figures of the five (उपग्रह)
Upagrahas reckoned from धूम (Dhuma), (vide Adhyaya
II-S/.6).
verses: लग्नार्कमान्दिस्फुटयोगराशेरधीश्वरे यद्भवनोपगस्तु । तद्राशिसंस्थे पुरुहूतवन्धे तत्कोणगे वा मृतिमेति जातः ॥ ६० ॥

Sloka 60. Find the house occupied by the lord of the sign indicated by the aggregate of the figures for the Lagna, the Sun and Mandi. When Jupiter arrives in his progress through the orbit at the Rasi found as above or in a triangular sign thereof, the native meets with death.
स्फुटे विलग्मनाथस्य विशोध्य यमकण्टकम् । तद्राशिनवभागस्ये जीवे मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥ ६१ ॥

Sloka 61. Subtract the figures of the Yamakantaka (यमकण्टक) from those of the rising sign and find out the Rasi and its Navamsa indicated by the difference. When Jupiter comes to occupy this Navamsa in the Rasi thus found, death will take place without doubt.
मान्दिस्फुटे मानुसुतं विशोध्य राश्यंशकोणे रविजे मृतिः स्यात् । धूमादिपंचग्रहयोग राशिद्रेकाणयातेऽर्कसुते च मृत्युः ॥ ६२ ॥

Sloka 62. Subtract the figures for Saturn from those of मान्दि (Mandi) and find out the Rasi and its Navamsa indicated by the difference. When Saturn arrives at a triangular position from this Navamsa of the Rasi thus found, death will take place. The same event will also happen when Saturn arrives at the particular देखाण (Drekkana) of the particular Rasi indicated by the aggregate of the figures of the five (उपग्रह) Upagrahas reckoned from धूम (Dhuma), (vide Adhyaya II-S/.6).

title: Fifth Chapter
content:
81. 63
पश्चमोऽच्चापः
273
NOTES.
(The five Upagrahas reckoned from धूम (Dhuma) are (1) धूम
(Dhuma), (2) अर्धप्रहर (Ardhaprahara), (3) यमकण्टक (Yamakantaka),
(4) कोरण्ड (Kodanda) and (5) मान्दि (Mandi). For finding their posi-
tions, see notes on sloka 57 above and II-6 supra (page 47).
The figure for मन्दि (Mandi) is 10- 2°47′-54".
Subtracting Saturn '0-27°55′-41"
we get 9-4°-52-13" which means
Makara) Rasi and (Kumbha) Navamsa. When Saturn passes
through a Rasi trine to Makara and a Navamsa trine to Kumbha,
death may be predicted.
मान्दिस्फुटोदितनवांशगतेऽमरेज्ये
तद्वादशांशसहिते दिननाथसूनौ ।
द्रेकाणकोणभवने दिनपे च मृत्यु-
लग्मन्दुमान्दियुतभांशगतोदये स्यात् ॥ ६३ ॥
Sloka 63. Ascertain the Navamsa, the Dwada-
samsa and the Drekkana indicated by the figures for
Mandi When Jupiter arrives at the Navamsa, Saturn at
the Dwadasamsa and the Sun at a triangular sign from
the Drekkana in question, and the rising Navamsa is that
denoted by the aggregate of the figures for the Lagna,
the Moon and Mandi, death will take place.
NOTES.
Mandi is in 10-2-47-54; that is, he is in Tula Na-
vamsa Kumbha Dwadasamsa and Kumbha Drekkana. According
to this sloka, death may be expected when Jupiter arrives in a
Navamsa trine to Tula; when Saturn arrives in a Dwadasamsa
trine to Kumbha and the Sun in a Drekkana trine to Kumbha.
But cf. प्रश्नमार्ग
आतस्याद्धि सपद्महो गतनिशा मान्दिप्रमाणाइये
रात्रौ प्राग्दिनमान्दिरेव न परं तद्वाशिनाथालये ।
मम्दोमुष्य नवांशपाश्रितगृहे मृत्युप्रदायी गुरुः
भानुशंदशभागपाश्रितगृहे त्रिंशशिपर्ने शशी ॥
35
verses:
मान्दिस्फुटोदितनवांशगतेऽमरेज्ये
तद्वादशांशसहिते दिननाथसूनौ ।
द्रेकाणकोणभवने दिनपे च मृत्यु-
लग्मन्दुमान्दियुतभांशगतोदये स्यात् ॥

Ascertain the Navamsa, the Dwada-
samsa and the Drekkana indicated by the figures for
Mandi When Jupiter arrives at the Navamsa, Saturn at
the Dwadasamsa and the Sun at a triangular sign from
the Drekkana in question, and the rising Navamsa is that
denoted by the aggregate of the figures for the Lagna,
the Moon and Mandi, death will take place.
आतस्याद्धि सपद्महो गतनिशा मान्दिप्रमाणाइये
रात्रौ प्राग्दिनमान्दिरेव न परं तद्वाशिनाथालये ।
मम्दोमुष्य नवांशपाश्रितगृहे मृत्युप्रदायी गुरुः
भानुशंदशभागपाश्रितगृहे त्रिंशशिपर्ने शशी ॥

content:
274
जांतकपारिजाते
Adh. V
विलग्नमान्दिस्फुटयोगभांशं निर्याणमासं प्रवदन्ति तज्ज्ञाः ।
निर्याणचन्द्रो गुलिकेन्दुयोगो रुन्नं विलग्नार्किसुतेन्दुयोगम् ॥ ६४ ॥
Sloka 64. Find out the Rasi and its Navamsa
indicated by the sum total of the figures for the Lagna
and मान्दि (Mandi). This Rai and its Navamsa, say
the Astrologers, will give the clue to the particular
month and the portion thereof in a year in which a
person's death may be expected to happen; (i.e., when
the Sun arrives at this particular Rasi and the particular
Navamsa thereof the person will die). The Moon at
the time of the decease will occupy the Rasi indicated
by the total of the figures for Mandi and the Moon; and
the rising sign will be that denoted by the total of the
figures for the Lagna, Mandi and the Moon.
Notes.
First half. But see also the following quotations;
(1) प्रश्नमार्ग
अष्टमेशाश्रितं राशिमावस त्यहिमत्विषि |
जन्मतारी विलग्नस्थ तारकी वा मृतिर्भवेत् ॥
(2) अनुष्ठानपद्धतिः
आत्माकाशकभात्रकोण भगते सूर्ये चरस्थः स चेष्
यथर्कस्थिर मेऽष्टमेशनवभागेशर्क्ष (नवभागात्रि) कोणस्थिते ।
लग्नेश स्थनवांशर। शिसहिते तस्य त्रिकोणेऽ (प) थवा
सूर्ये मृत्युमुशन्ति यद्यभयगः सोयं भवेज्जन्मनि ॥
Lotter half. f. प्रश्नमार्ग
सूर्याश्रितक्षगे चन्द्रे रन्धेशाश्रितवेरेमनः ।
त्रिकोणोपगते चेन्दौ राद्धारूठोडुनस्तथा ॥
रन्धेशाधिष्ठतोडौ वा निर्दिष्टं मरणं नृणाम् ।
धनेशः श्रितराशेर्वा तस्य सप्तमभस्य वा ॥
त्रिकोणस्थे धनेशांशराशिगे वा विधौ मृतिः ।
निजजन्मनि यस्मिन् भे गुलिकखत्रगे विधौ ॥
verses:
अष्टमेशाश्रितं राशिमावस त्यहिमत्विषि |
जन्मतारी विलग्नस्थ तारकी वा मृतिर्भवेत् ॥

आत्माकाशकभात्रकोण भगते सूर्ये चरस्थः स चेष्
यथर्कस्थिर मेऽष्टमेशनवभागेशर्क्ष (नवभागात्रि) कोणस्थिते ।
लग्नेश स्थनवांशर। शिसहिते तस्य त्रिकोणेऽ (प) थवा
सूर्ये मृत्युमुशन्ति यद्यभयगः सोयं भवेज्जन्मनि ॥

सूर्याश्रितक्षगे चन्द्रे रन्धेशाश्रितवेरेमनः ।
त्रिकोणोपगते चेन्दौ राद्धारूठोडुनस्तथा ॥
रन्धेशाधिष्ठतोडौ वा निर्दिष्टं मरणं नृणाम् ।
धनेशः श्रितराशेर्वा तस्य सप्तमभस्य वा ॥
त्रिकोणस्थे धनेशांशराशिगे वा विधौ मृतिः ।
निजजन्मनि यस्मिन् भे गुलिकखत्रगे विधौ ॥

title: पञ्चमो ध्यायः
content:
Sl. 65-67
पञ्चमो ध्यायः
275
गुलिकं रविखूनुं च गुणित्वा नवसंख्यया ।
उभयोरैक्यराश्यंशगृहगे रविजे मृतिः ॥ ६५ ॥
Sloka 65. Multiply by 9 the figures for मान्दि
(Mandi) and Saturn. Add the two products and find
out the particular Rasi and its Navamsa which the total
indicates. When Saturn passes through this, death will
happen.
षष्ठावसान रन्धेशस्फुटैक्यभवनं गते ।
तत्रिकोणोपगे वाऽपि मन्दे मृत्युभयं नृणाम् ॥ ६६ ॥
Sloka 66. Find out the sign of the zodiac indicated
by the sum total of the figures for the lords of the 6th,
the 12th and the 3th bhavas. When Saturn is in this
house or in a triangular sign from it, death has to be
apprehended.
८. जातकादेश
रिपुनिधनान्त्यपतीनां लग्नाधिपगुलिक भानुजानां वा ।
स्फुट योग जातराशित्रि कोणगे भानुजे भवेन्मरणम् ॥
जीवे नन्दहते विरिञ्चिगुणितं मन्दं च मान्दिस्फुटं
संयोज्यं पुनरङ्कवृद्धिमिनजं मन्दात्मजं योजयेत् ।
तद्देवेशपुरोहितस्फुटचयप्राप्तं नवांशं गते
जीवे गोचरगे यदा यदि नृर्णा निर्याणकालो भवेत् ॥६७
Sloka 67. Add nine times the figures for Saturn
and मान्दि (Mandi) to nine times the figures for Jupiter;
repeat this process again. Adding the two sets of figures
relating to Saturn, Mandi and Jupiter, find out the Rasi
and its Navamsa indicated by the total obtained. When
Jupiter progressing through its orbit arrives at the
particular Rasi and its Navamsa above found, the person
concerned will have his exit from the world.
verses:
गुलिकं रविखूनुं च गुणित्वा नवसंख्यया ।
उभयोरैक्यराश्यंशगृहगे रविजे मृतिः ॥

Multiply by 9 the figures for मान्दि
(Mandi) and Saturn. Add the two products and find
out the particular Rasi and its Navamsa which the total
indicates. When Saturn passes through this, death will
happen.
षष्ठावसान रन्धेशस्फुटैक्यभवनं गते ।
तत्रिकोणोपगे वाऽपि मन्दे मृत्युभयं नृणाम् ॥

Find out the sign of the zodiac indicated
by the sum total of the figures for the lords of the 6th,
the 12th and the 3th bhavas. When Saturn is in this
house or in a triangular sign from it, death has to be
apprehended.
रिपुनिधनान्त्यपतीनां लग्नाधिपगुलिक भानुजानां वा ।
स्फुट योग जातराशित्रि कोणगे भानुजे भवेन्मरणम् ॥

जीवे नन्दहते विरिञ्चिगुणितं मन्दं च मान्दिस्फुटं
संयोज्यं पुनरङ्कवृद्धिमिनजं मन्दात्मजं योजयेत् ।
तद्देवेशपुरोहितस्फुटचयप्राप्तं नवांशं गते
जीवे गोचरगे यदा यदि नृर्णा निर्याणकालो भवेत् ॥

Add nine times the figures for Saturn
and मान्दि (Mandi) to nine times the figures for Jupiter;
repeat this process again. Adding the two sets of figures
relating to Saturn, Mandi and Jupiter, find out the Rasi
and its Navamsa indicated by the total obtained. When
Jupiter progressing through its orbit arrives at the
particular Rasi and its Navamsa above found, the person
concerned will have his exit from the world.

title: Adh. V
content:
976
बातकपारिआते
भानुस्फुटे नवहते रविजं च मान्दि
हत्वा ग्रहैस्तदिनराशिगणेषु योज्यम् ।
मान्दि पुनश्च नत्रकेन हतं च युञ्ज्यात्
तद्राशिकांशगतपूषणि मृत्युकालः ॥ ६८ ॥
Adh. V
Sloka 68. Add nine times the figures for Saturn
and मान्दि (Mandi) to nine times the figures for the Sun.
To this sum add again nine times the figures for मान्दि
(Mandi) joined to nine times the figures for the Sun.
When the Sun passes through the particular Rasi and
the particular Navamsa indicated by the grand total, the
demise of the person concerned will take place.
सुतेशसंयुक्तनभश्चरराणां दशाब्दसंख्या दिननायकाप्ताः ।

and divide the sum total by 12. The remainder will
indicate the month in which, astrologers say, the death
of the person concerned will take place,

the Moon. Find the particular राशि (Rasi) and नवांश (Na-

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
S1. 41
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
277
vamsa) indicated by the grand total. When the Moon
passes through the (Risi) and नवांश (Navamsa) thus
found, the death of the person concerned will take place.
जातोऽद्धि चेदर्कशनिस्फुटक्य-
तारादिनिर्याणदशा प्रकल्प्या ।
तारेशराहुस्फुटयोगतारा
पूर्वा दशाऽनिष्टकरा रजन्याम् ॥ ७१ ॥
Sloka 71. If the birth of a person be during day.
time, his exit from the world is to be thus determined :
Add the figures for the Sun and Saturn; and find out
the asterism नक्षत्र (Nakshatra) and the portion thereof
indicated by this total. In the महादशा (Mahadasa) of this
asterism (vide Adhyaya 18, sloka 3, infra), find out
which period corresponds to the particular portion of
the star already found. The death of the person con-
cerned will occur at this point of time.
If the birth be during night, add the figures for the
Moon and Rahu; ascertain as before the particular period
of the Mahadasa corresponding to the portion of the
asterism indicated by the total. This will give the time
of निर्याण (Niryana.
NOTES.
The following sloka from गर्न (Garga) gives another clue for
ascertaining the निर्वाण (Niryane) of any person.
यो राशिगुलिकोपेतस्तत् ‌स्त्रि कोण गते शनैा ।
मरर्ण निशि जातानों दिन (वि) जानां तदस्त के ।।
निर्याणहेतुः ॥
उदद्याद्वाविंशतितमं द्रेकाणं कारणं मृत्योः ।
तस्याधिपस्य निर्माण सूचयेद्विधिवित्तमः ॥ ७२ ॥

पूर्वा दशाऽनिष्टकरा रजन्याम् ॥ ७१ ॥

time, his exit from the world is to be thus determined :

The death of the person is indicated by the 22nd Drekkana.
The lord of that Drekkana indicates the cause of death.

title: CAUSE OF A PERSON'S EXIT FROM THE WORLD.
content:
278
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. V.
CAUSE OF A PERSON'S EXIT FROM THE WORLD.
Sloka 72. The 22nd Drekkana from the लमद्रेकाण
(Lagna drekkana) is the cause of death. An astrologer
thoroughly acquainted with the application of the prin
ciples of his science should indicate the exit from the
world (निर्माण-Niryanı) of the person concerned in
reference to the lord of the 22nd Drekkana aforesaid.
(vide Adhyaya 5-A SI. 11).
cf. Also साराबली
NOTES.
उदयाद्वाविंशतितम देक्काणो भवति कारंण मृत्योः ।
तस्याधिपतिभवो वा निर्वाणं सूचयेत् स्वगुणैः ॥
Also फलदीपिका
लम्मादष्टमराशेः स्वभावदोषोद्भवं वदेन्मृत्युम् ।
निधनेशस्य नवांशस्थितराशिनिमित्तदोष जनितं वो ॥
Vide also Adhyaya V. A. Sloka 11 infra. For the condition
as to when this sloka has to be applied, see latter half of sloka 75
infra.
ज्ञेया जन्मनि यन्नवांशकगतो मान्दिस्तदीयास्त के
राशौ तिष्ठति चेत् शुभस्तु बलवान् सौख्येन नूनं मृतिः ।
भूपुत्रे समरेण सूर्वतनये चोरादिभिर्दानवैः
सर्पाद्यैश्च तथा रवौ नृपभयात्क्षीणोडुवे तोयजात् ॥ ७३ ॥
Sloka 73. If a strong benefic planet occupies the
7th house from the Navamsa where मान्दि (Mandi) is at
a person's birth, that person's death is sure to come
about happily. But if Mrs be in such a position, the
death will be in battle. If Saturn should occupy the
same position the death would be inf'icted by thieves,
demons, snakes and other reptiles. 'If the Sun or the
waning Moon hold the above position, the death would
verses:

(Lagna drekkana) is the cause of death. An astrologer

ciples of his science should indicate the exit from the
world (निर्माण-Niryanı) of the person concerned in
reference to the lord of the 22nd Drekkana aforesaid.
(vide Adhyaya 5-A SI. 11).

उदयाद्वाविंशतितम देक्काणो भवति कारंण मृत्योः ।
तस्याधिपतिभवो वा निर्वाणं सूचयेत् स्वगुणैः ॥

लम्मादष्टमराशेः स्वभावदोषोद्भवं वदेन्मृत्युम् ।
निधनेशस्य नवांशस्थितराशिनिमित्तदोष जनितं वो ॥

ज्ञेया जन्मनि यन्नवांशकगतो मान्दिस्तदीयास्त के
राशौ तिष्ठति चेत् शुभस्तु बलवान् सौख्येन नूनं मृतिः ।
भूपुत्रे समरेण सूर्वतनये चोरादिभिर्दानवैः
सर्पाद्यैश्च तथा रवौ नृपभयात्क्षीणोडुवे तोयजात् ॥ ७३ ॥

Sloka 73. If a strong benefic planet occupies the
7th house from the Navamsa where मान्दि (Mandi) is at
a person's birth, that person's death is sure to come
about happily. But if Mrs be in such a position, the
death will be in battle. If Saturn should occupy the
same position the death would be inf'icted by thieves,
demons, snakes and other reptiles. 'If the Sun or the
waning Moon hold the above position, the death would

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 84
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
279
proceed from the dreadful doom of a sovereign or from
an aquatic being.
८। प्रश्नमार्ग
मान्धारूढनवांश काम गृहगाः सौम्याः सुमृत्युप्रदाः
पापास्तत्र गतास्तु दुर्मूतिकरास्तेष्वर्क उर्वीपतेः ।
क्षीणन्दुः सलिले युधि क्षितिसुतः सूर्यात्मजो वञ्चना
ब्राहुः पन्नगदंशमान्मरणदो यद्वः विषस्पर्शनात् ।
रन्धं येन निरीक्षितं बलवता तद्धातुकोपान्मृतिः
सूर्यादग्निजलायुधज्वरकफक्षुत्तट्‌कृतैश्वामयैः ।
लग्नादष्टमधामपे तनुगते कालस्य यद्देहजैः
छिद्रांशे च चरस्थिरोभयगते देशान्तरे स्व पथि ॥ ७४ ॥
Sloka 74. When a strong planet aspects the 8th
bhava death results as the effect of the inflammation of
the humour belonging to that planet. If the aspecting
planet be the Sun, it will be due to an ailment caused by
a burn; if the Moon, from a disease caused by water;
if Mars, from a disorder arising from a hurt inflicted by
a weapon; if Mercury, from fever; if Jupiter, from
phlegmatic affection; if Venus, from famine; lastly if
Saturn be the aspecting planet, the death will arise from
thirst. If the lord of the 8th bhava occupy the Lagna,
the disease leading to death will be located in that part
of the body of the कालपुरुष Kalapurusha which the sign
constituting the 8th bhava represents. If the 8th bhava
be a moveable sign, death will happen in a foreign
country; if a fixed sign, it will take place in the person's
native place; if a dual sign, it will occur on a road.
NOTES
First quarters of. सारावली
यो बल्युक्तो निधनं पश्यति तद्धासुकोपजो मृत्युः ।
तस्संयुक्तस्तमुजो बहुभिर्वलिभिर्वहुप्रकारः स्यात् ॥
verses:
मान्धारूढनवांश काम गृहगाः सौम्याः सुमृत्युप्रदाः
पापास्तत्र गतास्तु दुर्मूतिकरास्तेष्वर्क उर्वीपतेः ।
क्षीणन्दुः सलिले युधि क्षितिसुतः सूर्यात्मजो वञ्चना
ब्राहुः पन्नगदंशमान्मरणदो यद्वः विषस्पर्शनात् ।
रन्धं येन निरीक्षितं बलवता तद्धातुकोपान्मृतिः
सूर्यादग्निजलायुधज्वरकफक्षुत्तट्‌कृतैश्वामयैः ।
लग्नादष्टमधामपे तनुगते कालस्य यद्देहजैः
छिद्रांशे च चरस्थिरोभयगते देशान्तरे स्व पथि ॥ ७४ ॥

When a strong planet aspects the 8th
bhava death results as the effect of the inflammation of
the humour belonging to that planet. If the aspecting
planet be the Sun, it will be due to an ailment caused by
a burn; if the Moon, from a disease caused by water;
if Mars, from a disorder arising from a hurt inflicted by
a weapon; if Mercury, from fever; if Jupiter, from
phlegmatic affection; if Venus, from famine; lastly if
Saturn be the aspecting planet, the death will arise from
thirst. If the lord of the 8th bhava occupy the Lagna,
the disease leading to death will be located in that part
of the body of the कालपुरुष Kalapurusha which the sign
constituting the 8th bhava represents. If the 8th bhava
be a moveable sign, death will happen in a foreign
country; if a fixed sign, it will take place in the person's
native place; if a dual sign, it will occur on a road.
यो बल्युक्तो निधनं पश्यति तद्धासुकोपजो मृत्युः ।
तस्संयुक्तस्तमुजो बहुभिर्वलिभिर्वहुप्रकारः स्यात् ॥

content:
280
बातक पारिजाते
Adh. V
For the humours of the several planets, see slokas 53-59 of
Adhyaya, II. Supra.
Second quarter. cf. यवन
दिनकर प्रमुखौर्नधना। मितैर्भवति मृत्युरिति प्रषयेत् क्रमात् ।
अनछतो जछतः करवालतो ज्वरबलेन रुजा क्षुधया तृषा ॥
For the whole sloka, cf. गुणाकर
वीर्यान्वितः पश्यति मृत्युभं यस्तद्धातुकोपान्सुतिमामनन्ति ।
तथककालाख्यनरस्य गात्रे तस्मिन् प्रदेशे बहुभिर्बहूनाम् ॥
सूर्यादिभिर्निधनगैर्मिधनं हुताशतोयायुधश्वरजमामयजं क्रमेण ।
क्षुत्तृष्कृतं च चरभे परदेशगस्य तस्यस्थिरे स्वाविशये पथि च द्विमूतौं ॥
शून्यागारे रन्ध्रराशौ बलिष्ठरादित्याद्यैर्वीक्षिते खेचरेन्द्रैः ।
नो चेच्छिद्रस्थानयातैश्च नो चेत् तद्रेकाणस्वामिना मृत्युमेति ॥७५
Sloka 75. If the sign representing the 8th bhava
be an unoccupied house but aspected by the Sun and
other planets, death will be brought about by the influ
ence of the strongest of the aspecting planets. If planets
do not aspect but occupy it, they will be the authors of
death. If neither of these conditions exist, the person
will come by his death through the lord of the Drekkana
representing the 8th bhava (i.e. the 22nd Drekkana).
रव्यादिखेठनिजधातुभवामयेन जातस्तदीयखलकिंकरपीडया वा ।
रन्धेऽशुभग्रहयुतेऽतिविलापहेतुं सौख्येन मृत्युमुपयाति शुभोपयाते ।।
Sicka 76. If the house representing the 8th bhava
be occupied by a malefic planet, the person born mets
with very lamentable death either by a disease due to
the it flammation of the humours of the planets or by
the hurt inflitted by cruel persons who are the vile ins
truments and agents of the malign planets. But if the
8th bhava be occupied by a benefic planet, the person
will die happily. Cf. Slokas 73 and 74 supra.
verses:
दिनकर प्रमुखौर्नधना। मितैर्भवति मृत्युरिति प्रषयेत् क्रमात् ।
अनछतो जछतः करवालतो ज्वरबलेन रुजा क्षुधया तृषा ॥

वीर्यान्वितः पश्यति मृत्युभं यस्तद्धातुकोपान्सुतिमामनन्ति ।
तथककालाख्यनरस्य गात्रे तस्मिन् प्रदेशे बहुभिर्बहूनाम् ॥
सूर्यादिभिर्निधनगैर्मिधनं हुताशतोयायुधश्वरजमामयजं क्रमेण ।
क्षुत्तृष्कृतं च चरभे परदेशगस्य तस्यस्थिरे स्वाविशये पथि च द्विमूतौं ॥
शून्यागारे रन्ध्रराशौ बलिष्ठरादित्याद्यैर्वीक्षिते खेचरेन्द्रैः ।
नो चेच्छिद्रस्थानयातैश्च नो चेत् तद्रेकाणस्वामिना मृत्युमेति ॥७५

If the sign representing the 8th bhava
be an unoccupied house but aspected by the Sun and
other planets, death will be brought about by the influ
ence of the strongest of the aspecting planets. If planets
do not aspect but occupy it, they will be the authors of
death. If neither of these conditions exist, the person
will come by his death through the lord of the Drekkana
representing the 8th bhava (i.e. the 22nd Drekkana).
रव्यादिखेठनिजधातुभवामयेन जातस्तदीयखलकिंकरपीडया वा ।
रन्धेऽशुभग्रहयुतेऽतिविलापहेतुं सौख्येन मृत्युमुपयाति शुभोपयाते ।।

If the house representing the 8th bhava
be occupied by a malefic planet, the person born meets
with very lamentable death either by a disease due to
the inflammation of the humours of the planets or by
the hurt inflicted by cruel persons who are the vile ins
truments and agents of the malign planets. But if the
8th bhava be occupied by a benefic planet, the person
will die happily. Cf. Slokas 73 and 74 supra.

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 77-79
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
281
तुलायां रुधिरे याते वृषभस्थे दिवाकरे ।
नन्द्रे मन्दगृहं प्राप्ते विण्मध्ये मरणं भवेत् ॥ ७७ ॥
Sloka 77. If at a person's birth Mars occupy Libra
and the Sun Taurus and the Moon a sign owned by
Saturn, the astrologer may predict such a person's death
in the midst of fæces and filth. (cf. Adhyaya 5 A.-Sl. 8).
NOTES
This sloka appears in सारावली (Saravali). But the reading of
the second quarter is different, viz. कुजक्षे भास्करे स्थिते
बलिना शनिना दृष्टे क्षीणेन्दौ निधनाश्रिते ।
गुदाक्षिरुपडिया वा मृत्युः शस्त्रकृतो भवेत् ॥ ७८ ॥
Sloka 78. If the waning Moon occupying the 8th
bhava be aspected by Saturn in strength, death will take
place through the agony caused by a disease of the anus
or the eye, or through an operation by means of an
instrument.
लग्नाच्छिद्रत्रिकोण स्थैरर्कारार्किनिशाकरैः ।
मृत्युः स्याच्छैलवोतन वज्रकुड्यादिभिश्च वा ॥ ७९ ॥
Sloka 79. If the Sun, Mars, Saturn and the Moon
occupy the 8th bhava or a triangular position from the
Lagna, the death of the person will take place from the
effects of a strong mountain storm, the fall of a thunder-
bolt, a wall and the like.
NOTES.
A slightly different reading is given in सारावली viz
बलिना कुजेन दृष्टे क्षीणेन्दौ रन्ध्रगेऽर्कंजे मृत्युः ।
गुल्ममहावेदनया क्रिमिदाहायुधकृतो भवति ॥
लग्नाच्छिद्रात्रकोणेषु रव्याराकिंनिशाकरैः ।
मृत्युः स्याच्चैलपातेन शस्त्रकुड्यादिपाशजः ||
See also Adhyaya V-A. sloka 10, infre.
36
verses:
तुलायां रुधिरे याते वृषभस्थे दिवाकरे ।
नन्द्रे मन्दगृहं प्राप्ते विण्मध्ये मरणं भवेत् ॥ ७७ ॥

If at a person's birth Mars occupy Libra
and the Sun Taurus and the Moon a sign owned by
Saturn, the astrologer may predict such a person's death
in the midst of fæces and filth. (cf. Adhyaya 5 A.-Sl. 8).
बलिना शनिना दृष्टे क्षीणेन्दौ निधनाश्रिते ।
गुदाक्षिरुपडिया वा मृत्युः शस्त्रकृतो भवेत् ॥ ७८ ॥

If the waning Moon occupying the 8th
bhava be aspected by Saturn in strength, death will take
place through the agony caused by a disease of the anus
or the eye, or through an operation by means of an
instrument.
लग्नाच्छिद्रत्रिकोण स्थैरर्कारार्किनिशाकरैः ।
मृत्युः स्याच्छैलवोतन वज्रकुड्यादिभिश्च वा ॥ ७९ ॥

If the Sun, Mars, Saturn and the Moon
occupy the 8th bhava or a triangular position from the
Lagna, the death of the person will take place from the
effects of a strong mountain storm, the fall of a thunder-
bolt, a wall and the like.
बलिना कुजेन दृष्टे क्षीणेन्दौ रन्ध्रगेऽर्कंजे मृत्युः ।
गुल्ममहावेदनया क्रिमिदाहायुधकृतो भवति ॥
लग्नाच्छिद्रात्रकोणेषु रव्याराकिंनिशाकरैः ।
मृत्युः स्याच्चैलपातेन शस्त्रकुड्यादिपाशजः ||

title: Adh. V.
content:
282
आतकपारिआते
Adh. V.
॥ भौमारुणौ यदि परस्परराशियुक्तौ
केन्द्रस्थितौ निधननायकखेचरेन्द्रात् ।
जातोऽवसानसमये क्षितिपालकोपात्
शूलादिकायुधवरैर्निधनं समेति ॥ ८० ॥
Sloka 80. If, at a person's birth, Mars and the
Sun occupy houses owned by each other and are in
Kendra positions with respect to the planet that is the
lord of the 8th bhava, the person will at his latter end
incur the displeasure of the sovereign and suffer death
by being impaled at the stake or by some other instru-
ment of execution.
NOTES.
The following is the reading of the sloka as given in होरासार
भौमार्कजो यदिपरस्परभागसंस्यो क्षेत्र थवा निधनभैशयुते च केन्द्रे ।
तस्यावसानसमये क्षितिपालकोपात् शूलादिनायुधशतैर्निधनं समेति ॥
॥ चन्द्रे तनौ दिनकरे विबलेऽष्टमस्थे
** लग्नाज्यये सुरगुरौ सुखगे च पापे ।
जातस्य तस्य शयनाच्च्युतहेतुमृत्युः
शस्त्रेण वा निशि निषादकृतेन वा स्यात् ॥ ८१ ॥
Sloka 81. When the Moon is in the Lagna and
the Sun is without strength in the 8th bhava and Jupiter
occupies the 12th bhava, and a malefic planet is in the
4th bhava, the person born will die by falling from his
couch, or being assassinated at night by a low out-cast.
NOTES
The following is the reading adopted in होरासार.
लग्ने शशी दिनकरे विबलेऽष्टमस्थे लग्नाद्यये सुखगतेऽपि च पापखेटे ।
जातस्य हस्तनयनच्युतदेशमृत्युः शस्त्रेण वा निशि निषादकृतेन वा स्यात् ॥
verses:
॥ भौमारुणौ यदि परस्परराशियुक्तौ
केन्द्रस्थितौ निधननायकखेचरेन्द्रात् ।
जातोऽवसानसमये क्षितिपालकोपात्
शूलादिकायुधवरैर्निधनं समेति ॥

If, at a person's birth, Mars and the
Sun occupy houses owned by each other and are in
Kendra positions with respect to the planet that is the
lord of the 8th bhava, the person will at his latter end
incur the displeasure of the sovereign and suffer death
by being impaled at the stake or by some other instru-
ment of execution.

॥ चन्द्रे तनौ दिनकरे विबलेऽष्टमस्थे
लग्नाज्यये सुरगुरौ सुखगे च पापे ।
जातस्य तस्य शयनाच्च्युतहेतुमृत्युः
शस्त्रेण वा निशि निषादकृतेन वा स्यात् ॥

When the Moon is in the Lagna and
the Sun is without strength in the 8th bhava and Jupiter
occupies the 12th bhava, and a malefic planet is in the
4th bhava, the person born will die by falling from his
couch, or being assassinated at night by a low out-cast.

title: पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
content:
51. 82-85
पञ्चमोऽध्यायः
283
लग्नेश निधनांशस्थे मूढे पष्ठगतेऽथवा ।
क्षुद्राघया च मरण बन्धुहीने महीतले ॥ ८२ ॥
Sloka 82. When the lord of the Lagna occupies
the 61th Navamsa from the Lagna or is eclipsed by the
Sun or is in the 6th bhava, the death of the person con-
cerned will be by famine on the bare ground with no
relation by his side.
T
आयुर्विलग्नाधिपती बलेन हीनौ धराम्रनुरऋणेशयुक्तः ।
युद्धे मृति तत्य वदन्ति तज्ज्ञाः शत्रण जातस्य मृतिं विशेषात् ॥
Sluka 83. If, at a person's birth, the lords of the
8th and the 1st bhava be both weak and Mars be in
conjunction with the lord of the 6th bhava, he will die,
say the astrologers, in battle, and that too by a blow
inflicted by a weapon.
NOTES
The second पार (Pada) reads as हींनौ थरारूनुव्रणेशयुक्तौ in सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि.
लग्रेश्वरे वाहननाथयुक्ते वागीश्वरेणापि युते त्वजीर्णात्
दारेश्वरे वाहनवित्तराशिनाथान्विते वा मरणं त्वजीर्णात् ॥८४
Sloka 84. When the lord of the Lagna is in con-
junction with that of the 4th bhava as well as of the 2nd
bhava, death will result from indigestion. When the
lord of the 7th bhava is in conjunction with the lords
of the 2nd and the 4th, death will result from the same
cause.
NOTES.
કુ? છ
देहेश्वरे is the reading adopted in सत्रार्थनिचन्तामणि for दारेश्वेर in सत्रर्थि
चिन्तामणि in the latter half of this sloka.
मुक्त्यंशपो भानुसुतेन युक्तो दुःस्थानगो वा विषभक्षणेन ।
सहाहिना वा शिखिना च तस्य मृत्यर्भवेद्रञ्जनिबन्धनेन ॥ ८५ ॥
verses:
लग्नेश निधनांशस्थे मूढे पष्ठगतेऽथवा ।
क्षुद्राघया च मरण बन्धुहीने महीतले ॥

When the lord of the Lagna occupies the 61th Navamsa from the Lagna or is eclipsed by the Sun or is in the 6th bhava, the death of the person concerned will be by famine on the bare ground with no relation by his side.
आयुर्विलग्नाधिपती बलेन हीनौ धराम्रनुरऋणेशयुक्तः ।
युद्धे मृति तत्य वदन्ति तज्ज्ञाः शत्रण जातस्य मृतिं विशेषात् ॥

If, at a person's birth, the lords of the 8th and the 1st bhava be both weak and Mars be in conjunction with the lord of the 6th bhava, he will die, say the astrologers, in battle, and that too by a blow inflicted by a weapon.
लग्रेश्वरे वाहननाथयुक्ते वागीश्वरेणापि युते त्वजीर्णात्
दारेश्वरे वाहनवित्तराशिनाथान्विते वा मरणं त्वजीर्णात् ॥

When the lord of the Lagna is in conjunction with that of the 4th bhava as well as of the 2nd bhava, death will result from indigestion. When the lord of the 7th bhava is in conjunction with the lords of the 2nd and the 4th, death will result from the same cause.
मुक्त्यंशपो भानुसुतेन युक्तो दुःस्थानगो वा विषभक्षणेन ।
सहाहिना वा शिखिना च तस्य मृत्यर्भवेद्रञ्जनिबन्धनेन ॥

content:
284
बालकपारिजाते
Adh. V
Sloka 85. When the lord of the 10th Navamsa
from the Lagna is in conjunction with Saturn or occu
pies a दुःस्थान Dusthana (i.e. the 6th, the Sth or the 12th
bhava), the person concerned will die by swallowing
poison. When the lord of the 10th Navamsa from the
Lagna is in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu, death will
be by hanging.
NOTES
This sloka reads thus in सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि
भुक्त्यङ्गपौ भानुसुतेन युक्तौ दुःस्थानगौ वा विषभक्षणेन ।
राहुध्वजाभ्यां सहितौ च दुःस्थाबुद्वन्धनात्तस्य मृतिं वदन्ति ||
पिशाचपीडाग्निजले विपत्स्याद् भौमाहिमन्दान्यतमेन युक्ते ।
क्षीणे शशाङ्के निधनस्थिते च दुःस्थे त्वपस्मारभयान्मृतिः स्यात् ॥
Sloka 86. There will be a trouble due to demonia-
cal possession or danger from fire or water when the
waning Moon in conjunction with Mars, Rahu or
Saturn occupies the 8th bhava. If the Moon under the
conditions stated above occupies any other bad position,
death will follow from a fearful epileptic fit.
NOTES
Vide also Adhyaya XIV, sloka 62 (latter half) infra.
रन्ध्रस्थानगते सूर्ये भौमे वा बलवर्जिते ।
वित्त पापग्रहैर्युक्ते पित्तरोगान्मृतिं वदेत् ॥ ८७ ॥
Sloka 87. When the Sun or Mars without strength
occupies the 8th bhava, and malefic planets are in the
2nd, the astrologer should predict death from a bilious
complaint.
जलराशिगते चन्द्रे चाष्टमस्थेऽथवा गुरौ ।
पापग्रहेण संदृष्टे क्षयरोगान्मृतिं वदेत् ॥ ८८ ॥
verses:
Sloka 85. When the lord of the 10th Navamsa
from the Lagna is in conjunction with Saturn or occu
pies a दुःस्थान Dusthana (i.e. the 6th, the Sth or the 12th
bhava), the person concerned will die by swallowing
poison. When the lord of the 10th Navamsa from the
Lagna is in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu, death will
be by hanging.

Sloka 86. There will be a trouble due to demonia-
cal possession or danger from fire or water when the
waning Moon in conjunction with Mars, Rahu or
Saturn occupies the 8th bhava. If the Moon under the
conditions stated above occupies any other bad position,
death will follow from a fearful epileptic fit.

Sloka 87. When the Sun or Mars without strength
occupies the 8th bhava, and malefic planets are in the
2nd, the astrologer should predict death from a bilious
complaint.

title: मोऽध्यायः
content:
81. 96-99
* पर मोऽध्यायः
NOTES
287
सर्वार्थचिन्तामणि reads कमान्वेने for कन्यान्विते.
: 

ia
भूसूनुलग्ने यदि वा तदंशे सूर्यान्विते कृष्णनिशाकरे तु ।
फणीशचन्द्रात्मज संयुतेऽर्कराशौ यदा तर्धदरप्रभेदम् ॥ ९६ ॥
Sloka 96. When the rising sign or its Navamsa
is owned by Mars and occupied by the Sun, and the
waning Moon in conjunction with Rahu and Mercury
occupies Leo, the person concerned will have his belly
ripped.
NOTES
The latter half of the Sloka reads thus in सवार्था चन्ता माण
फणीन्द्र चन्द्रात्मज संयुतेऽर्करश्म्याभिभूते द्यदरस्य भेदः ।
मन्दोदये सौम्यदृशा विहीने सर्पार्कयुक्ते यदि कृष्णचन्द्रे ।
नाभिप्रदेशोत्तरभेदमाहुः शत्रण जातस्य पराशराद्याः ॥ ९७ ॥
Sloka 97. When Saturn in the rising sign is with-
out benefic aspect and the waning Moon is in conjunc-
tion with Rahu and the Sun, the person born, say
Parasara and other authorities, will suffer a wound by
a weapon in the upper region from the navel.
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये चन्द्रे लग्ननाथेन वीक्षिते ।
मन्दमान्धगुसंयुक्ते तस्य दुर्मरणं वदेत् ॥ ९८ ॥
Sloka 98. When the Moon in the 6th, the 8th or
the 12th bhava is aspected by the lord of the rising sign
and is in conjunction with Saturn, Mandi and Rahu,
the person born will die an unnatural death.
मेषूरणस्थ यदि चित्रभानौ भौमे चतुर्थे न च सौम्ययुक्ते ।
सौम्ये विलग्नापगते तु मृत्युं गोशृङ्गतः शुलनिपाततो वा ॥ ९९ ॥
:
verses:
भूसूनुलग्ने यदि वा तदंशे सूर्यान्विते कृष्णनिशाकरे तु ।
फणीशचन्द्रात्मज संयुतेऽर्कराशौ यदा तर्धदरप्रभेदम् ॥

When the rising sign or its Navamsa
is owned by Mars and occupied by the Sun, and the
waning Moon in conjunction with Rahu and Mercury
occupies Leo, the person concerned will have his belly
ripped.
मन्दोदये सौम्यदृशा विहीने सर्पार्कयुक्ते यदि कृष्णचन्द्रे ।
नाभिप्रदेशोत्तरभेदमाहुः शत्रण जातस्य पराशराद्याः ॥

When Saturn in the rising sign is with-
out benefic aspect and the waning Moon is in conjunc-
tion with Rahu and the Sun, the person born, say
Parasara and other authorities, will suffer a wound by
a weapon in the upper region from the navel.
षष्ठाष्टमव्यये चन्द्रे लग्ननाथेन वीक्षिते ।
मन्दमान्धगुसंयुक्ते तस्य दुर्मरणं वदेत् ॥

When the Moon in the 6th, the 8th or
the 12th bhava is aspected by the lord of the rising sign
and is in conjunction with Saturn, Mandi and Rahu,
the person born will die an unnatural death.
मेषूरणस्थ यदि चित्रभानौ भौमे चतुर्थे न च सौम्ययुक्ते ।
सौम्ये विलग्नापगते तु मृत्युं गोशृङ्गतः शुलनिपाततो वा ॥

content:
288
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. V
Sloka 99. When the Sun is in the 10th bhava,
Mars in the 4th not in conjunction with a benefic pla-
net and when Mercury is in the rising sign, death will
be inflicted by the horns of an ox or cow or by the fall
of a dart or spear.
दशमसुखसमेतैः पापदृष्टैश्च सौम्यै-
रुदयनिधनयातैः शूलपातान्मृतिः स्यात् ।
शशिनि तनुगृहस्थे बन्धुगे भानुपुत्रे
कलहजनितदोषैरंबरस्थ च भौमे ॥ १०० ॥
b
Sloka 100. When benefic planets aspected by male-
fic ones occupy the 10th, the 4th, the 1st or the 8th
bhava, the death of the person concerned will be due to
the fall of a spear. When the Moon is in the rising
sign, Saturn in the 4th bhava and Mars in the 10th,
death will result from the bad effects of a fracas.
लग्नं गते दिनकर तरुणीगतेन्दौ
पापेक्षिते कलहतोयभयान्मृतिः स्यात् ।
लग्ने दिनेशशशिनौ द्विशरीरकेऽन्ये
पापेक्षिता यदि बहूदकशृङ्गिदंष्टात् ॥ १०१ ॥
Sloka 101. When the Sun is in the rising sign and
the Moon in Virgo aspected by a malefic planet, the
death of the person concerned will result from risk in a
quarrel or from water. If the Sun and the Moon be in
the Lagna and other planets occupy a dual sign being
aspected by malefic planets, death will be caused from
the fang of a horned aquatic animal found in large mass-
es of water such as lakes and rivers.
verses:
Sloka 99. When the Sun is in the 10th bhava,
Mars in the 4th not in conjunction with a benefic pla-
net and when Mercury is in the rising sign, death will
be inflicted by the horns of an ox or cow or by the fall
of a dart or spear.

दशमसुखसमेतैः पापदृष्टैश्च सौम्यै-
रुदयनिधनयातैः शूलपातान्मृतिः स्यात् ।
शशिनि तनुगृहस्थे बन्धुगे भानुपुत्रे
कलहजनितदोषैरंबरस्थ च भौमे ॥ १०० ॥

Sloka 100. When benefic planets aspected by male-
fic ones occupy the 10th, the 4th, the 1st or the 8th
bhava, the death of the person concerned will be due to
the fall of a spear. When the Moon is in the rising
sign, Saturn in the 4th bhava and Mars in the 10th,
death will result from the bad effects of a fracas.
लग्नं गते दिनकर तरुणीगतेन्दौ
पापेक्षिते कलहतोयभयान्मृतिः स्यात् ।
लग्ने दिनेशशशिनौ द्विशरीरकेऽन्ये
पापेक्षिता यदि बहूदकशृङ्गिदंष्टात् ॥ १०१ ॥

Sloka 101. When the Sun is in the rising sign and
the Moon in Virgo aspected by a malefic planet, the
death of the person concerned will result from risk in a
quarrel or from water. If the Sun and the Moon be in
